gept.example_en: My mother asked me to run a few errands at the supermarket after school.
gept.example_zh: 媽媽要我放學後去超市辦幾件雜事。

gept.example_en: Despite the heavy rain, we managed to arrive at the airport on time.
gept.example_zh: 儘管下著大雨，我們仍設法準時抵達機場。

gept.example_en: The manager scheduled a meeting for nine o'clock tomorrow morning.
gept.example_zh: 經理把會議安排在明天早上九點。

gept.example_en: Because of the typhoon, the school decided to postpone the sports day.
gept.example_zh: 由於颱風來襲，學校決定將運動會延期。

gept.example_en: All students are required to attend the opening ceremony next Monday.
gept.example_zh: 所有學生下週一都必須出席開學典禮。

gept.example_en: Could you recommend a good restaurant near the train station?
gept.example_zh: 你可以推薦一家車站附近不錯的餐廳嗎？

gept.example_en: The package will be delivered to your home by Friday afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 這個包裹將會在週五下午前送到你家。

gept.example_en: Several customers complained about the noise from the construction site.
gept.example_zh: 好幾位顧客抱怨工地的噪音。

gept.example_en: The waiter apologized for bringing the wrong dish to our table.
gept.example_zh: 服務生為送錯菜到我們桌上道歉。

gept.example_en: Our teacher gave us a difficult writing assignment over the weekend.
gept.example_zh: 老師給我們一份週末要完成的困難寫作作業。

gept.example_en: Please remember that the deadline for the report is this Friday.
gept.example_zh: 請記得這份報告的截止期限是這週五。

gept.example_en: She prepared the slides carefully for her presentation in class.
gept.example_zh: 她為了課堂上的簡報細心準備投影片。

gept.example_en: My colleagues and I usually have lunch together in the company cafeteria.
gept.example_zh: 我和同事們通常在公司餐廳一起吃午餐。

gept.example_en: He submitted his application for the summer internship last week.
gept.example_zh: 他上週遞交了暑期實習的申請。

gept.example_en: Studying abroad is a great opportunity to improve your language skills.
gept.example_zh: 出國留學是提升語言能力的絕佳機會。

gept.example_en: Working as a tour guide gave me valuable experience in dealing with people.
gept.example_zh: 擔任導遊讓我獲得與人相處的寶貴經驗。

gept.example_en: She completed a three-month internship at an international trading company.
gept.example_zh: 她在一家國際貿易公司完成了三個月的實習。

gept.example_en: Our travel agent emailed us a detailed itinerary for the trip to Japan.
gept.example_zh: 旅行社用電子郵件寄來日本之旅的詳細行程表。

gept.example_en: I made a reservation for two at the new Italian restaurant downtown.
gept.example_zh: 我在市中心那家新開的義大利餐廳預訂了兩人位。

gept.example_en: Kenting is a popular destination for college students during summer vacation.
gept.example_zh: 墾丁是大學生暑假時熱門的旅遊目的地。

gept.example_en: The hotel offers comfortable accommodation at a reasonable price.
gept.example_zh: 這家飯店以合理的價格提供舒適的住宿。

gept.example_en: She bought a small wooden elephant as a souvenir from Thailand.
gept.example_zh: 她從泰國買了一個小木象當作紀念品。

gept.example_en: We spent the whole afternoon sightseeing in the old part of the city.
gept.example_zh: 我們整個下午都在舊城區觀光。

gept.example_en: The new manager has many fresh ideas to improve our department.
gept.example_zh: 新經理有許多新點子可以改善我們的部門。

gept.example_en: Our team is working on an important project for a foreign client.
gept.example_zh: 我們團隊正在為一位外國客戶執行一個重要的專案。

gept.example_en: Good service is the best way to keep our customers happy and loyal.
gept.example_zh: 良好的服務是讓顧客滿意並保持忠誠的最佳方式。

gept.example_en: The company's new policy allows employees to work from home twice a week.
gept.example_zh: 公司的新政策允許員工每週在家工作兩天。

gept.example_en: Her excellent performance this year earned her a promotion.
gept.example_zh: 她今年優秀的表現為她贏得了升遷。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 可獲得的、有空的
gept.example_en: I'm sorry, but the doctor is not available until next Tuesday.
gept.example_zh: 很抱歉，醫生要到下週二才有空。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 負責的、有責任的
gept.example_en: As a class leader, you are responsible for keeping everyone informed.
gept.example_zh: 身為班長，你有責任讓大家都知道相關訊息。

gept.example_en: My younger sibling often borrows my clothes without asking me first.
gept.example_zh: 我的弟弟妹妹經常未經我同意就借走我的衣服。

gept.example_en: We spend every Christmas with my in-laws at their countryside house.
gept.example_zh: 我們每年聖誕節都和姻親在他們的鄉間房子度過。

gept.example_en: My godparent gave me a beautiful silver necklace for my eighteenth birthday.
gept.example_zh: 我的教母在我十八歲生日送了我一條漂亮的銀項鍊。

gept.example_en: After his father died, he became the main breadwinner of the family.
gept.example_zh: 父親過世後，他成為家中主要的經濟支柱。

gept.example_en: Many companies offer health insurance benefits to employees and their spouses.
gept.example_zh: 許多公司為員工及其配偶提供健康保險福利。

gept.example_en: The toddler wobbled across the playground while her mother watched carefully.
gept.example_zh: 那個學步兒童搖搖晃晃地走過遊樂場，母親仔細地看著。

gept.example_en: Infants typically begin to recognize familiar faces around three months old.
gept.example_zh: 嬰兒通常在三個月大左右開始認得熟悉的臉孔。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞/形容詞) 青少年；青春期的
gept.example_en: Adolescent years can be confusing because of rapid emotional and physical changes.
gept.example_zh: 青春期可能令人困惑，因為情緒和身體變化迅速。

gept.example_en: Many retirees enjoy gardening and traveling now that they have free time.
gept.example_zh: 許多退休人員現在有空閒時間，享受園藝和旅行。

gept.example_en: She is generous with her time and always helps newcomers feel welcome.
gept.example_zh: 她在時間上很大方，總是讓新人感到受歡迎。

gept.example_en: My grandfather is too stubborn to admit when he makes a mistake.
gept.example_zh: 我祖父太固執了，從不承認自己犯錯。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 有雄心的；有抱負的
gept.example_en: She is ambitious and hopes to become a company executive before forty.
gept.example_zh: 她很有抱負，希望在四十歲前成為公司高階主管。

gept.example_en: He is considerate and always asks his roommate before turning on music.
gept.example_zh: 他很體貼，總是先詢問室友再打開音樂。

gept.example_en: Her witty remarks made everyone at the dinner table laugh out loud.
gept.example_zh: 她機智的言論讓晚餐桌上的每個人都大笑出聲。

gept.example_en: He felt frustrated after failing the driving test for the third time.
gept.example_zh: 在第三次駕照考試失敗後，他感到很沮喪。

gept.example_en: She felt anxious about the job interview scheduled for the following morning.
gept.example_zh: 她對隔天早上安排的工作面試感到焦慮。

gept.example_en: I am grateful to my parents for supporting my dream of studying abroad.
gept.example_zh: 我很感激父母支持我出國留學的夢想。

gept.example_en: He felt jealous when his best friend won the scholarship instead of him.
gept.example_zh: 當他最好的朋友贏得獎學金而不是他時，他感到嫉妒。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 不知所措的；負荷過重的
gept.example_en: She felt overwhelmed by the amount of work due before the weekend.
gept.example_zh: 她對週末前要交的工作量感到不知所措。

gept.example_en: Hundreds of volunteers helped distribute food to families after the flood.
gept.example_zh: 數百名志工在洪水過後幫忙分發食物給災民家庭。

gept.example_en: The witness described the suspect's appearance in great detail to police.
gept.example_zh: 目擊者向警方詳細描述了嫌犯的外貌。

gept.example_en: The charity provides shelter and counseling for victims of domestic violence.
gept.example_zh: 該慈善機構為家庭暴力的受害者提供庇護和諮詢。

gept.example_en: She is a passionate advocate for children's rights in developing countries.
gept.example_zh: 她是發展中國家兒童權利的熱情倡導者。

gept.example_en: The dancer had a slender figure and moved across the stage gracefully.
gept.example_zh: 那位舞者身材苗條，優雅地在舞台上移動。

gept.example_en: The freckled girl smiled shyly when the photographer asked her to pose.
gept.example_zh: 那個有雀斑的女孩在攝影師請她擺姿勢時害羞地笑了。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 運動健將的；體格健壯的
gept.example_en: Her athletic build comes from years of competitive swimming and weight training.
gept.example_zh: 她健壯的體格源於多年的競技游泳和重量訓練。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 衣著整潔的；打理得宜的
gept.example_en: He always appears well-groomed and dresses neatly for important business meetings.
gept.example_zh: 他總是衣著整潔，在重要商務會議時穿得很整齊。

gept.example_en: She befriended the new student who seemed lonely during the first week.
gept.example_zh: 她與第一週看起來很孤單的新同學交朋友。

gept.example_en: He tried to comfort his sister after she received the disappointing news.
gept.example_zh: 在妹妹得到令人失望的消息後，他試圖安慰她。

gept.example_en: She felt heartbroken when her closest friend betrayed her trust completely.
gept.example_zh: 當她最親密的朋友完全背叛她的信任時，她感到心碎。

gept.example_en: The brothers finally reconciled after not speaking to each other for years.
gept.example_zh: 兄弟倆多年未說話後終於和解了。

gept.example_en: He proposed to his girlfriend on the bridge where they first met.
gept.example_zh: 他在他們初次相遇的橋上向女友求婚。

gept.example_en: Nothing could console the child after losing her favorite stuffed animal.
gept.example_zh: 在弄丟最心愛的填充玩偶後，沒有什麼能安慰那個孩子。

gept.example_en: My aunts love to gossip about the neighbors during family gatherings.
gept.example_zh: 我的阿姨們喜歡在家庭聚會時談論鄰居的八卦。

gept.example_en: I finally persuaded my father to take a vacation after months of arguing.
gept.example_zh: 在爭論數月後，我終於說服父親去度假。

gept.example_en: The teacher scolded the students for talking loudly during the exam.
gept.example_zh: 老師責罵學生在考試期間大聲說話。

gept.example_en: She is proud of her cultural heritage and teaches her children traditional songs.
gept.example_zh: 她以自己的文化遺產為傲，並教孩子們傳統歌曲。

gept.example_en: He traced his ancestry back to a small village in northern Italy.
gept.example_zh: 他將自己的血統追溯到義大利北部的一個小村莊。

gept.example_en: After living abroad for ten years, she finally obtained Canadian citizenship.
gept.example_zh: 在國外居住十年後，她終於取得加拿大公民身分。

gept.example_en: My grandmother speaks a dialect that few young people understand today.
gept.example_zh: 我祖母說一種如今很少年輕人聽得懂的方言。

gept.example_en: My cousin from Australia is visiting our family for the summer holidays.
gept.example_zh: 我來自澳洲的表親要來我們家過暑假。

gept.example_en: I bought my nephew a toy train for his fifth birthday party.
gept.example_zh: 我給姪子買了一輛玩具火車作為他五歲生日禮物。

gept.example_en: My niece won first prize at her school's annual art competition.
gept.example_zh: 我姪女在學校年度藝術比賽中贏得了第一名。

gept.example_en: His stepmother has been kind and supportive since she joined the family.
gept.example_zh: 他的繼母自從加入這個家庭以來一直親切又支持他。

gept.example_en: Her stepfather taught her how to ride a bicycle when she was six.
gept.example_zh: 她繼父在她六歲時教她如何騎自行車。

gept.example_en: After their parents died, their uncle became their legal guardian.
gept.example_zh: 父母過世後，他們的叔叔成為他們的法定監護人。

gept.example_en: The charity organization helps orphans find loving foster families nationwide.
gept.example_zh: 該慈善機構幫助孤兒在全國找到充滿愛的寄養家庭。

gept.example_en: The widow received many letters of sympathy after her husband's funeral.
gept.example_zh: 那位寡婦在丈夫葬禮後收到許多慰問信。

gept.example_en: The elderly widower lives alone but his neighbors check on him daily.
gept.example_zh: 那位年長的鰥夫獨自生活，但鄰居每天都會探望他。

gept.example_en: Her fiance gave her a beautiful diamond ring during their anniversary dinner.
gept.example_zh: 她未婚夫在週年紀念晚餐上送給她一枚漂亮的鑽石戒指。

gept.example_en: He introduced his fiancee to his parents at a quiet family dinner.
gept.example_zh: 他在一頓安靜的家庭晚餐上把未婚妻介紹給父母。

gept.example_en: The newlyweds are honeymooning in Hawaii for two relaxing weeks.
gept.example_zh: 那對新婚夫婦正在夏威夷度蜜月，享受兩週的放鬆時光。

gept.example_en: He remained a bachelor until he met his future wife at thirty-five.
gept.example_zh: 他一直是單身漢，直到三十五歲遇到他未來的妻子。

gept.example_en: He is just an acquaintance from work, not a close personal friend.
gept.example_zh: 他只是工作上認識的人，不是親密的私人朋友。

gept.example_en: My dog has been my faithful companion for the past twelve years.
gept.example_zh: 過去十二年來，我的狗一直是我忠實的夥伴。

gept.example_en: My mentor helped me develop the confidence to start my own business.
gept.example_zh: 我的導師幫助我培養出創業的信心。

gept.example_en: The two tennis players have been rivals since they were teenagers.
gept.example_zh: 這兩位網球選手從青少年時期就是對手。

gept.example_en: Teenagers are often heavily influenced by their peers in school.
gept.example_zh: 青少年在學校經常深受同儕的影響。

gept.example_en: He has been my best buddy since we met in kindergarten.
gept.example_zh: 自從我們在幼稚園認識以來，他就是我最好的朋友。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 充滿愛的；親切的
gept.example_en: She gave her daughter an affectionate hug before leaving for work.
gept.example_zh: 她在去上班前給女兒一個充滿愛的擁抱。

gept.example_en: The compassionate nurse always took extra time to listen to patients.
gept.example_zh: 那位富有同情心的護士總是花額外的時間傾聽病人的話。

gept.example_en: His sympathetic response made her feel understood and less alone.
gept.example_zh: 他充滿同情的回應讓她感到被理解，不再那麼孤單。

gept.example_en: A good therapist must be empathetic and patient with every client.
gept.example_zh: 一位好的治療師必須對每位個案都有同理心且有耐心。

gept.example_en: He has been a loyal friend through all my difficult times.
gept.example_zh: 在我所有艱難的時刻，他都是一位忠誠的朋友。

gept.example_en: She is trustworthy and never reveals secrets that friends share with her.
gept.example_zh: 她值得信賴，從不洩露朋友與她分享的秘密。

gept.example_en: He is reliable and always shows up on time for important meetings.
gept.example_zh: 他很可靠，總是準時出席重要會議。

gept.example_en: She is brutally honest and never sugarcoats her opinions about your work.
gept.example_zh: 她非常誠實，從不粉飾她對你工作的意見。

gept.example_en: His sincere apology made it easy for her to forgive him quickly.
gept.example_zh: 他真誠的道歉讓她很容易就快速原諒他。

gept.example_en: Despite his huge success, he remains humble and treats everyone equally.
gept.example_zh: 儘管他取得了巨大的成功，但仍保持謙虛，平等對待每個人。

gept.example_en: She is modest about her achievements and never brags to her colleagues.
gept.example_zh: 她對自己的成就很謙遜，從不向同事誇耀。

gept.example_en: His arrogant attitude made it difficult for him to make new friends.
gept.example_zh: 他傲慢的態度讓他很難交到新朋友。

gept.example_en: Don't be selfish; please share your candy with your younger brother.
gept.example_zh: 不要自私，請把你的糖果分給弟弟。

gept.example_en: Her selfless dedication to the orphanage inspired many people in the community.
gept.example_zh: 她對孤兒院無私的奉獻激勵了社區中的許多人。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 體貼的；深思熟慮的
gept.example_en: It was thoughtful of you to remember my birthday with a handwritten card.
gept.example_zh: 你能用手寫卡片記住我的生日，真是體貼。

gept.example_en: The polite child always says please and thank you to her parents.
gept.example_zh: 那個有禮貌的孩子總是對父母說請和謝謝。

gept.example_en: It was rude of him to interrupt while his grandmother was speaking.
gept.example_zh: 他在祖母說話時打斷，真是粗魯。

gept.example_en: She was too shy to speak in front of the entire classroom.
gept.example_zh: 她太害羞，無法在整個教室面前發言。

gept.example_en: He is outgoing and makes new friends easily wherever he travels.
gept.example_zh: 他很外向，無論去哪裡旅行都能輕鬆交到新朋友。

gept.example_en: Introverted people often need quiet time alone to recharge their energy.
gept.example_zh: 內向的人通常需要獨處的安靜時間來恢復精力。

gept.example_en: His extroverted personality makes him perfect for a sales career.
gept.example_zh: 他外向的個性使他非常適合銷售工作。

gept.example_en: She remained optimistic about her recovery despite the doctor's warnings.
gept.example_zh: 儘管醫生發出警告，她對自己的康復仍然保持樂觀。

gept.example_en: He has a pessimistic view and always expects the worst possible outcome.
gept.example_zh: 他抱持悲觀的看法，總是預期最糟糕的結果。

gept.example_en: Her cheerful smile brightens up the entire office every Monday morning.
gept.example_zh: 她開朗的笑容讓整個辦公室每週一早晨都明亮起來。

gept.example_en: He has been gloomy ever since his girlfriend moved to another country.
gept.example_zh: 自從女友搬到另一個國家後，他一直很憂鬱。

gept.example_en: She felt miserable after losing her job and her apartment in one week.
gept.example_zh: 在一週內失去工作和公寓後，她感到非常痛苦。

gept.example_en: She was delighted to receive the acceptance letter from her dream university.
gept.example_zh: 她很高興收到夢想中大學的錄取通知書。

gept.example_en: The children were thrilled when their parents announced the trip to Disneyland.
gept.example_zh: 當父母宣布要去迪士尼樂園時，孩子們興奮不已。

gept.example_en: My father was furious when he discovered the broken kitchen window.
gept.example_zh: 當我父親發現廚房窗戶破了時，他暴怒不已。

gept.example_en: I was annoyed by the loud music coming from the apartment upstairs.
gept.example_zh: 我對樓上公寓傳來的大聲音樂感到惱怒。

gept.example_en: She felt irritated by her brother's constant questions during the movie.
gept.example_zh: 電影播放期間，她對弟弟不斷的問題感到煩躁。

gept.example_en: He was upset to learn that his favorite teacher was leaving the school.
gept.example_zh: 得知他最喜愛的老師要離開學校時，他感到很心煩。

gept.example_en: She felt depressed for several months after her grandmother passed away.
gept.example_zh: 祖母過世後，她有好幾個月感到憂鬱。

gept.example_en: He felt lonely after moving to a new city where he knew nobody.
gept.example_zh: 搬到一個誰都不認識的新城市後，他感到孤獨。

gept.example_en: Many elderly people feel isolated when their children move far away.
gept.example_zh: 許多老年人在子女搬到遠處後感到孤立。

gept.example_en: She was embarrassed when she realized her shirt was inside out all morning.
gept.example_zh: 當她意識到整個早上襯衫都穿反時，她感到很尷尬。

gept.example_en: He felt ashamed of lying to his parents about his exam results.
gept.example_zh: 他為對父母謊報考試結果感到羞愧。

gept.example_en: She felt guilty for forgetting her best friend's wedding anniversary.
gept.example_zh: 她為忘記最好朋友的結婚紀念日而感到內疚。

gept.example_en: His parents are proud of his achievements in mathematics and science.
gept.example_zh: 他的父母為他在數學和科學上的成就感到自豪。

gept.example_en: She feels content with her simple life in the small mountain village.
gept.example_zh: 她對自己在小山村裡的簡單生活感到滿足。

gept.example_en: The customers were satisfied with the quick service at the restaurant.
gept.example_zh: 顧客對餐廳快速的服務感到滿意。

gept.example_en: She felt relieved when the doctor said her test results were normal.
gept.example_zh: 當醫生說她的檢驗結果正常時，她鬆了一口氣。

gept.example_en: He was nervous about giving a speech in front of three hundred people.
gept.example_zh: 在三百個人面前演講讓他感到緊張。

gept.example_en: The child was scared of the thunder during the heavy storm last night.
gept.example_zh: 昨晚暴風雨中，那孩子很害怕雷聲。

gept.example_en: She was terrified of spiders ever since one crawled on her face.
gept.example_zh: 自從一隻蜘蛛爬到她臉上後，她就極度害怕蜘蛛。

gept.example_en: My mother was worried when I did not call her for three days.
gept.example_zh: 當我三天沒打電話給母親時，她很擔心。

gept.example_en: She is confident that she will pass the certification exam on her first try.
gept.example_zh: 她有信心能在第一次嘗試就通過認證考試。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 沒自信的；不安全的
gept.example_en: He felt insecure about his appearance throughout his teenage years.
gept.example_zh: 在整個青少年時期，他對自己的外表感到沒自信。

gept.example_en: She was hesitant to accept the job offer because of the long commute.
gept.example_zh: 由於通勤時間長，她對接受工作機會感到猶豫。

gept.example_en: He is determined to finish the marathon despite his injured knee.
gept.example_zh: 儘管膝蓋受傷，他仍決心要完成馬拉松比賽。

gept.example_en: She is a diligent student who reviews her notes every single evening.
gept.example_zh: 她是一位勤奮的學生，每晚都複習筆記。

gept.example_en: My younger brother is too lazy to clean his messy bedroom.
gept.example_zh: 我弟弟太懶了，不願清理他髒亂的臥室。

gept.example_en: She is very creative and always finds unique solutions to difficult problems.
gept.example_zh: 她非常有創意，總是能為困難的問題找到獨特的解決方案。

gept.example_en: Children are naturally curious about how the world around them works.
gept.example_zh: 孩子們對周圍世界如何運作天生就充滿好奇。

gept.example_en: My adventurous sister has hiked through over twenty different countries already.
gept.example_zh: 我愛冒險的姊姊已經徒步走過二十多個不同的國家。

gept.example_en: He is cautious with money and saves a portion of every paycheck.
gept.example_zh: 他對金錢很謹慎，每一份薪水都會存下一部分。

gept.example_en: His reckless driving caused a serious accident on the highway last month.
gept.example_zh: 他魯莽的駕駛上個月在高速公路上造成嚴重的車禍。

gept.example_en: Teachers must be patient with students who learn at a slower pace.
gept.example_zh: 老師對於學習速度較慢的學生必須有耐心。

gept.example_en: He gets impatient when his computer takes too long to start up.
gept.example_zh: 當他的電腦啟動太久時，他會變得沒耐心。

gept.example_en: She remained calm even when the building's fire alarm went off suddenly.
gept.example_zh: 即使大樓的火警警報突然響起，她仍然保持冷靜。

gept.example_en: The neighbors became hostile after years of disputes about property boundaries.
gept.example_zh: 在多年關於財產邊界的爭議後，鄰居變得敵對。

gept.example_en: The local villagers were hospitable and welcomed us into their homes.
gept.example_zh: 當地村民非常好客，歡迎我們進入他們的家。

gept.example_en: The friendly waiter remembered our names and brought our usual coffee orders.
gept.example_zh: 那位友善的服務生記得我們的名字，並送上我們平常點的咖啡。

gept.example_en: The unfriendly cashier did not greet a single customer all afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 那位不友善的收銀員整個下午都沒有跟任何一位顧客打招呼。

gept.example_en: She is sociable and enjoys hosting dinner parties for her friends.
gept.example_zh: 她善於社交，喜歡為朋友舉辦晚宴。

gept.example_en: He is reserved at first but becomes talkative once he knows you.
gept.example_zh: 他一開始很拘謹，但一旦認識你就會變得健談。

gept.example_en: She is very mature for her age and handles responsibilities like an adult.
gept.example_zh: 她以她的年齡來說很成熟，處理責任像個成年人。

gept.example_en: His immature behavior at the meeting embarrassed everyone on his team.
gept.example_zh: 他在會議上不成熟的行為讓他團隊的每個人都感到難堪。

gept.example_en: She was naive to believe the stranger's promise of easy money.
gept.example_zh: 她太天真，竟相信陌生人輕鬆賺錢的承諾。

gept.example_en: My grandmother is wise and always gives me valuable life advice.
gept.example_zh: 我祖母很睿智，總是給我寶貴的人生建議。

gept.example_en: It was foolish of him to spend all his savings on a sports car.
gept.example_zh: 他把所有積蓄花在一輛跑車上，真是愚蠢。

gept.example_en: The clever student solved the math problem in just thirty seconds.
gept.example_zh: 那個聰明的學生在僅僅三十秒內就解出了那道數學題。

gept.example_en: She is intelligent and quickly grasps complex scientific concepts.
gept.example_zh: 她很有智慧，能迅速掌握複雜的科學概念。

gept.example_en: The gifted musician started playing piano when he was only three years old.
gept.example_zh: 那位有天賦的音樂家在僅僅三歲時就開始彈鋼琴。

gept.example_en: She is a talented artist whose paintings are sold in galleries worldwide.
gept.example_zh: 她是一位有才華的藝術家，畫作在全球的藝廊中販售。

gept.example_en: My father is hardworking and rarely takes a day off from his business.
gept.example_zh: 我父親很努力，很少從他的事業中請一天假。

gept.example_en: My piano teacher is strict but her students achieve excellent results.
gept.example_zh: 我的鋼琴老師很嚴格，但她的學生取得了優異的成績。

gept.example_en: The judge was lenient because it was the defendant's first offense.
gept.example_zh: 法官寬容處理，因為這是被告的初次犯罪。

gept.example_en: She has a gentle voice that immediately soothes crying babies.
gept.example_zh: 她有著溫柔的聲音，能立刻安撫哭泣的嬰兒。

gept.example_en: His harsh criticism made the young writer doubt her own talent.
gept.example_zh: 他嚴厲的批評讓那位年輕作家懷疑自己的才華。

gept.example_en: She gave her newborn baby a tender kiss on the forehead.
gept.example_zh: 她在剛出生寶寶的額頭上輕輕地一吻。

gept.example_en: He showed great affection for his elderly mother by visiting weekly.
gept.example_zh: 他每週探望年邁的母親，展現對她深厚的情感。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞/動詞) 聯繫；建立關係
gept.example_en: Twins often share a special bond that other siblings cannot understand.
gept.example_zh: 雙胞胎之間常常有著其他兄弟姊妹無法理解的特殊聯繫。

gept.example_en: It took years to rebuild trust after he broke his promise.
gept.example_zh: 在他違背承諾後，花了多年時間才重建信任。

gept.example_en: Her loyalty to the company was rewarded with a senior management position.
gept.example_zh: 她對公司的忠誠得到了高階管理職位的回報。

gept.example_en: Honesty is the foundation of every healthy long-term relationship.
gept.example_zh: 誠實是每段健康長久關係的基礎。

gept.example_en: Her kindness toward strangers reminds me of how my grandmother behaved.
gept.example_zh: 她對陌生人的善良讓我想起祖母的待人之道。

gept.example_en: The cruelty shown to animals in that video shocked the entire community.
gept.example_zh: 那段影片中對動物的殘忍讓整個社區都感到震驚。

gept.example_en: Jealousy destroyed their friendship after one of them won the promotion.
gept.example_zh: 在其中一人獲得升職後，嫉妒摧毀了他們的友誼。

gept.example_en: She felt a twinge of envy when she saw her friend's new car.
gept.example_zh: 當她看到朋友的新車時，感到一絲忌妒。

gept.example_en: The whole village shared in her sorrow after the tragic accident.
gept.example_zh: 在那場悲劇性的意外後，整個村莊都分擔了她的悲傷。

gept.example_en: It took her years to overcome the grief of losing her son.
gept.example_zh: 她花了好幾年才克服失去兒子的悲痛。

gept.example_en: Becoming a grandmother brought her endless joy and a new sense of purpose.
gept.example_zh: 當祖母為她帶來無盡的喜悅和新的人生目標。

gept.example_en: His parents could not hide their pride at his graduation ceremony.
gept.example_zh: 在他的畢業典禮上，他父母無法掩飾他們的自豪。

gept.example_en: He felt great shame for stealing money from his own brother.
gept.example_zh: 他為從自己親兄弟那裡偷錢而感到極大的羞愧。

gept.example_en: The guilt of lying kept her awake for several long nights.
gept.example_zh: 撒謊的內疚讓她連續好幾個漫長的夜晚都失眠。

gept.example_en: She has many regrets about not spending more time with her father.
gept.example_zh: 她對沒有花更多時間陪伴父親感到非常遺憾。

gept.example_en: It takes a strong person to forgive someone who has hurt them deeply.
gept.example_zh: 原諒一個深深傷害自己的人需要堅強的心。

gept.example_en: She accepted his sincere apology and they hugged each other tightly.
gept.example_zh: 她接受了他真誠的道歉，他們緊緊地擁抱了彼此。

gept.example_en: My parents rarely argue but they had a big fight last weekend.
gept.example_zh: 我父母很少爭吵，但上個週末他們大吵了一架。

gept.example_en: The two sisters quarreled over who would inherit the family heirloom.
gept.example_zh: 兩姊妹為誰將繼承家傳寶物而吵架。

gept.example_en: They tried to resolve the conflict through honest and open communication.
gept.example_zh: 他們試圖透過誠實開放的溝通來解決衝突。

gept.example_en: The neighbors had a dispute about the boundary of their two properties.
gept.example_zh: 鄰居們對兩處財產的邊界有爭議。

gept.example_en: A successful marriage requires both partners to compromise on important decisions.
gept.example_zh: 成功的婚姻需要雙方在重要決定上互相妥協。

gept.example_en: We could not agree on which restaurant to choose for dinner.
gept.example_zh: 我們無法決定要選哪家餐廳吃晚餐。

gept.example_en: I disagree with my brother about the best way to invest money.
gept.example_zh: 我和我哥哥對投資金錢的最佳方式意見不同。

gept.example_en: The teacher praised her for finishing the difficult project ahead of schedule.
gept.example_zh: 老師讚美她提前完成了那個困難的專案。

gept.example_en: He criticized his wife's cooking and immediately regretted his thoughtless words.
gept.example_zh: 他批評了妻子的廚藝，並立即後悔自己輕率的話。

gept.example_en: She received many compliments on her elegant dress at the wedding.
gept.example_zh: 她在婚禮上的優雅禮服收到了許多稱讚。

gept.example_en: He apologized for the insult and promised never to speak that way again.
gept.example_zh: 他為那個侮辱道歉，並承諾再也不會那樣說話。

gept.example_en: My older brother loves to tease me about my taste in music.
gept.example_zh: 我哥哥喜歡取笑我的音樂品味。

gept.example_en: It is unkind to mock people for the way they speak English.
gept.example_zh: 嘲弄別人說英文的方式是很不友善的。

gept.example_en: He tried to flatter his boss by complimenting her new haircut.
gept.example_zh: 他試圖透過稱讚老闆的新髮型來奉承她。

gept.example_en: My piano teacher always encourages me to practice more difficult pieces.
gept.example_zh: 我的鋼琴老師總是鼓勵我練習更困難的曲子。

gept.example_en: Don't let one failure discourage you from pursuing your dreams.
gept.example_zh: 不要讓一次失敗使你氣餒，放棄追求夢想。

gept.example_en: Her courage inspired many other young women to start their own businesses.
gept.example_zh: 她的勇氣激勵了許多其他年輕女性開創自己的事業。

gept.example_en: His coach motivates him to train harder before every important competition.
gept.example_zh: 他的教練在每場重要比賽前都激勵他更努力訓練。

gept.example_en: My family supported me throughout my difficult journey toward becoming a doctor.
gept.example_zh: 在我成為醫生的艱難旅程中，我的家人一直支持我。

gept.example_en: He could never abandon his elderly parents in their time of greatest need.
gept.example_zh: 在年邁父母最需要的時候，他絕不會拋棄他們。

gept.example_en: They decided to adopt a child after trying to have one for years.
gept.example_zh: 在嘗試生孩子多年後，他們決定收養一個小孩。

gept.example_en: She raised her three children alone after her husband passed away.
gept.example_zh: 丈夫過世後，她獨自撫養三個孩子。

gept.example_en: Good parents nurture their children's interests and unique individual talents.
gept.example_zh: 好的父母會培養孩子的興趣和獨特的個人才能。

gept.example_en: His strict upbringing taught him discipline and respect for elders.
gept.example_zh: 他嚴格的教養讓他學會了紀律和對長輩的尊重。

gept.example_en: There are five people living in our household including my grandparents.
gept.example_zh: 我們家有五個人住在一起，包括我的祖父母。

gept.example_en: All my relatives gather at our house for the Lunar New Year.
gept.example_zh: 我所有的親戚都會在農曆新年聚集到我們家。

gept.example_en: His ancestors came to America from Ireland over two hundred years ago.
gept.example_zh: 他的祖先在兩百多年前從愛爾蘭來到美國。

gept.example_en: She is a direct descendant of one of the country's founding leaders.
gept.example_zh: 她是該國其中一位開國領袖的直系後代。

gept.example_en: Our family has owned this farm for four generations already.
gept.example_zh: 我們家族擁有這個農場已經四代了。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞/形容詞) 長輩；年長的
gept.example_en: In our culture, we always show respect for elders in the community.
gept.example_zh: 在我們的文化中，我們總是對社區的長輩表示尊敬。

gept.example_en: The youngsters in our neighborhood organized a charity walk last Saturday.
gept.example_zh: 上週六，我們社區的年輕人組織了一場慈善健走活動。

gept.example_en: Most teenagers spend many hours on their phones every single day.
gept.example_zh: 大多數青少年每天都花很多小時在手機上。

gept.example_en: Many middle-aged adults start exercising more to maintain their health.
gept.example_zh: 許多中年人開始多運動以維持健康。

gept.example_en: The elderly couple has been married for over fifty years now.
gept.example_zh: 那對年長的夫妻已經結婚超過五十年了。

gept.example_en: Children develop language skills rapidly during the period of infancy.
gept.example_zh: 孩子在嬰兒期語言能力發展迅速。

gept.example_en: She has fond memories of her childhood spent in the countryside.
gept.example_zh: 她對在鄉間度過的童年有著美好的回憶。

gept.example_en: Adulthood brings new responsibilities and many difficult life decisions.
gept.example_zh: 成年期帶來新的責任和許多艱難的人生決定。

gept.example_en: They announced their engagement at a small dinner with close family.
gept.example_zh: 他們在與親密家人的小型晚餐上宣布了訂婚。

gept.example_en: Their wedding took place on a beautiful beach in southern Thailand.
gept.example_zh: 他們的婚禮在泰國南部一個美麗的海灘舉行。

gept.example_en: A successful marriage requires daily effort and excellent communication.
gept.example_zh: 成功的婚姻需要每日的努力和優質的溝通。

gept.example_en: After ten years of marriage, they decided to file for divorce.
gept.example_zh: 在結婚十年後，他們決定提出離婚。

gept.example_en: The couple is going through a difficult trial separation this year.
gept.example_zh: 這對夫妻今年正在經歷艱難的試行分居。

gept.example_en: They have been dating for six months and seem extremely happy together.
gept.example_zh: 他們約會已經六個月了，在一起看起來非常開心。

gept.example_en: She had a secret crush on her classmate throughout high school.
gept.example_zh: 在整個高中時期，她暗戀著一位同班同學。

gept.example_en: He likes to flirt with everyone but never takes anything seriously.
gept.example_zh: 他喜歡和每個人調情，但從不認真對待任何事。

gept.example_en: Their romance began at university and has lasted over twenty years.
gept.example_zh: 他們的戀情始於大學，已經持續了二十多年。

gept.example_en: The breakup was painful but she eventually moved on with her life.
gept.example_zh: 分手很痛苦，但她最終繼續過自己的生活。

gept.example_en: She remains good friends with her ex even after their divorce.
gept.example_zh: 即使在離婚後，她仍與前夫維持著好朋友關係。

gept.example_en: We chatted for hours about our childhood memories and favorite teachers.
gept.example_zh: 我們聊了好幾個小時關於童年回憶和最喜歡的老師。

gept.example_en: She enjoys conversing with strangers and learning about their cultures.
gept.example_zh: 她喜歡與陌生人交談並了解他們的文化。

gept.example_en: The family met to discuss plans for their grandfather's eightieth birthday.
gept.example_zh: 全家聚在一起討論祖父八十大壽的計畫。

gept.example_en: My brother and I debated politics over dinner for two hours.
gept.example_zh: 我和哥哥在晚餐時辯論政治長達兩個小時。

gept.example_en: It is rude to interrupt someone when they are speaking to you.
gept.example_zh: 當別人正在跟你說話時打斷他們是很沒禮貌的。

gept.example_en: She whispered a secret into her best friend's ear at lunch.
gept.example_zh: 她在午餐時對最好朋友的耳邊低語了一個秘密。

gept.example_en: He shouted at his sister for breaking his expensive video game console.
gept.example_zh: 他對妹妹大喊，因為她弄壞了他昂貴的電玩主機。

gept.example_en: My mother rarely yells but she was very angry that morning.
gept.example_zh: 我媽媽很少大叫，但那天早上她非常生氣。

gept.example_en: He mumbled an excuse and quickly left the awkward family dinner.
gept.example_zh: 他喃喃地說了個藉口，迅速離開那場尷尬的家庭晚餐。

gept.example_en: He used to stutter as a child but speech therapy helped him.
gept.example_zh: 他小時候曾經口吃，但語言治療幫助了他。

gept.example_en: The little girls giggled when they saw the puppy chasing its tail.
gept.example_zh: 小女孩們看到小狗追自己尾巴時咯咯地笑了。

gept.example_en: My grandfather has a deep laugh that fills the entire room.
gept.example_zh: 我祖父有著深沉的笑聲，能充滿整個房間。

gept.example_en: She always greets her customers with a warm and genuine smile.
gept.example_zh: 她總是以溫暖真誠的微笑問候顧客。

gept.example_en: My father frowned when I told him about my low test score.
gept.example_zh: 當我告訴父親我考試成績很低時，他皺起了眉頭。

gept.example_en: She wept silently in her bedroom after reading the heartbreaking letter.
gept.example_zh: 看完那封令人心碎的信後，她在臥室裡默默地哭泣。

gept.example_en: The child sobbed loudly when she could not find her teddy bear.
gept.example_zh: 那個孩子找不到她的泰迪熊時，大聲地啜泣。

gept.example_en: He let out a deep sigh of relief when the test was over.
gept.example_zh: 考試結束時，他深深地嘆了一口氣，鬆了一口氣。

gept.example_en: He grinned proudly when his teacher praised his creative writing essay.
gept.example_zh: 當老師讚美他富有創意的作文時，他自豪地露齒而笑。

gept.example_en: She nodded in agreement when her father explained the family rules.
gept.example_zh: 當她父親解釋家規時，她點頭表示同意。

gept.example_en: When asked who broke the vase, he just shrugged and stayed silent.
gept.example_zh: 當被問到誰打破花瓶時，他只是聳了聳肩，保持沉默。

gept.example_en: She waved goodbye to her grandparents from the train station platform.
gept.example_zh: 她從火車站月台向祖父母揮手道別。

gept.example_en: My mother always hugs me tightly before I leave on a long trip.
gept.example_zh: 我媽媽總是在我長途旅行出發前緊緊擁抱我。

gept.example_en: He kissed his daughter on the forehead before tucking her into bed.
gept.example_zh: 他在女兒上床睡覺前親吻了她的額頭。

gept.example_en: The caregiver visits my grandmother three times every week to help her.
gept.example_zh: 那位照護者每週探訪我祖母三次來幫助她。

gept.example_en: They hired a nanny to look after their twins while they worked.
gept.example_zh: 他們僱了一位保姆在他們工作時照顧雙胞胎。

gept.example_en: Our regular babysitter is a college student who lives next door.
gept.example_zh: 我們經常請的臨時保姆是一位住在隔壁的大學生。

gept.example_en: Their housekeeper has been working for the family for over twenty years.
gept.example_zh: 他們的管家為這個家庭工作已經超過二十年了。

gept.example_en: My college roommate became one of my closest lifelong friends.
gept.example_zh: 我大學的室友成了我最親密的終生朋友之一。

gept.example_en: Our friendly neighbor often brings us fresh vegetables from her garden.
gept.example_zh: 我們友善的鄰居常常從她的花園帶新鮮蔬菜給我們。

gept.example_en: A kind stranger helped me carry my luggage up the stairs.
gept.example_zh: 一位好心的陌生人幫我把行李搬上樓梯。

gept.example_en: Many foreigners come to study Mandarin at our local language school.
gept.example_zh: 許多外國人來我們當地的語言學校學中文。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞/形容詞) 本地人；當地的
gept.example_en: As a native of this city, I can recommend many wonderful local restaurants.
gept.example_zh: 作為這座城市的本地人，我可以推薦許多很棒的當地餐廳。

gept.example_en: Many immigrants work hard to give their children a better future.
gept.example_zh: 許多移民努力工作，希望讓孩子有更好的未來。

gept.example_en: The country welcomed thousands of refugees fleeing from the civil war.
gept.example_zh: 該國接納了數千名從內戰中逃出的難民。

gept.example_en: Residents of this neighborhood are very concerned about the new construction project.
gept.example_zh: 這個社區的居民對新的建設專案非常擔心。

gept.example_en: Our community comes together every summer for a large outdoor festival.
gept.example_zh: 我們社區每年夏天都會聚在一起舉辦大型戶外節慶。

gept.example_en: Modern society places great pressure on young adults to succeed quickly.
gept.example_zh: 現代社會對年輕人施加了快速成功的巨大壓力。

gept.example_en: Studying abroad helped her understand different cultures and ways of thinking.
gept.example_zh: 出國留學幫助她了解不同的文化和思維方式。

gept.example_en: It is a family tradition to gather for dinner every Sunday evening.
gept.example_zh: 每週日晚上聚餐是我們的家庭傳統。

gept.example_en: It is a local custom to remove shoes before entering someone's home.
gept.example_zh: 進入別人家前脫鞋是當地的習俗。

gept.example_en: Every morning she follows the same ritual of meditation and prayer.
gept.example_zh: 每天早上她都遵循相同的冥想和祈禱儀式。

gept.example_en: The graduation ceremony was attended by hundreds of proud family members.
gept.example_zh: 畢業典禮有數百位自豪的家人參加。

gept.example_en: We held a farewell party for our colleague who is moving overseas.
gept.example_zh: 我們為即將搬到海外的同事舉辦了告別派對。

gept.example_en: Our family reunion takes place every five years at our hometown.
gept.example_zh: 我們的家族團聚每五年在故鄉舉辦一次。

gept.example_en: Her grandfather's funeral was attended by friends from all over the country.
gept.example_zh: 她祖父的葬禮有來自全國各地的朋友參加。

gept.example_en: They celebrated their twentieth wedding anniversary with a trip to Paris.
gept.example_zh: 他們以一趟巴黎之旅慶祝結婚二十週年。

gept.example_en: His grandmother always bakes him a chocolate cake for his birthday.
gept.example_zh: 他祖母總是為他的生日烤巧克力蛋糕。

gept.example_en: We celebrated my brother's promotion at an elegant downtown restaurant.
gept.example_zh: 我們在一家市中心的高雅餐廳慶祝哥哥升職。

gept.example_en: The whole community mourned the loss of their beloved school principal.
gept.example_zh: 整個社區為他們敬愛的校長逝世而哀悼。

gept.example_en: It is healthy to grieve openly after losing a close family member.
gept.example_zh: 在失去親近的家人後，公開地表達悲傷是健康的。

gept.example_en: Her family endured great hardship during the long economic recession.
gept.example_zh: 她的家庭在長期經濟衰退期間經歷了極大的艱難。

gept.example_en: He struggled with depression for years before finally seeking professional help.
gept.example_zh: 他與憂鬱症掙扎多年，才終於尋求專業幫助。

gept.example_en: She has suffered from chronic back pain since her car accident.
gept.example_zh: 自從車禍以來，她一直深受慢性背痛之苦。

gept.example_en: He endured many difficult years to provide his family with stability.
gept.example_zh: 他忍受了許多艱難的歲月，只為了讓家人過上安穩的生活。

gept.example_en: She struggles to cope with the demands of work and parenting.
gept.example_zh: 她努力應對工作和育兒的雙重要求。

gept.example_en: It took her several months to recover emotionally from the difficult breakup.
gept.example_zh: 她花了好幾個月才從艱難的分手中情緒上恢復。

gept.example_en: Time heals most emotional wounds, although the scars sometimes remain.
gept.example_zh: 時間能療癒大多數的情感傷口，雖然疤痕有時會留下。

gept.example_en: It is healthy to express your emotions instead of bottling them up.
gept.example_zh: 表達情緒比壓抑它們要健康得多。

gept.example_en: My mother's mood improves significantly after her morning cup of tea.
gept.example_zh: 我媽媽喝過晨間的茶之後，心情會大幅改善。

gept.example_en: I had a strange feeling that something was wrong at home.
gept.example_zh: 我有種奇怪的感覺，覺得家裡出了什麼事。

gept.example_en: His positive attitude inspires everyone around him to work harder.
gept.example_zh: 他積極的態度激勵周圍每個人更努力工作。

gept.example_en: Her honest character makes her widely respected throughout the company.
gept.example_zh: 她誠實的品格讓她在整個公司廣受尊敬。

gept.example_en: His cheerful personality makes him very popular at the office.
gept.example_zh: 他開朗的個性使他在辦公室裡非常受歡迎。

gept.example_en: Patience is an important trait for anyone who works with young children.
gept.example_zh: 耐心是任何與幼兒一起工作的人重要的特質。

gept.example_en: She has a calm temperament that helps her handle stressful situations.
gept.example_zh: 她平靜的性情幫助她應對壓力大的情況。

gept.example_en: His rude behavior at the meeting surprised everyone on the team.
gept.example_zh: 他在會議上粗魯的行為讓團隊每個人都感到驚訝。

gept.example_en: My grandmother taught me good table manners when I was little.
gept.example_zh: 我祖母在我小時候教我良好的餐桌禮儀。

gept.example_en: Business etiquette varies significantly between Western and Asian cultures.
gept.example_zh: 商業禮儀在西方和亞洲文化之間有顯著差異。

gept.example_en: You should always respect your elders even when you disagree with them.
gept.example_zh: 即使你不同意，也應該永遠尊重長輩。

gept.example_en: I really admire her courage to start over in a foreign country.
gept.example_zh: 我真的很欽佩她在外國重新開始的勇氣。

gept.example_en: My grandparents adore their grandchildren and spoil them with gifts.
gept.example_zh: 我祖父母很疼愛孫子們，會用禮物寵壞他們。

gept.example_en: She despises people who are dishonest about their accomplishments.
gept.example_zh: 她鄙視那些對自己成就不誠實的人。

gept.example_en: My little brother hates eating vegetables of any kind.
gept.example_zh: 我弟弟討厭吃任何一種蔬菜。

gept.example_en: He loathes confrontation and will go to great lengths to avoid it.
gept.example_zh: 他厭惡衝突，會盡一切努力避免它。

gept.example_en: She resented her parents for forcing her to study medicine instead of art.
gept.example_zh: 她怨恨父母強迫她讀醫科而不是藝術。

gept.example_en: I really appreciate everything you have done for our family this year.
gept.example_zh: 我真的很感激你今年為我們家所做的一切。

gept.example_en: She thanked her mentor for the years of patient guidance and support.
gept.example_zh: 她感謝她的導師多年來的耐心指導和支持。

gept.example_en: My host family welcomed me warmly when I arrived in Japan.
gept.example_zh: 當我抵達日本時，寄宿家庭熱情地歡迎了我。

gept.example_en: He greeted his old friend with a hearty handshake and a smile.
gept.example_zh: 他用熱情的握手和微笑問候老朋友。

gept.example_en: Let me introduce you to my younger sister who just arrived from Taipei.
gept.example_zh: 讓我把你介紹給剛從台北來的妹妹。

gept.example_en: We are not very acquainted but I see him at the gym occasionally.
gept.example_zh: 我們不太熟，但我偶爾會在健身房見到他。

gept.example_en: Her face looked familiar but I could not remember her name.
gept.example_zh: 她的臉看起來很眼熟，但我記不起她的名字。

gept.example_en: Everything felt unfamiliar after returning home from twenty years abroad.
gept.example_zh: 在國外住了二十年回到家後，一切都感到陌生。

gept.example_en: My sister and I have always been very close despite the age difference.
gept.example_zh: 儘管有年齡差距，我和姊姊一直非常親密。

gept.example_en: He has become distant from his old friends since starting his new job.
gept.example_zh: 自從開始新工作後，他和老朋友變得疏遠。

gept.example_en: They share an intimate friendship built on years of mutual trust.
gept.example_zh: 他們之間有著建立在多年相互信任上的親密友誼。

gept.example_en: The little boy is very attached to his stuffed bear named Charlie.
gept.example_zh: 那個小男孩非常依戀他那隻名叫查理的玩具熊。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 忠誠的；專心致志的
gept.example_en: She is a devoted mother who puts her children before everything else.
gept.example_zh: 她是一位忠誠的母親，把孩子放在一切之前。

gept.example_en: He has been a faithful husband for thirty wonderful years.
gept.example_zh: 三十年來他一直是個忠實的丈夫。

gept.example_en: She filed for divorce after discovering her husband had been unfaithful.
gept.example_zh: 在發現丈夫不忠後，她提出離婚。

gept.example_en: His heartfelt concern for her well-being made her feel deeply loved.
gept.example_zh: 他對她的健康衷心的關懷讓她感到被深深愛著。

gept.example_en: Her insincere smile told me she did not really enjoy the gift.
gept.example_zh: 她不真誠的微笑告訴我她並不真的喜歡這個禮物。

gept.example_en: His genuine interest in her work made her feel valued.
gept.example_zh: 他對她工作的真誠興趣讓她感到被重視。

gept.example_en: Her fake compliments did not fool anyone at the dinner party.
gept.example_zh: 她虛假的恭維沒有騙過晚宴上的任何人。

gept.example_en: Their friendship turned out to be superficial and ended after college.
gept.example_zh: 他們的友誼結果是膚淺的，大學畢業後就結束了。

gept.example_en: They share a deep emotional connection that few couples ever experience.
gept.example_zh: 他們有著少數夫妻才能體驗到的深刻情感連結。

gept.example_en: He has shallow interests and rarely thinks about deeper philosophical questions.
gept.example_zh: 他的興趣很膚淺，很少思考更深層的哲學問題。

gept.example_en: My cousin has a loud personality and is the life of every party.
gept.example_zh: 我表哥個性很大方，是每場派對的靈魂人物。

gept.example_en: She is quiet but very observant about everything happening around her.
gept.example_zh: 她很安靜，但對周圍發生的一切都很敏銳。

gept.example_en: My aunt is talkative and loves sharing stories about her travels.
gept.example_zh: 我阿姨很健談，喜歡分享她旅行的故事。

gept.example_en: He stayed silent during the argument between his parents.
gept.example_zh: 在父母的爭吵中，他保持沉默。

gept.example_en: My chatty neighbor stops me every morning to discuss the weather.
gept.example_zh: 我愛聊天的鄰居每天早上都攔下我討論天氣。

gept.example_en: My easygoing father rarely gets upset about small inconveniences.
gept.example_zh: 我隨和的父親很少為小麻煩生氣。

gept.example_en: The atmosphere at the family dinner felt tense after the argument.
gept.example_zh: 那場爭吵後，家庭晚餐的氣氛感覺很緊張。

gept.example_en: She felt completely relaxed after spending the weekend with her family.
gept.example_zh: 在與家人共度週末後，她感到完全放鬆。

gept.example_en: He has been stressed lately because of problems at work.
gept.example_zh: 他最近因為工作上的問題而感到很有壓力。

gept.example_en: She felt exhausted after caring for her sick mother all night.
gept.example_zh: 她整夜照顧生病的母親後感到筋疲力盡。

gept.example_en: My energetic grandfather still goes hiking every weekend at age seventy.
gept.example_zh: 我精力充沛的祖父七十歲了仍然每個週末去登山。

gept.example_en: The lively conversation continued well past midnight at our family gathering.
gept.example_zh: 我們家族聚會的熱烈對話持續到午夜過後。

gept.example_en: He found the family meeting incredibly dull and wished he could leave.
gept.example_zh: 他覺得這次家族會議非常沉悶，希望能離開。

gept.example_en: My uncle's stories about his old job are quite boring.
gept.example_zh: 我叔叔關於他舊工作的故事相當無聊。

gept.example_en: She is an interesting person who has lived in many different countries.
gept.example_zh: 她是個有趣的人，曾在許多不同的國家居住過。

gept.example_en: His fascinating life story could be turned into a successful movie.
gept.example_zh: 他迷人的人生故事可以拍成一部成功的電影。

gept.example_en: He has a charming personality that makes everyone feel comfortable.
gept.example_zh: 他迷人的個性讓每個人都感到舒服自在。

gept.example_en: Her warm and attractive smile made him want to learn more.
gept.example_zh: 她溫暖又有吸引力的微笑讓他想了解更多。

gept.example_en: My handsome cousin attracts attention wherever he goes in public.
gept.example_zh: 我英俊的表哥無論在公共場所走到哪都會吸引目光。

gept.example_en: She has a beautiful smile that lights up the entire room.
gept.example_zh: 她有著能照亮整個房間的美麗笑容。

gept.example_en: The bride looked absolutely gorgeous in her white wedding dress.
gept.example_zh: 新娘穿著白色婚紗看起來絕對美麗動人。

gept.example_en: She prefers a plain style and rarely wears makeup or jewelry.
gept.example_zh: 她喜歡樸素的風格，很少化妝或戴珠寶。

gept.example_en: The chubby baby giggled when her uncle made silly faces.
gept.example_zh: 那個圓胖的寶寶在叔叔做鬼臉時咯咯地笑。

gept.example_en: My skinny brother eats huge amounts of food without gaining weight.
gept.example_zh: 我瘦弟弟吃大量食物卻不會變胖。

gept.example_en: My tall cousin plays professional basketball for a local team.
gept.example_zh: 我高個子的表哥為一支當地球隊打職業籃球。

gept.example_en: Despite being short, she excels at competitive gymnastics.
gept.example_zh: 儘管身材矮小，她在競技體操方面表現出色。

gept.example_en: Her muscular brother works out at the gym five times each week.
gept.example_zh: 她肌肉發達的哥哥每週去健身房五次。

gept.example_en: She looked pale and tired after staying up all night studying.
gept.example_zh: 熬夜唸書後，她看起來蒼白又疲倦。

gept.example_en: He returned from his beach vacation tanned and noticeably more relaxed.
gept.example_zh: 他從海邊度假回來，曬得很黑，明顯地更放鬆了。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 皺巴巴的；有皺紋的
gept.example_en: My grandmother's wrinkled face tells the story of her long, eventful life.
gept.example_zh: 我祖母布滿皺紋的臉訴說著她漫長且多事的人生故事。

gept.example_en: My father started going bald in his early thirties like his grandfather.
gept.example_zh: 我父親像他祖父一樣，在三十歲出頭就開始禿頭。

gept.example_en: Her curly red hair makes her easy to spot in any crowd.
gept.example_zh: 她捲曲的紅髮讓她在任何人群中都很容易被認出。

gept.example_en: She has long straight hair that reaches all the way to her waist.
gept.example_zh: 她有著一頭可垂到腰間的長直髮。

gept.example_en: The blonde child resembles her father more than her mother.
gept.example_zh: 那個金髮的孩子比起母親更像父親。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 深褐色頭髮的女子
gept.example_en: The brunette in the photograph is my older sister at age twenty.
gept.example_zh: 照片中那位深褐色頭髮的女子是我姊姊二十歲時的樣子。

gept.example_en: His red-haired daughter inherited her unique hair color from her grandmother.
gept.example_zh: 他紅髮的女兒從祖母那裡繼承了獨特的髮色。

gept.example_en: The bearded man at the counter looks like a famous movie star.
gept.example_zh: 櫃檯邊那個留鬍子的男人看起來像個有名的電影明星。

gept.example_en: He was infatuated with her from the moment they first met.
gept.example_zh: 從他們初次見面那一刻起，他就深深迷戀她。

gept.example_en: He was smitten with his new neighbor from the very first conversation.
gept.example_zh: 從第一次對話開始，他就對新鄰居一見鍾情。

gept.example_en: She was heartbroken when her boyfriend of five years moved overseas.
gept.example_zh: 當交往五年的男友搬到海外時，她心碎不已。

gept.example_en: He felt a deep longing for his childhood home in the mountains.
gept.example_zh: 他對山中童年家園感到深切的渴望。

gept.example_en: After years abroad, she yearned to taste her mother's home cooking.
gept.example_zh: 在國外多年後，她渴望嚐到母親的家常菜。

gept.example_en: Pregnant women often crave specific foods like pickles or chocolate.
gept.example_zh: 懷孕的女性常常渴望特定的食物，如醃黃瓜或巧克力。

gept.example_en: I miss my grandmother's cooking ever since she moved into a nursing home.
gept.example_zh: 自從祖母搬到養老院後，我就一直想念她做的菜。

gept.example_en: My grandparents love to reminisce about their early years of marriage.
gept.example_zh: 我祖父母喜歡回憶他們婚姻初期的日子。

gept.example_en: She tried to recall the name of her childhood best friend.
gept.example_zh: 她試圖回想兒時最好朋友的名字。

gept.example_en: I will always remember my father's advice on the day I graduated.
gept.example_zh: 我永遠會記得父親在我畢業那天給我的建議。

gept.example_en: Don't forget to call your mother on her birthday next Saturday.
gept.example_zh: 別忘了下週六在你母親生日時打電話給她。

gept.example_en: My happiest memory is of summers spent at my grandparents' farm.
gept.example_zh: 我最快樂的回憶是在祖父母農場度過的夏天。

gept.example_en: Looking at old family photos always makes me feel nostalgic.
gept.example_zh: 看著舊家庭照片總是讓我感到懷舊。

gept.example_en: She keeps every letter her late father wrote for sentimental reasons.
gept.example_zh: 出於感傷的理由，她保留著她過世父親寫的每一封信。

gept.example_en: She is very emotional and often cries during sad movies.
gept.example_zh: 她非常情緒化，常常在悲傷的電影中哭泣。

gept.example_en: He is sensitive to criticism and often takes comments too personally.
gept.example_zh: 他對批評很敏感，常常把評論看得太個人化。

gept.example_en: My mother is mentally tough and never complains about her difficult life.
gept.example_zh: 我母親心理堅韌，從不抱怨她艱難的生活。

gept.example_en: He felt weak and helpless after losing his job and his apartment.
gept.example_zh: 在失去工作和公寓後，他感到軟弱無助。

gept.example_en: She had to be strong for her children after her husband's death.
gept.example_zh: 在丈夫去世後，她必須為孩子們堅強。

gept.example_en: It was brave of him to start a new business at sixty.
gept.example_zh: 他在六十歲時開創新事業真是勇敢。

gept.example_en: He felt cowardly for not standing up to defend his younger sister.
gept.example_zh: 他為沒有站出來保護妹妹而感到怯懦。

gept.example_en: The timid puppy hid behind the sofa whenever strangers visited the house.
gept.example_zh: 每當陌生人來訪時，那隻膽怯的小狗就躲在沙發後面。

gept.example_en: She made the bold decision to quit her job and travel the world.
gept.example_zh: 她做出大膽的決定，辭去工作環遊世界。

gept.example_en: The fearless firefighter rushed into the burning building to save the family.
gept.example_zh: 那位無畏的消防員衝進熊熊燃燒的大樓拯救那家人。

gept.example_en: She expressed her sympathy to the family after their tragic loss.
gept.example_zh: 在那家人經歷悲慘的損失後，她表達了同情之意。

gept.example_en: A great counselor must have empathy for clients from all backgrounds.
gept.example_zh: 一位優秀的諮商師必須對來自各種背景的個案都有同理心。

gept.example_en: Her mother's intuition told her something was wrong with her teenage son.
gept.example_zh: 她身為母親的直覺告訴她，她青少年兒子有些不對勁。

gept.example_en: He followed his instinct and avoided the dark alley on his walk home.
gept.example_zh: 他遵循本能，在回家的路上避開了那條黑暗的小巷。

gept.example_en: The two leading actors had wonderful chemistry on screen together.
gept.example_zh: 兩位主角在螢幕上有著絕佳的默契。

gept.example_en: We felt an immediate connection the first time we talked at the party.
gept.example_zh: 我們在派對上第一次聊天時就感受到一種立即的連結。

gept.example_en: A good teacher builds rapport with students through patience and respect.
gept.example_zh: 一位好老師透過耐心與尊重，與學生建立融洽的關係。

gept.example_en: The two families formed an alliance through the marriage of their children.
gept.example_zh: 兩個家庭透過孩子的婚姻形成了聯盟。

gept.example_en: Their partnership lasted twenty years before they decided to go separate ways.
gept.example_zh: 他們的合作關係持續了二十年，才決定各自發展。

gept.example_en: Our acquaintanceship developed into a close friendship over many years.
gept.example_zh: 我們相識的關係多年來發展成親密的友誼。

gept.example_en: The hikers enjoyed the fellowship of fellow travelers along the mountain trail.
gept.example_zh: 登山者在山路上享受著與旅伴的友誼。

gept.example_en: The team showed great camaraderie throughout the long championship season.
gept.example_zh: 球隊在漫長的冠軍賽季中展現出極佳的同志情誼。

gept.example_en: The workers showed solidarity by going on strike together.
gept.example_zh: 工人們以一起罷工的方式展現團結。

gept.example_en: The country needs unity during these challenging economic times.
gept.example_zh: 國家在這段艱困的經濟時期需要團結。

gept.example_en: They live in harmony despite their many cultural differences.
gept.example_zh: 儘管文化差異很大，他們仍和睦相處。

gept.example_en: Discord between the brothers ruined many family holidays over the years.
gept.example_zh: 兄弟間的不和多年來毀了許多家庭假期。

gept.example_en: The family experienced years of strife before finally finding peace together.
gept.example_zh: 那家人經歷了多年的紛爭，才終於一起找到了平靜。

gept.example_en: There has been tension between the cousins since the inheritance dispute.
gept.example_zh: 自從遺產爭議以來，表兄妹之間就一直存在緊張關係。

gept.example_en: A small misunderstanding caused weeks of unnecessary tension between them.
gept.example_zh: 一個小誤會在他們之間造成數週不必要的緊張。

gept.example_en: Most family conflicts begin with simple miscommunication about everyday matters.
gept.example_zh: 大多數家庭衝突都始於日常事務上簡單的溝通不良。

gept.example_en: Let me clarify what I meant before we have another big argument.
gept.example_zh: 在我們再次大吵之前，讓我澄清我的意思。

gept.example_en: She tried to explain her decision to her disappointed parents.
gept.example_zh: 她試圖向失望的父母解釋自己的決定。

gept.example_en: He finally confessed that he had broken his sister's antique vase.
gept.example_zh: 他終於承認自己打破了妹妹的古董花瓶。

gept.example_en: It takes a strong person to admit when they are wrong.
gept.example_zh: 承認自己錯了需要堅強的人。

gept.example_en: He continued to deny stealing the money despite the clear evidence.
gept.example_zh: 儘管有明確的證據，他仍繼續否認偷錢。

gept.example_en: She accused her brother of reading her private diary without permission.
gept.example_zh: 她指控弟弟未經允許閱讀她私人的日記。

gept.example_en: Don't blame me for problems you created with your own decisions.
gept.example_zh: 不要為你自己決定造成的問題責怪我。

gept.example_en: She defended her younger brother when his friends made fun of him.
gept.example_zh: 當朋友取笑她弟弟時，她為他辯護。

gept.example_en: A good parent protects their children from unnecessary emotional harm.
gept.example_zh: 好的父母會保護孩子免於不必要的情感傷害。

gept.example_en: They sheltered the refugee family for several months until they found housing.
gept.example_zh: 他們收留了那個難民家庭數月，直到他們找到住處。

gept.example_en: He rescued his sister from the difficult situation by lending her money.
gept.example_zh: 他借錢給妹妹，幫她解決了困難的處境。

gept.example_en: The lifeguard saved the drowning child at the public swimming pool.
gept.example_zh: 救生員在公共游泳池救起了那個快溺水的孩子。

gept.example_en: She would never intentionally harm anyone in her family.
gept.example_zh: 她絕不會故意傷害家裡的任何人。

gept.example_en: His unkind words hurt her more than he ever realized.
gept.example_zh: 他不友善的話傷她比他自己意識到的還要深。

gept.example_en: The emotional wound from her parents' divorce took years to heal.
gept.example_zh: 她父母離婚造成的情感創傷花了多年才痊癒。

gept.example_en: I hope I did not offend you with my honest opinion about your work.
gept.example_zh: 希望我對你工作的誠實意見沒有冒犯到你。

gept.example_en: He took great offense at his neighbor's careless remark about his garden.
gept.example_zh: 他對鄰居關於他花園的輕率評論感到非常被冒犯。

gept.example_en: She asked for forgiveness after realizing how much pain she had caused.
gept.example_zh: 在意識到自己造成多大的痛苦後，她請求原諒。

gept.example_en: The judge showed mercy to the young man because of his difficult childhood.
gept.example_zh: 法官因為那年輕人艱難的童年而對他展現仁慈。

gept.example_en: I felt pity for the homeless family struggling to find shelter.
gept.example_zh: 我對那個努力尋找住處的無家可歸家庭感到憐憫。

gept.example_en: Tolerance for different opinions is essential in any healthy relationship.
gept.example_zh: 容忍不同的意見在任何健康的關係中都是必要的。

gept.example_en: Self-acceptance is the first step toward building healthy relationships.
gept.example_zh: 自我接納是建立健康人際關係的第一步。

gept.example_en: He found it hard to recover from the rejection by his college sweetheart.
gept.example_zh: 他發現很難從大學戀人的拒絕中恢復。

gept.example_en: She refused to attend the family dinner because of the ongoing argument.
gept.example_zh: 由於持續的爭吵，她拒絕參加家庭晚餐。

gept.example_en: He finally accepted that his parents would never approve of his career choice.
gept.example_zh: 他終於接受父母永遠不會贊同他職業選擇的事實。

gept.example_en: The publisher rejected her manuscript three times before someone agreed to publish.
gept.example_zh: 出版社拒絕了她的手稿三次，才有人同意出版。

gept.example_en: My father does not approve of my decision to study abroad.
gept.example_zh: 我父親不贊成我出國留學的決定。

gept.example_en: Her parents strongly disapproved of her relationship with the older man.
gept.example_zh: 她父母強烈反對她與年長男子的戀情。

gept.example_en: She sought her father's approval before accepting the marriage proposal.
gept.example_zh: 她在接受求婚之前尋求父親的贊同。

gept.example_en: My grandmother endorsed my decision to pursue a career in nursing.
gept.example_zh: 我祖母支持我從事護理事業的決定。

gept.example_en: My parents initially opposed my marriage but later changed their minds.
gept.example_zh: 我父母最初反對我的婚姻，但後來改變了想法。

gept.example_en: His mother objected to him moving to a foreign country alone.
gept.example_zh: 他母親反對他獨自搬到外國去。

gept.example_en: My twin sister and I look identical but have very different personalities.
gept.example_zh: 我和我的雙胞胎姊妹看起來一模一樣，但個性卻非常不同。

gept.example_en: Caring for newborn triplets requires enormous patience and family support.
gept.example_zh: 照顧剛出生的三胞胎需要極大的耐心和家庭支持。

gept.example_en: They have fostered over twenty children in the past fifteen years.
gept.example_zh: 在過去十五年中，他們已寄養了二十多個孩子。

gept.example_en: Her older sister became a surrogate mother after their parents passed away.
gept.example_zh: 父母過世後，她姊姊成為了代理母親的角色。

gept.example_en: My grandmother is the matriarch of our large extended family.
gept.example_zh: 我祖母是我們大家族中的女族長。

gept.example_en: My great-grandfather served as the patriarch of the family for fifty years.
gept.example_zh: 我曾祖父擔任家族男族長長達五十年。

gept.example_en: He researched his family's genealogy and discovered relatives in three countries.
gept.example_zh: 他研究家譜，發現在三個國家都有親戚。

gept.example_en: Her lineage can be traced back to the royal family of England.
gept.example_zh: 她的血統可以追溯到英國皇室。

gept.example_en: He is proud to be part of a long bloodline of doctors.
gept.example_zh: 他自豪能成為長久醫師血脈傳承的一員。

gept.example_en: He invited all of his kin to attend the special anniversary celebration.
gept.example_zh: 他邀請了所有親戚參加特別的週年慶祝活動。

gept.example_en: The two strangers felt an immediate kinship over their shared experiences.
gept.example_zh: 那兩個陌生人因為共同的經歷而立即感到一種親近感。

gept.example_en: Our family clan gathers every five years for a large reunion celebration.
gept.example_zh: 我們家族每五年舉行一次大型團聚慶祝活動。

gept.example_en: The indigenous tribe has preserved its traditional language for many generations.
gept.example_zh: 那個原住民部落已經保留了傳統語言許多代。

gept.example_en: The city's diverse ethnicity is reflected in its many different restaurants.
gept.example_zh: 這座城市多元的種族反映在其眾多不同的餐廳中。

gept.example_en: People of every race should be treated with the same level of respect.
gept.example_zh: 每個種族的人都應該得到相同程度的尊重。

gept.example_en: My friends at school come from over twenty different nationalities.
gept.example_zh: 我學校的朋友來自超過二十個不同的國籍。

gept.example_en: She struggled with her cultural identity after moving abroad as a teenager.
gept.example_zh: 她在青少年時期搬到國外後，與她的文化認同感掙扎。

gept.example_en: He felt a strong sense of belonging in his new community group.
gept.example_zh: 他在新的社區團體中感受到強烈的歸屬感。

gept.example_en: The exclusion she felt at school led to long-lasting confidence issues.
gept.example_zh: 她在學校感受到的排斥導致了長期的自信心問題。

gept.example_en: Our school promotes inclusion of students from all cultural backgrounds.
gept.example_zh: 我們學校提倡包容來自各種文化背景的學生。

gept.example_en: She faced prejudice when she first moved to the small rural town.
gept.example_zh: 她剛搬到那個小型鄉村小鎮時面臨偏見。

gept.example_en: Everyone has some bias, but we should try to recognize and overcome it.
gept.example_zh: 每個人都有一些偏見，但我們應該試著認清並克服。

gept.example_en: It is unfair to judge someone based on a cultural stereotype.
gept.example_zh: 根據文化刻板印象來評斷某人是不公平的。

gept.example_en: Discrimination based on age is illegal in most workplaces today.
gept.example_zh: 在當今大多數的職場上，基於年齡的歧視是違法的。

gept.example_en: The diversity of our team helps us solve problems more creatively.
gept.example_zh: 我們團隊的多元化幫助我們更有創意地解決問題。

gept.example_en: They believe in equality between all family members regardless of age.
gept.example_zh: 他們相信家庭成員之間不論年齡都應該平等。

gept.example_en: Loneliness can be a serious problem for elderly people living alone.
gept.example_zh: 對獨居的老年人來說，孤獨可能是個嚴重的問題。

gept.example_en: She enjoys solitude and often takes long walks alone in the forest.
gept.example_zh: 她享受獨處，常常獨自在森林裡長時間散步。

gept.example_en: Months of isolation during the pandemic affected many people's mental health.
gept.example_zh: 疫情期間數月的隔離影響了許多人的心理健康。

gept.example_en: After her husband died, she found companionship through her local book club.
gept.example_zh: 丈夫過世後，她透過當地的讀書會找到了陪伴。

gept.example_en: He prefers to socialize with small groups rather than at large parties.
gept.example_zh: 他喜歡與小團體社交，而不是參加大型派對。

gept.example_en: She tried to mingle with the other guests at the wedding reception.
gept.example_zh: 她試圖在婚宴上與其他賓客交際。

gept.example_en: Networking helped him find his current job through a former classmate.
gept.example_zh: 建立人脈幫助他透過以前的同學找到目前的工作。

gept.example_en: Please reach out to me if you need any emotional support during this time.
gept.example_zh: 在這段時間如果你需要任何情感支持，請主動聯絡我。

gept.example_en: The two old friends drifted apart after one of them moved abroad.
gept.example_zh: 其中一人搬到國外後，兩個老朋友漸行漸遠。

gept.example_en: We promised to keep in touch after graduating from high school.
gept.example_zh: 我們在高中畢業後承諾要保持聯絡。

gept.example_en: The two sisters had a serious fall-out over their mother's inheritance.
gept.example_zh: 兩姊妹因為母親的遺產鬧得很僵。

gept.example_en: They argued last week but made up the following day.
gept.example_zh: 他們上週吵架，但隔天就和好了。

gept.example_en: She decided to break off their engagement after discovering his many lies.
gept.example_zh: 在發現他許多謊言後，她決定取消婚約。

gept.example_en: After years of traveling, he is ready to settle down and start a family.
gept.example_zh: 在多年旅行後，他準備安定下來並組建家庭。

gept.example_en: It took her a long time to move on after the divorce.
gept.example_zh: 離婚後她花了很長時間才繼續前進。

gept.example_en: The childhood friends grew apart after attending different universities.
gept.example_zh: 這些兒時朋友在進入不同的大學後變得疏遠。

gept.example_en: It took her months to open up about her difficult childhood experiences.
gept.example_zh: 她花了幾個月才敞開心扉談論艱難的童年經歷。

gept.example_en: Don't hold back your true feelings during this important family meeting.
gept.example_zh: 在這次重要的家庭會議中，別保留你真實的感受。

gept.example_en: She promised to stand by her husband through all of life's challenges.
gept.example_zh: 她承諾無論生活有什麼挑戰，都會支持她的丈夫。

gept.example_en: My aunt looked after her elderly mother for the last seven years.
gept.example_zh: 我阿姨在過去七年裡照顧她年邁的母親。

gept.example_en: Older siblings often take care of younger ones in large families.
gept.example_zh: 在大家庭中，年長的兄姊常常照料年幼的弟妹。

gept.example_en: It is not easy to bring up children while working two part-time jobs.
gept.example_zh: 一邊做兩份兼職工作一邊撫養孩子並不容易。

gept.example_en: My cousins grew up in the countryside surrounded by farm animals.
gept.example_zh: 我表兄妹們在鄉村長大，周圍都是農場動物。

gept.example_en: My beloved grandfather passed away peacefully at the age of ninety-two.
gept.example_zh: 我敬愛的祖父在九十二歲時安詳地過世了。

gept.example_en: The newborn slept peacefully in her mother's arms after the long delivery.
gept.example_zh: 剛出生的嬰兒在漫長的分娩後在母親懷裡安靜地睡著。

gept.example_en: My sister is six months pregnant with her second daughter.
gept.example_zh: 我姊姊懷第二個女兒六個月了。

gept.example_en: Parenthood is the most rewarding and challenging journey of my life.
gept.example_zh: 為人父母是我人生中最有回報也最具挑戰的旅程。

gept.example_en: Motherhood completely changed her priorities and view of the world.
gept.example_zh: 母親的身分徹底改變了她的優先順序和世界觀。

gept.example_en: He embraced fatherhood with great enthusiasm after his son was born.
gept.example_zh: 在兒子出生後，他帶著極大的熱情迎接父親身分。

gept.example_en: Being a single parent is challenging but also incredibly rewarding.
gept.example_zh: 當單親家長很具挑戰，但也極具回報感。

gept.example_en: My step-sibling and I became close friends after our parents married.
gept.example_zh: 我和繼手足在父母結婚後成為親密的朋友。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 同父異母或同母異父的兄弟
gept.example_en: His half-brother lives in another country but visits during the summer.
gept.example_zh: 他的同父異母兄弟住在另一個國家，但夏天會來探訪。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 同父異母或同母異父的姊妹
gept.example_en: She met her half-sister for the very first time last week.
gept.example_zh: 她上週第一次見到她同父異母的姊姊。

gept.example_en: My extended family includes around fifty cousins, aunts, and uncles.
gept.example_zh: 我的大家庭包括大約五十位表親、阿姨和叔叔。

gept.example_en: Only immediate family attended the small private wedding ceremony.
gept.example_zh: 只有直系親屬參加了那場小型的私人婚禮。

gept.example_en: The nuclear family of two parents and two children remains common today.
gept.example_zh: 由兩位父母和兩個孩子組成的核心家庭如今仍很常見。

gept.example_en: As a single mother, she worked hard to provide for her three children.
gept.example_zh: 身為單親媽媽，她努力工作以撫養她的三個孩子。

gept.example_en: As a single father, he learned how to braid his daughter's hair.
gept.example_zh: 身為單親爸爸，他學會了如何幫女兒編辮子。

gept.example_en: He treats his stepchild as if he were his own biological son.
gept.example_zh: 他對待繼子就像對待親生兒子一樣。

gept.example_en: My mother-in-law has been very welcoming since I married her son.
gept.example_zh: 自從我嫁給她兒子以來，我婆婆一直非常熱情。

gept.example_en: His daughter-in-law often helps care for his grandchildren on weekends.
gept.example_zh: 他的媳婦經常在週末幫忙照顧他的孫子們。

gept.example_en: My son-in-law is a kind man who treats my daughter wonderfully.
gept.example_zh: 我的女婿是個善良的人，對我女兒很好。

gept.example_en: My sister-in-law and I have become very good friends since the wedding.
gept.example_zh: 自從婚禮以來，我和嫂嫂變成了很好的朋友。

gept.example_en: My brother-in-law works as a dentist in the nearby coastal town.
gept.example_zh: 我姊夫在附近的沿海小鎮當牙醫。

gept.example_en: My father-in-law gave me valuable advice when I started my new business.
gept.example_zh: 當我開始新事業時，岳父給了我寶貴的建議。

gept.example_en: My mother-in-law taught me how to cook several traditional family recipes.
gept.example_zh: 我婆婆教了我幾道傳統的家族食譜。

gept.example_en: My aunt has been the main caretaker for my elderly grandmother.
gept.example_zh: 我阿姨一直是我年邁祖母的主要看護者。

gept.example_en: My older brother has been a role model for me since childhood.
gept.example_zh: 我哥哥從小就是我的模範。

gept.example_en: My grandfather is my hero because of his courage during the war.
gept.example_zh: 我祖父因戰爭期間的勇氣而成為我的英雄。

gept.example_en: My little sister's idol is a famous young singer from Korea.
gept.example_zh: 我妹妹的偶像是一位來自韓國的年輕歌手。

gept.example_en: She played the role of mother and breadwinner after her husband's death.
gept.example_zh: 丈夫去世後，她兼任母親和家庭支柱的角色。

gept.example_en: Taking care of his sick father became his main responsibility.
gept.example_zh: 照顧生病的父親成為他的主要責任。

gept.example_en: He felt a moral obligation to help his cousin pay for college.
gept.example_zh: 他覺得在道義上有義務幫助表弟支付大學費用。

gept.example_en: As the oldest son, it was his duty to lead the family.
gept.example_zh: 作為長子，帶領家庭是他的義務。

gept.example_en: He made a lifelong commitment to his wife on their wedding day.
gept.example_zh: 他在婚禮當天向妻子做出了終生的承諾。

gept.example_en: She kept her promise to visit her grandmother every single Sunday.
gept.example_zh: 她信守承諾，每個星期天都去探望祖母。

gept.example_en: They exchanged heartfelt vows during their outdoor wedding ceremony.
gept.example_zh: 他們在戶外婚禮上交換了真摯的誓言。

gept.example_en: He took an oath to always protect and provide for his family.
gept.example_zh: 他發誓要永遠保護和供養他的家人。

gept.example_en: We store old photo albums and winter clothes in the attic above the bedroom.
gept.example_zh: 我們把舊相簿和冬衣存放在臥室上方的閣樓裡。

gept.example_en: The basement floods every time there is a heavy rainstorm in our area.
gept.example_zh: 每次我們這一帶下大雨時，地下室就會淹水。

gept.example_en: Please leave your wet umbrella in the hallway before entering the living room.
gept.example_zh: 進客廳前請把濕雨傘放在走廊。

gept.example_en: She grows tomatoes and basil in small pots on her sunny balcony.
gept.example_zh: 她在陽光充足的陽台上用小盆栽種番茄和羅勒。

gept.example_en: The pantry is stocked with rice, pasta, and canned vegetables for emergencies.
gept.example_zh: 食品儲藏室裡備有米、義大利麵和罐裝蔬菜以防萬一。

gept.example_en: My grandparents like to sit on the porch and watch the neighbors walk by.
gept.example_zh: 我祖父母喜歡坐在門廊上看鄰居走過。

gept.example_en: The narrow corridor connects the kitchen to the back garden of the house.
gept.example_zh: 這條狹窄的走道連接廚房與屋後的花園。

gept.example_en: The wooden staircase creaks loudly whenever someone walks up to the second floor.
gept.example_zh: 每當有人上二樓時，木製樓梯就會大聲嘎吱作響。

gept.example_en: From the rooftop we can clearly see the city skyline at sunset.
gept.example_zh: 從屋頂上我們能在日落時清楚看到城市的天際線。

gept.example_en: He converted the garage into a small workshop for his woodworking hobby.
gept.example_zh: 他把車庫改裝成一間小工作室來進行木工嗜好。

gept.example_en: Father keeps the lawn mower and garden tools locked inside the wooden shed.
gept.example_zh: 父親把割草機和園藝工具鎖在木製棚屋裡。

gept.example_en: The wine cellar maintains a cool temperature all year round for proper aging.
gept.example_zh: 酒窖全年保持涼爽溫度以利酒類熟成。

gept.example_en: They painted the nursery a soft yellow before the baby was born.
gept.example_zh: 他們在嬰兒出生前把嬰兒房漆成柔和的黃色。

gept.example_en: Dad spends every evening in his study reading historical biographies.
gept.example_zh: 爸爸每晚都在書房裡閱讀歷史傳記。

gept.example_en: The children scattered toys all over the playroom floor again this morning.
gept.example_zh: 孩子們今早又把玩具撒滿遊戲室的地板。

gept.example_en: Our laundry room is small but fits both a washer and a dryer.
gept.example_zh: 我們的洗衣間雖小，但能放下洗衣機和烘衣機。

gept.example_en: The utility room houses the boiler, electric panel, and cleaning supplies.
gept.example_zh: 雜物間裡有鍋爐、電箱和清潔用品。

gept.example_en: Our open dining area connects directly to the kitchen and living room.
gept.example_zh: 我們開放式的用餐區直接連接廚房與客廳。

gept.example_en: We prepared the guest room with fresh sheets before her parents arrived.
gept.example_zh: 她父母到訪前，我們在客房鋪好乾淨的床單。

gept.example_en: The master bedroom features a large window overlooking the quiet backyard.
gept.example_zh: 主臥室有一扇大窗，可俯瞰寧靜的後院。

gept.example_en: She organized her closet by color and donated clothes she no longer wears.
gept.example_zh: 她依顏色整理衣櫃，並把不再穿的衣服捐了出去。

gept.example_en: The antique wardrobe in the corner belonged to my great-grandmother.
gept.example_zh: 角落裡那座古董衣櫥是我曾祖母的。

gept.example_en: His bookshelf is crowded with novels, dictionaries, and travel guides.
gept.example_zh: 他的書架塞滿了小說、字典和旅遊指南。

gept.example_en: They converted the loft into a cozy reading nook with cushions.
gept.example_zh: 他們把閣樓改造成一個放有抱枕的舒適閱讀角落。

gept.example_en: We grilled fish on the patio while the children played in the yard.
gept.example_zh: 我們在露台上烤魚，孩子們則在院子裡玩耍。

gept.example_en: Please park your car in the driveway, not on the public street.
gept.example_zh: 請把車停在私人車道上，不要停在公共道路上。

gept.example_en: Guests removed their shoes in the foyer before walking on the wooden floor.
gept.example_zh: 客人在踏上木地板前先在門廳脫鞋。

gept.example_en: A small vestibule keeps cold air from rushing into the apartment.
gept.example_zh: 一個小前廳能防止冷空氣灌入公寓。

gept.example_en: The glass conservatory stays warm enough to grow lemons through winter.
gept.example_zh: 這座玻璃溫室在冬天仍夠溫暖，能種植檸檬。

gept.example_en: Grandma lives in the annex behind the main house with her cat.
gept.example_zh: 奶奶和她的貓住在主屋後面的附屬建築裡。

gept.example_en: He sharpens his tools every Sunday in his backyard workshop.
gept.example_zh: 他每週日都在後院工坊磨利他的工具。

gept.example_en: She rents a tiny studio in the city near her art school.
gept.example_zh: 她在藝術學校附近租了一間小套房。

gept.example_en: A small bench in the entryway makes putting on shoes much easier.
gept.example_zh: 入口處的小長椅讓穿鞋變得容易許多。

gept.example_en: The mudroom keeps wet boots and muddy coats out of the kitchen.
gept.example_zh: 玄關儲物間可避免濕靴和泥外套被帶進廚房。

gept.example_en: Her walk-in closet is larger than my entire bedroom back home.
gept.example_zh: 她的步入式衣帽間比我家整個臥室還大。

gept.example_en: The powder room near the entrance is only for guests to use.
gept.example_zh: 入口附近的客用洗手間只給訪客使用。

gept.example_en: Each upstairs bedroom has its own en-suite bathroom with a shower.
gept.example_zh: 樓上每間臥室都有自己附淋浴的套房衛浴。

gept.example_en: A reading alcove next to the window catches the afternoon sunlight perfectly.
gept.example_zh: 窗邊的閱讀凹室能完美捕捉午後陽光。

gept.example_en: She paused on the landing to catch her breath before climbing more stairs.
gept.example_zh: 她在樓梯平台稍作停留喘息，再繼續往上爬。

gept.example_en: Voices echo through the stairwell of the old apartment building.
gept.example_zh: 聲音在這棟舊公寓的樓梯間裡迴盪。

gept.example_en: He paused at the threshold before stepping inside the dark room.
gept.example_zh: 他在門檻前停了一下，才走進那個漆黑的房間。

gept.example_en: She stood in the doorway and waved goodbye until the car disappeared.
gept.example_zh: 她站在門口揮手道別，直到車子消失。

gept.example_en: Water stains on the ceiling suggest there is a leak in the roof.
gept.example_zh: 天花板上的水漬顯示屋頂可能漏水。

gept.example_en: The old floorboards squeak whenever anyone walks across the bedroom.
gept.example_zh: 只要有人走過臥室，舊地板就會發出嘎吱聲。

gept.example_en: The package was left on the doorstep by the delivery driver.
gept.example_zh: 包裹被快遞員放在門前台階上。

gept.example_en: Their broken doorbell still chimes randomly in the middle of the night.
gept.example_zh: 他們壞掉的門鈴半夜還會隨機響起。

gept.example_en: The brass doorknob was loose, so I tightened it with a screwdriver.
gept.example_zh: 黃銅門把鬆了，所以我用螺絲起子把它鎖緊。

gept.example_en: Wipe your shoes on the doormat before stepping onto the carpet.
gept.example_zh: 踩到地毯前請先在門墊上擦鞋。

gept.example_en: The squeaky hinge needs a few drops of oil to stop the noise.
gept.example_zh: 這個吱吱作響的鉸鏈需要幾滴油才能止住噪音。

gept.example_en: Make sure the lock on the back door is engaged before bedtime.
gept.example_zh: 睡前確認後門的鎖已上好。

gept.example_en: A firm mattress can help prevent back pain during long nights of sleep.
gept.example_zh: 堅固的床墊有助於在長時間睡眠中預防背痛。

gept.example_en: Our new washer uses far less water than the old one we replaced.
gept.example_zh: 我們新買的洗衣機用水量比換掉的那台少得多。

gept.example_en: The dryer takes about forty minutes to fully dry a load of towels.
gept.example_zh: 烘衣機要約四十分鐘才能把一整批毛巾烘乾。

gept.example_en: I quickly heated up the leftover pasta in the microwave for lunch.
gept.example_zh: 我用微波爐很快把剩下的義大利麵加熱當午餐。

gept.example_en: She filled the electric kettle and waited for the water to boil.
gept.example_zh: 她裝滿電熱水壺，等水煮沸。

gept.example_en: Cooking utensils are kept in the top drawer beside the stove.
gept.example_zh: 烹飪用具放在爐子旁邊的最上層抽屜裡。

gept.example_en: All the clean dishes go in the cupboard above the dishwasher.
gept.example_zh: 所有乾淨的碗盤都放在洗碗機上方的櫥櫃裡。

gept.example_en: I use the blender every morning to make a fruit and yogurt smoothie.
gept.example_zh: 我每天早上用果汁機打水果優格奶昔。

gept.example_en: The pop-up toaster browns four slices of bread at the same time.
gept.example_zh: 這台彈跳式烤麵包機可同時烤四片麵包。

gept.example_en: Stack the plates carefully in the dishwasher before starting the cycle.
gept.example_zh: 啟動洗碗機之前先小心地把盤子疊好。

gept.example_en: The refrigerator hums quietly in the corner of the small kitchen.
gept.example_zh: 冰箱在這個小廚房的角落安靜地嗡嗡作響。

gept.example_en: Frozen berries last several months in the freezer without losing flavor.
gept.example_zh: 冷凍莓果在冷凍庫裡可存放好幾個月而不失風味。

gept.example_en: Preheat the oven to two hundred degrees before placing the chicken inside.
gept.example_zh: 把雞肉放進烤箱前，先預熱到攝氏兩百度。

gept.example_en: Be careful not to leave the gas stove unattended while cooking soup.
gept.example_zh: 煮湯時注意不要讓瓦斯爐沒人看顧。

gept.example_en: Turn on the range hood whenever you fry food with strong-smelling oil.
gept.example_zh: 用味道重的油炸食物時請打開抽油煙機。

gept.example_en: Our rice cooker keeps the rice warm for several hours after cooking.
gept.example_zh: 我們的電鍋能在煮好飯後讓飯保溫好幾個小時。

gept.example_en: She uses a cordless vacuum cleaner to quickly clean the living room carpet.
gept.example_zh: 她用無線吸塵器迅速清理客廳地毯。

gept.example_en: The air conditioner needs servicing because it is making strange clicking sounds.
gept.example_zh: 這台冷氣機需要保養，因為一直發出奇怪的喀喀聲。

gept.example_en: Turn off the heater before leaving the house to save electricity.
gept.example_zh: 出門前關掉暖氣機以節省電費。

gept.example_en: The ceiling fan circulates air and keeps the room comfortable in summer.
gept.example_zh: 吊扇能讓空氣流通，使房間在夏天保持舒適。

gept.example_en: A reading lamp and an alarm clock sit on the wooden nightstand.
gept.example_zh: 木製床頭櫃上放著閱讀燈和鬧鐘。

gept.example_en: Folded shirts are stored in the top drawer of the bedroom dresser.
gept.example_zh: 摺好的襯衫放在臥室五斗櫃的最上層抽屜裡。

gept.example_en: We bought a leather sofa that fits four adults comfortably.
gept.example_zh: 我們買了一張能舒適坐下四個大人的皮沙發。

gept.example_en: Grandpa fell asleep in his favorite armchair watching the evening news.
gept.example_zh: 祖父在他最愛的扶手椅上看晚間新聞時睡著了。

gept.example_en: Magazines and a glass of water rest on the round coffee table.
gept.example_zh: 雜誌和一杯水放在圓形茶几上。

gept.example_en: Our long dining table can seat ten guests for holiday dinners.
gept.example_zh: 我們的長餐桌能在節日晚宴時容納十位客人。

gept.example_en: The twins share a bunk bed, and the older one sleeps on top.
gept.example_zh: 這對雙胞胎共用一張雙層床，年長的睡在上鋪。

gept.example_en: The baby slept peacefully in the crib next to her parents' bed.
gept.example_zh: 寶寶在父母床邊的嬰兒床裡安詳地睡著。

gept.example_en: The tall bookcase is filled with classic novels and history textbooks.
gept.example_zh: 這座高大的書櫃裝滿了古典小說和歷史教科書。

gept.example_en: Medicine should be stored in a locked cabinet away from young children.
gept.example_zh: 藥品應存放在上鎖、遠離幼童的櫥櫃裡。

gept.example_en: I cleared the top shelf to display my new collection of figurines.
gept.example_zh: 我清出最上層的架子，用來陳列我新收藏的公仔。

gept.example_en: A colorful rug brightens up the otherwise plain living room floor.
gept.example_zh: 一張色彩繽紛的地毯為原本單調的客廳地板增添亮色。

gept.example_en: Heavy curtains block out the morning sunlight on weekend mornings.
gept.example_zh: 厚重的窗簾能在週末早晨擋住晨光。

gept.example_en: She adjusted the blinds to let in a little afternoon sunshine.
gept.example_zh: 她調整百葉窗，讓些許午後陽光灑進來。

gept.example_en: A small reading lamp stands on the desk next to the laptop.
gept.example_zh: 桌上筆電旁放著一盞小檯燈。

gept.example_en: An elegant crystal chandelier hangs above the dining room table.
gept.example_zh: 一盞典雅的水晶吊燈懸掛在餐廳桌子上方。

gept.example_en: The ceiling fan rotates slowly, gently moving the warm summer air around.
gept.example_zh: 吊扇緩慢旋轉，輕輕推動著夏日的熱空氣。

gept.example_en: She placed a small space heater under her desk during cold winter mornings.
gept.example_zh: 在寒冷的冬日早晨，她在書桌下放了一台小電暖器。

gept.example_en: The dehumidifier helps prevent mold from forming during the rainy season.
gept.example_zh: 除濕機有助於防止雨季時發霉。

gept.example_en: I run a humidifier at night to keep my throat from drying out.
gept.example_zh: 我晚上開加濕器，避免喉嚨變乾。

gept.example_en: Our old water heater finally broke and needs to be replaced soon.
gept.example_zh: 我們的舊熱水器終於壞了，必須很快更換。

gept.example_en: The new apartment has an electric stove instead of a gas one.
gept.example_zh: 新公寓裝的是電爐而不是瓦斯爐。

gept.example_en: Test the smoke detector once a month to make sure it works properly.
gept.example_zh: 每個月測試一次煙霧偵測器，確保功能正常。

gept.example_en: The doorbell camera recorded the delivery driver dropping off the package.
gept.example_zh: 門鈴攝影機錄下了快遞員放下包裹的畫面。

gept.example_en: Press the button on the intercom to speak with the building manager.
gept.example_zh: 按對講機上的按鈕就能跟大樓管理員通話。

gept.example_en: She borrowed a hairdryer from her sister to dry her hair faster.
gept.example_zh: 她跟姐姐借了吹風機好讓頭髮乾得快一點。

gept.example_en: Be careful with the hot iron; it can burn your fingers in seconds.
gept.example_zh: 小心熱熨斗，幾秒鐘就能燙傷手指。

gept.example_en: She set up the ironing board to press his shirts before work.
gept.example_zh: 她架起燙衣板，準備在他上班前燙好襯衫。

gept.example_en: On sunny days she hangs laundry on the clothesline behind the house.
gept.example_zh: 晴天時她會把洗好的衣物掛在屋後的曬衣繩上。

gept.example_en: Use a wooden hanger so that your suit jacket keeps its shape.
gept.example_zh: 用木製衣架可讓你的西裝外套保持版型。

gept.example_en: Please empty the trash can in the kitchen before it overflows.
gept.example_zh: 請趁廚房垃圾桶滿出來之前先倒掉。

gept.example_en: Plastic bottles and cardboard belong in the blue recycling bin outside.
gept.example_zh: 塑膠瓶和紙板要放在外面的藍色回收桶裡。

gept.example_en: The small waste bin beside my desk is full of paper scraps.
gept.example_zh: 我桌邊的小廢紙簍裡裝滿了紙屑。

gept.example_en: Mom arranged fresh tulips in the tall ceramic vase on the table.
gept.example_zh: 媽媽把新鮮鬱金香插在桌上那只高高的陶瓷花瓶裡。

gept.example_en: A wooden frame holds the wedding photo above the fireplace.
gept.example_zh: 壁爐上方的木製相框裡放著結婚照。

gept.example_en: A rug pad keeps the carpet from sliding on smooth wooden floors.
gept.example_zh: 防滑墊能讓地毯在光滑的木地板上不易滑動。

gept.example_en: I labeled each storage box clearly so I can find things quickly.
gept.example_zh: 我在每個收納盒上清楚貼上標籤，方便快速找到東西。

gept.example_en: Toss your dirty clothes into the laundry basket, not on the floor.
gept.example_zh: 把髒衣服丟進洗衣籃，不要扔在地上。

gept.example_en: Wet dishes sit on the dish rack until they air-dry completely.
gept.example_zh: 濕碗盤放在瀝水架上直到完全風乾。
