gept.example_en: Our school's debate team brought home a tall silver trophy.
gept.example_zh: 我校辯論隊抱回了一座高高的銀色獎杯。

gept.example_en: She won a gold medal in the regional science fair last month.
gept.example_zh: 她上個月在區域科展中贏得金牌。

gept.example_en: Graduating with honors requires consistent excellence over four full years.
gept.example_zh: 以優異成績畢業需要四年持續的優秀表現。

gept.example_en: Her greatest academic achievement was a national mathematics olympiad medal.
gept.example_zh: 她最大的學業成就是國家數學奧林匹亞獎牌。

gept.example_en: You can achieve almost any goal with steady effort and patience.
gept.example_zh: 只要持續努力與耐心，幾乎任何目標都能達成。

gept.example_en: She accomplished a great deal during her four years at university.
gept.example_zh: 她在大學四年完成了許多事。

gept.example_en: His biggest accomplishment was publishing a paper as an undergraduate.
gept.example_zh: 他最大的成就是大學時就發表了一篇論文。

gept.example_en: She has made great progress in her English speaking this semester.
gept.example_zh: 她這學期在英文口說上有很大進步。

gept.example_en: There is clear improvement in his handwriting compared with last year.
gept.example_zh: 和去年相比，他的字跡明顯進步。

gept.example_en: Reading every day will improve your vocabulary and writing skills.
gept.example_zh: 每天閱讀能改善你的詞彙和寫作能力。

gept.example_en: Group projects help students develop teamwork and leadership skills.
gept.example_zh: 小組專題能幫助學生培養團隊合作與領導能力。

gept.example_en: Early childhood development is a popular research area in education.
gept.example_zh: 幼兒發展是教育界熱門的研究領域。

gept.example_en: Personal growth happens both inside and outside the classroom.
gept.example_zh: 個人成長在課堂內外同時發生。

gept.example_en: It is never too late to learn a new skill or hobby.
gept.example_zh: 學習新技能或愛好永遠不嫌晚。

gept.example_en: Lifelong learners stay curious and continue exploring new ideas.
gept.example_zh: 終身學習者保持好奇，持續探索新想法。

gept.example_en: Active learning leads to better understanding than passive listening.
gept.example_zh: 主動學習比被動聽講能帶來更深的理解。

gept.example_en: Schools should educate students about emotional health and well-being.
gept.example_zh: 學校應教育學生關於情緒健康與身心福祉。

gept.example_en: A good education opens many doors throughout your career.
gept.example_zh: 良好的教育能在你的職涯中打開許多大門。

gept.example_en: My grandmother taught me how to write Chinese characters carefully.
gept.example_zh: 我的祖母教我如何仔細寫漢字。

gept.example_en: Teaching young children requires great patience and creativity.
gept.example_zh: 教幼童需要極大的耐心與創意。

gept.example_en: Teachers are trained to handle a wide range of classroom situations.
gept.example_zh: 老師受訓以應對課堂上各種狀況。

gept.example_en: New teachers undergo six weeks of professional training before starting.
gept.example_zh: 新老師在上工前接受六週的專業訓練。

gept.example_en: The coach instructed the team on the new defensive strategy.
gept.example_zh: 教練向隊員指導新的防守策略。

gept.example_en: Read all the instructions carefully before starting the exam.
gept.example_zh: 開始考試前請仔細閱讀所有指示。

gept.example_en: The study guide includes practice questions for each chapter.
gept.example_zh: 這本讀書指南為每章都附有練習題。

gept.example_en: With her professor's guidance, she completed a strong senior thesis.
gept.example_zh: 在教授的指導下，她完成了一篇出色的大學畢業論文。

gept.example_en: My counselor advised me to take a gap year before university.
gept.example_zh: 輔導老師建議我在上大學前先休學一年。

gept.example_en: Her advice about time management really helped me last semester.
gept.example_zh: 她關於時間管理的建議上學期對我幫助很大。

gept.example_en: Each graduate student is paired with a faculty advisor for research.
gept.example_zh: 每位研究生都會配對一位指導教授負責研究。

gept.example_en: The faculty meets once a month to discuss curriculum changes.
gept.example_zh: 全體教職員每月開會一次討論課程變動。

gept.example_en: The biology department recently hired three young scientists.
gept.example_zh: 生物系最近新聘了三位年輕科學家。

gept.example_en: The research institute focuses on artificial intelligence and robotics.
gept.example_zh: 這個研究機構專注於人工智慧與機器人學。

gept.example_en: This university is among the oldest educational institutions in the country.
gept.example_zh: 這所大學是全國最古老的教育機構之一。

gept.example_en: He plans to attend college on the other side of the country.
gept.example_zh: 他打算去國家另一端念大學。

gept.example_en: Our university offers more than two hundred different majors.
gept.example_zh: 我們大學提供兩百多種不同主修。

gept.example_en: She attends a private military academy in the southern province.
gept.example_zh: 她就讀南部一所私立軍校。

gept.example_en: His academic performance has been outstanding since elementary school.
gept.example_zh: 他從小學開始學業表現就很傑出。

gept.example_en: His scholastic record earned him admission to several top universities.
gept.example_zh: 他的學業成績讓他獲得數所頂尖大學的錄取。

gept.example_en: University should challenge students intellectually as well as socially.
gept.example_zh: 大學應在智力與社交兩方面挑戰學生。

gept.example_en: Emotional intelligence is just as important as academic intelligence.
gept.example_zh: 情緒智力與學業智力同樣重要。

gept.example_en: Playing music can improve cognitive skills in young children.
gept.example_zh: 演奏音樂能提升幼童的認知能力。

gept.example_en: Schools should value creativity as much as memorization and testing.
gept.example_zh: 學校應重視創造力，如同重視背誦與測驗。

gept.example_en: Reading novels helps children develop their imagination from an early age.
gept.example_zh: 閱讀小說能幫助孩子從小發展想像力。

gept.example_en: Curiosity is the engine behind every great scientific discovery.
gept.example_zh: 好奇心是每一項偉大科學發現背後的引擎。

gept.example_en: The class explored different career options during a guest speaker session.
gept.example_zh: 在客座講座中，全班探索不同的職涯選項。

gept.example_en: Self-exploration is an important part of the university experience.
gept.example_zh: 自我探索是大學體驗的重要部分。

gept.example_en: The students investigated water quality in their local river.
gept.example_zh: 學生們調查了當地河流的水質。

gept.example_en: His investigation into local birdlife produced a fifty-page report.
gept.example_zh: 他對當地鳥類的調查產出了一份五十頁的報告。

gept.example_en: Please inquire at the registrar's office about scholarship deadlines.
gept.example_zh: 請向註冊組詢問獎學金的申請期限。

gept.example_en: Inquiry-based learning encourages students to ask their own questions.
gept.example_zh: 探究式學習鼓勵學生提出自己的問題。

gept.example_en: Please feel free to ask any question after the presentation.
gept.example_zh: 報告後請放心提出任何問題。

gept.example_en: There isn't always one right answer to a difficult question.
gept.example_zh: 困難的問題不一定只有一個正確答案。

gept.example_en: The teacher's response to his question was clear and helpful.
gept.example_zh: 老師對他問題的回應既清楚又有幫助。

gept.example_en: Students were asked to respond to the article in a short essay.
gept.example_zh: 學生被要求以短文回應這篇文章。

gept.example_en: Please reply to my email about the group project by tomorrow.
gept.example_zh: 請在明天前回覆我關於小組專題的電子郵件。

gept.example_en: Weekly reflection journals help students process their learning experiences.
gept.example_zh: 每週反思日誌幫助學生整理學習經驗。

gept.example_en: She contemplated changing her major to psychology after taking one class.
gept.example_zh: 修了一門課後，她認真考慮把主修改成心理學。

gept.example_en: We pondered the meaning of the poem for nearly an hour.
gept.example_zh: 我們花了將近一小時仔細思考這首詩的意涵。

gept.example_en: Children often wonder why the sky appears blue during the day.
gept.example_zh: 孩子常想知道為什麼白天天空是藍的。

gept.example_en: From the clues, you can deduce who solved the puzzle first.
gept.example_zh: 從線索中你可以推論出誰先解開了謎題。

gept.example_en: Scientists try to induce general laws from specific observations.
gept.example_zh: 科學家試圖從特定觀察中歸納出一般定律。

gept.example_en: Readers must often infer the writer's tone from word choice.
gept.example_zh: 讀者常須從用字推斷作者的語氣。

gept.example_en: Drawing inferences from a text is an important reading skill.
gept.example_zh: 從文章中做推論是重要的閱讀技能。

gept.example_en: Don't make assumptions about students based on their backgrounds.
gept.example_zh: 別根據背景對學生做出假設。

gept.example_en: Let us assume that all students start at the same level.
gept.example_zh: 讓我們假設所有學生起點相同。

gept.example_en: I presume you have already finished the reading for tomorrow.
gept.example_zh: 我猜你已經讀完明天要看的內容了。

gept.example_en: Hearing different perspectives makes a class discussion much richer.
gept.example_zh: 聽到不同觀點能讓課堂討論更加豐富。

gept.example_en: Try to consider the issue from multiple viewpoints before deciding.
gept.example_zh: 做決定前試著從多個觀點思考這個議題。

gept.example_en: The teacher asked each student for their personal opinion on the topic.
gept.example_zh: 老師請每位學生說出對這個主題的個人意見。

gept.example_en: Researchers must conduct their studies according to strict ethical rules.
gept.example_zh: 研究者必須依嚴格的倫理規範進行研究。

gept.example_en: Research ethics requires honesty and protection of all participants.
gept.example_zh: 研究倫理要求誠實並保護所有參與者。

gept.example_en: Copying someone else's work is not ethical or acceptable.
gept.example_zh: 抄襲他人作品既不道德也不能接受。

gept.example_en: Academic integrity is the foundation of any trustworthy university degree.
gept.example_zh: 學術誠信是任何值得信賴大學學位的基礎。

gept.example_en: With consistent effort, anyone can improve in mathematics over time.
gept.example_zh: 持續努力，任何人都能在數學上逐步進步。

gept.example_en: His diligence eventually paid off when he won the national prize.
gept.example_zh: 他的勤奮最終在贏得全國大獎時得到回報。

gept.example_en: Learning a difficult language requires great perseverance and daily practice.
gept.example_zh: 學習一門困難的語言需要極大的毅力與每日練習。

gept.example_en: She persevered through tough courses and eventually graduated with honors.
gept.example_zh: 她堅持讀完艱難的課程，最終以優異成績畢業。

gept.example_en: Teaching young children requires both patience and a sense of humor.
gept.example_zh: 教幼童需要耐心和幽默感。

gept.example_en: Persistence is often more important than raw talent in academic success.
gept.example_zh: 在學業成功上，堅持往往比天賦更重要。

gept.example_en: He is persistent in his efforts to master classical guitar.
gept.example_zh: 他堅持不懈地努力精通古典吉他。

gept.example_en: His determination to succeed inspired everyone in the classroom.
gept.example_zh: 他成功的決心激勵了教室裡的每個人。

gept.example_en: Her ambition is to become a leading marine biologist.
gept.example_zh: 她的抱負是成為頂尖的海洋生物學家。

gept.example_en: Many young students aspire to study at famous foreign universities.
gept.example_zh: 許多年輕學生嚮往就讀知名的外國大學。

gept.example_en: Her aspiration to become a doctor began in elementary school.
gept.example_zh: 她想當醫生的志向從小學就開始了。

gept.example_en: Setting clear goals helps students stay focused throughout the semester.
gept.example_zh: 設定清楚的目標能幫助學生整學期保持專注。

gept.example_en: Each lesson begins with a clear learning objective on the board.
gept.example_zh: 每堂課都從黑板上一個明確的學習目標開始。

gept.example_en: The aim of this course is to improve academic writing skills.
gept.example_zh: 本課程旨在提升學術寫作能力。

gept.example_en: My target is to read fifty English books before graduation.
gept.example_zh: 我的目標是畢業前讀五十本英文書。

gept.example_en: Please submit your final draft through the online learning system.
gept.example_zh: 請透過線上學習系統繳交期末稿。

gept.example_en: Late submissions will lose ten percent of the total grade.
gept.example_zh: 逾期繳交會扣總成績百分之十。

gept.example_en: Please complete the entire questionnaire and check your answers carefully.
gept.example_zh: 請完成整份問卷並仔細檢查答案。

gept.example_en: Completion of the project earned every student a small certificate.
gept.example_zh: 完成這個專案後，每位學生都獲得一張小證書。

gept.example_en: Finish reading the chapter before our class on Monday.
gept.example_zh: 在週一上課前讀完這一章。

gept.example_en: Let's begin today's class with a quick review of yesterday's material.
gept.example_zh: 今天課程從快速複習昨天教材開始。

gept.example_en: Start each study session by setting a clear and small goal.
gept.example_zh: 每次讀書時先設定一個清楚的小目標。

gept.example_en: You should continue practicing daily even after the test is over.
gept.example_zh: 考完試後你也應該繼續每天練習。

gept.example_en: If you persist with daily reading, your skills will steadily improve.
gept.example_zh: 若你堅持每日閱讀，能力會穩步進步。

gept.example_en: It's not enough to survive freshman year; you should thrive in it.
gept.example_zh: 光是熬過大一還不夠，你應該充分發展。

gept.example_en: Students thrive when teachers create a warm and supportive environment.
gept.example_zh: 當老師創造溫暖且支持的環境時，學生會茁壯成長。

gept.example_en: Arts programs flourish at schools that value creative education.
gept.example_zh: 重視創意教育的學校，藝術課程蓬勃發展。

gept.example_en: Universities prosper when they invest in both teaching and research.
gept.example_zh: 大學在教學與研究兩方面都投資時才會繁榮。

gept.example_en: Our school is committed to academic excellence for every student.
gept.example_zh: 我們學校致力於每位學生的卓越學業表現。

gept.example_en: She received an excellent grade on her final history paper.
gept.example_zh: 她的歷史期末報告得到優異的成績。

gept.example_en: His outstanding work earned him a full scholarship to graduate school.
gept.example_zh: 他傑出的表現為他贏得了研究所全額獎學金。

gept.example_en: Her impressive presentation skills made the complex topic easy to follow.
gept.example_zh: 她令人印象深刻的報告技巧讓複雜主題變得易於理解。

gept.example_en: The young scientist has made remarkable contributions to climate research.
gept.example_zh: 這位年輕科學家對氣候研究做出了卓越貢獻。

gept.example_en: The class average on the final exam was eighty-two percent.
gept.example_zh: 期末考全班平均是百分之八十二。

gept.example_en: He was disappointed with his mediocre performance on the final test.
gept.example_zh: 他對自己期末考試的平庸表現感到失望。

gept.example_en: Her poor performance was due to a serious illness during the semester.
gept.example_zh: 她表現不佳是因為學期中生了重病。

gept.example_en: He failed the final exam but plans to retake it next semester.
gept.example_zh: 他期末考不及格，但打算下學期重考。

gept.example_en: Don't be afraid of failure; it is part of every learning journey.
gept.example_zh: 別怕失敗，那是每段學習旅程的一部分。

gept.example_en: You need to score at least sixty percent to pass this course.
gept.example_zh: 你要至少考六十分才能通過這門課。

gept.example_en: To succeed academically you must combine talent with consistent effort.
gept.example_zh: 要在學業上成功，必須將天賦與持續努力結合。

gept.example_en: Her academic success came from steady habits over many years.
gept.example_zh: 她學業上的成功來自於多年穩定的習慣。

gept.example_en: Successful students often plan their week in advance.
gept.example_zh: 成功的學生常會提前規劃一週行程。

gept.example_en: Writing in a second language is a challenge for most students.
gept.example_zh: 以第二語言寫作對多數學生來說都是挑戰。

gept.example_en: This semester's reading list is challenging but very rewarding.
gept.example_zh: 這學期的閱讀清單具挑戰性，但收穫很大。

gept.example_en: Some chapters were so difficult that I had to read them twice.
gept.example_zh: 有些章節難到我必須讀兩遍。

gept.example_en: Many international students face language difficulties in their first year.
gept.example_zh: 許多國際生第一年都遇到語言上的困難。

gept.example_en: The first quiz was easy because the teacher reviewed everything in class.
gept.example_zh: 第一次小考很簡單，因為老師上課時都複習過了。

gept.example_en: Start with simple examples before moving on to harder problems.
gept.example_zh: 從簡單例題開始，再進入較難的題目。

gept.example_en: The instructions for the experiment were too complicated for first-year students.
gept.example_zh: 這個實驗的說明對一年級學生來說太複雜。

gept.example_en: Solving complex problems often requires breaking them into smaller parts.
gept.example_zh: 解決複雜問題常需將其拆成較小部分。

gept.example_en: Each research paper begins with an abstract of about two hundred words.
gept.example_zh: 每篇研究論文以約兩百字的摘要開頭。

gept.example_en: Use concrete examples to make your abstract ideas easier to understand.
gept.example_zh: 用具體例子讓你的抽象想法更容易理解。

gept.example_en: The general education courses cover history, art, and basic science.
gept.example_zh: 通識教育課程涵蓋歷史、藝術與基礎科學。

gept.example_en: Please give a specific example to support your argument.
gept.example_zh: 請提出具體例子來支持你的論點。

gept.example_en: Pay close attention to detail when copying numbers from one table.
gept.example_zh: 從表格抄寫數字時要特別留意細節。

gept.example_en: She did a thorough review of all twelve chapters before the exam.
gept.example_zh: 考試前她徹底複習了所有十二章。

gept.example_en: The textbook offers a comprehensive introduction to modern Chinese history.
gept.example_zh: 這本教科書提供了現代中國史的全面介紹。

gept.example_en: Graduate courses cover topics in much greater depth than undergraduate ones.
gept.example_zh: 研究所課程比大學部更深入地探討主題。

gept.example_en: Liberal arts students receive a broad education in many disciplines.
gept.example_zh: 文理科學生在許多學科上接受廣泛的教育。

gept.example_en: Choosing a narrow research topic helps you finish your thesis on time.
gept.example_zh: 選擇較侷限的研究題目能幫助你準時完成論文。

gept.example_en: Stay focused during long lectures by taking active notes.
gept.example_zh: 在長時間講座中藉由主動做筆記保持專注。

gept.example_en: It's easy to get distracted when studying near a busy window.
gept.example_zh: 在熱鬧的窗邊讀書很容易分心。

gept.example_en: Students remain more engaged when teachers use interactive activities.
gept.example_zh: 當老師使用互動活動時，學生保持較高的投入度。

gept.example_en: Class participation counts for twenty percent of your final grade.
gept.example_zh: 課堂參與占期末成績的百分之二十。

gept.example_en: Each student must participate in at least one group discussion weekly.
gept.example_zh: 每位學生每週至少要參加一場小組討論。

gept.example_en: Every student is expected to contribute ideas during group work.
gept.example_zh: 小組活動中，每位學生都應貢獻想法。

gept.example_en: Her contribution to the project was both creative and original.
gept.example_zh: 她對這個專題的貢獻既有創意又有原創性。

gept.example_en: Students learn faster when they cooperate with their classmates.
gept.example_zh: 學生與同學合作時學得更快。

gept.example_en: The success of the project depended on the cooperation of all members.
gept.example_zh: 專案的成功取決於所有成員的合作。

gept.example_en: Researchers often collaborate across countries on large studies.
gept.example_zh: 研究者常跨國合作進行大型研究。

gept.example_en: International collaboration has produced many important scientific discoveries.
gept.example_zh: 國際合作產生了許多重要的科學發現。

gept.example_en: Teamwork is one of the most important workplace skills students can learn.
gept.example_zh: 團隊合作是學生能學到的最重要職場技能之一。

gept.example_en: The teacher divided the class into groups of four students each.
gept.example_zh: 老師把全班分成每組四人的小組。

gept.example_en: Each individual student receives a personalized feedback report.
gept.example_zh: 每位學生都會收到一份個別化的回饋報告。

gept.example_en: University encourages students to become independent learners and thinkers.
gept.example_zh: 大學鼓勵學生成為獨立的學習者與思考者。

gept.example_en: Modern researchers and teachers are increasingly interdependent across fields.
gept.example_zh: 現代研究者與教師在各領域間日益相互依賴。

gept.example_en: Cultural exchange programs build understanding between students from different countries.
gept.example_zh: 文化交流計畫建立不同國家學生間的理解。

gept.example_en: Global education prepares students for careers in international organizations.
gept.example_zh: 全球教育讓學生準備好在國際組織工作。

gept.example_en: The local museum offers free tours for school groups.
gept.example_zh: 當地博物館為學校團體提供免費導覽。

gept.example_en: International students often live in special university housing.
gept.example_zh: 國際學生通常住在特別的大學宿舍。

gept.example_en: Schools should create inclusive classrooms where every student feels welcome.
gept.example_zh: 學校應營造每位學生都受歡迎的包容教室。

gept.example_en: All students should receive equal opportunities to participate in school programs.
gept.example_zh: 所有學生都應有平等機會參與學校計畫。

gept.example_en: Online libraries give students access to thousands of academic articles.
gept.example_zh: 線上圖書館讓學生能取得數千篇學術文章。

gept.example_en: All campus buildings are now accessible to students with disabilities.
gept.example_zh: 所有校園建築現在都對身障學生無障礙。

gept.example_en: Our school has many learning resources for visual and auditory learners.
gept.example_zh: 我們學校為視覺型與聽覺型學習者提供許多學習資源。

gept.example_en: All course materials are available on the online learning platform.
gept.example_zh: 所有課程教材都可在線上學習平台取得。

gept.example_en: Online courses became extremely popular during the global pandemic.
gept.example_zh: 線上課程在全球疫情期間變得極為普及。

gept.example_en: Some students prefer offline reading without digital distractions.
gept.example_zh: 有些學生偏好離線閱讀，避免數位干擾。

gept.example_en: The virtual classroom lets students attend lectures from anywhere in the world.
gept.example_zh: 虛擬教室讓學生能從世界各地參加講座。

gept.example_en: Remote learning was a new experience for both students and teachers.
gept.example_zh: 遠端學習對師生來說都是新體驗。

gept.example_en: Digital tools have transformed the way we read, write, and study.
gept.example_zh: 數位工具改變了我們閱讀、寫作與學習的方式。

gept.example_en: Our class uses an online platform to share notes and assignments.
gept.example_zh: 我們班用線上平台分享筆記與作業。

gept.example_en: Interactive whiteboards let teachers display videos and live diagrams.
gept.example_zh: 互動白板讓老師能展示影片與即時圖表。

gept.example_en: Multimedia presentations combine text, sound, image, and video together.
gept.example_zh: 多媒體簡報把文字、聲音、影像與影片結合在一起。

gept.example_en: I listen to educational podcasts during my morning commute every day.
gept.example_zh: 我每天早上通勤時都會聽教育類播客。

gept.example_en: The teacher showed a short video about the history of the printing press.
gept.example_zh: 老師播放了一段關於印刷術歷史的短片。

gept.example_en: You can watch the recording of yesterday's lecture on the website.
gept.example_zh: 你可以在網站上看昨天演講的錄影。

gept.example_en: She attended a webinar on time management skills for college students.
gept.example_zh: 她參加了一場關於大學生時間管理技巧的網路研討會。

gept.example_en: She uses flashcards to memorize new vocabulary during her train rides.
gept.example_zh: 她搭火車時用字卡背新單字。

gept.example_en: This language app makes daily practice fun and game-like.
gept.example_zh: 這個語言學習應用程式讓每日練習變得有趣又像遊戲。

gept.example_en: The school provides free statistical software for student research projects.
gept.example_zh: 學校為學生研究專題提供免費的統計軟體。

gept.example_en: Most college students take notes on their laptop during lectures.
gept.example_zh: 多數大學生在演講中用筆電做筆記。

gept.example_en: She reads textbooks on her tablet to save weight in her backpack.
gept.example_zh: 她在平板上讀教科書，為背包減重。

gept.example_en: Please ask your supervisor before making any changes to the report.
gept.example_zh: 在修改報告前請先詢問你的主管。

gept.example_en: Many freelancers prefer working from home instead of an office.
gept.example_zh: 許多自由工作者偏好在家工作，而不是進辦公室。

gept.example_en: A good employer listens to feedback from the staff.
gept.example_zh: 好的雇主會聽取員工的意見回饋。

gept.example_en: The company has over two hundred employees in three countries.
gept.example_zh: 這家公司在三個國家共有兩百多名員工。

gept.example_en: All new trainees must complete a three-week orientation program.
gept.example_zh: 所有新進受訓者都必須完成三週的培訓課程。

gept.example_en: My assistant booked the meeting room and sent out invitations.
gept.example_zh: 我的助理預訂了會議室並發出邀請函。

gept.example_en: We hired a tax specialist to review our annual filings.
gept.example_zh: 我們聘請一位稅務專員審閱年度報表。

gept.example_en: The company brought in a consultant to improve their workflow.
gept.example_zh: 公司請來一位顧問改善工作流程。

gept.example_en: The marketing director announced the launch of a new product.
gept.example_zh: 行銷總監宣布推出新產品。

gept.example_en: Several executives attended the strategy meeting in Tokyo.
gept.example_zh: 幾位高階主管出席了在東京舉行的策略會議。

gept.example_en: The recruiter contacted me about a job opening last week.
gept.example_zh: 招聘人員上週聯絡我談一個職缺。

gept.example_en: Our trainer prepared a clear handout for the workshop.
gept.example_zh: 我們的培訓師為工作坊準備了清楚的講義。

gept.example_en: I always check with my teammates before making decisions.
gept.example_zh: 我做決定前總是會和組員確認。

gept.example_en: A good leader respects every subordinate on the team.
gept.example_zh: 好的領導者尊重團隊中的每一位下屬。

gept.example_en: We hired an outside contractor to fix the office wiring.
gept.example_zh: 我們聘請外部承包商來修理辦公室的線路。

gept.example_en: The clerk at the front desk gave me a visitor pass.
gept.example_zh: 櫃台的職員給了我一張訪客通行證。

gept.example_en: The receptionist greeted us with a warm smile.
gept.example_zh: 接待員用溫暖的微笑迎接我們。

gept.example_en: The janitor cleans every floor of the building each evening.
gept.example_zh: 清潔員每晚會清掃大樓的每一層樓。

gept.example_en: A technician came to repair the broken printer this morning.
gept.example_zh: 今早有位技術員來修理壞掉的印表機。

gept.example_en: The analyst presented quarterly sales data to the board.
gept.example_zh: 分析師向董事會報告了季度銷售數據。

gept.example_en: Our accountant reminded us to keep all the receipts.
gept.example_zh: 我們的會計師提醒我們要保留所有收據。

gept.meaning_zh: (名) 銀行家；銀行從業人員
gept.example_en: The banker explained the loan terms in simple language.
gept.example_zh: 那位銀行從業人員用淺白的語言解釋貸款條件。

gept.example_en: She became a successful entrepreneur before turning thirty.
gept.example_zh: 她在三十歲前成為一位成功的創業者。

gept.example_en: Several investors showed interest in our new startup idea.
gept.example_zh: 幾位投資者對我們新創公司的點子感興趣。

gept.example_en: We always treat each client with care and respect.
gept.example_zh: 我們總是用心並尊重地對待每一位客戶。

gept.example_en: The vendor delivered the office supplies a day early.
gept.example_zh: 廠商提早一天送來了辦公用品。

gept.example_en: Our main supplier is based in Vietnam.
gept.example_zh: 我們的主要供應商位於越南。

gept.example_en: He is looking for a business partner with marketing skills.
gept.example_zh: 他正在尋找一位具有行銷專長的事業夥伴。

gept.example_en: All staff are invited to the year-end party.
gept.example_zh: 全體員工都受邀參加年終派對。

gept.example_en: The film crew worked late into the night.
gept.example_zh: 電影工作人員一直忙到深夜。

gept.example_en: The founder of our company started with only two computers.
gept.example_zh: 我們公司的創辦人只用兩台電腦就起家了。

gept.example_en: The company president gave a speech at the conference.
gept.example_zh: 公司董事長在會議上發表了演說。

gept.example_en: A senior officer signed the contract this afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 今天下午一位資深主管簽署了合約。

gept.example_en: Talk to your insurance agent about updating the policy.
gept.example_zh: 請和你的保險代理人談談更新保單的事。

gept.example_en: A sales representative will visit your office on Monday.
gept.example_zh: 週一會有業務代表拜訪您的辦公室。

gept.example_en: The car dealer offered a generous discount this weekend.
gept.example_zh: 車商這個週末提供了優惠折扣。

gept.example_en: A real estate broker helped us find the right office.
gept.example_zh: 一位房地產仲介幫我們找到合適的辦公室。

gept.example_en: I keep my workspace tidy by filing papers every Friday.
gept.example_zh: 我每週五整理文件，讓工作空間保持整潔。

gept.example_en: We share snacks in the breakroom during lunchtime.
gept.example_zh: 午餐時間我們會在員工休息室分享零食。

gept.example_en: My cubicle is next to the window with great natural light.
gept.example_zh: 我的小隔間在窗邊，自然光線很好。

gept.example_en: Each workstation has two monitors and a docking station.
gept.example_zh: 每個工作站都有兩台螢幕和一個擴充座。

gept.example_en: Visitors must sign in at the lobby before entering.
gept.example_zh: 訪客進入前必須在大廳簽到。

gept.example_en: The boardroom is reserved for senior management meetings.
gept.example_zh: 董事會議室僅供高層會議使用。

gept.example_en: The printer is out of paper again on the third floor.
gept.example_zh: 三樓的印表機又沒紙了。

gept.example_en: Please use the scanner to copy these contracts.
gept.example_zh: 請用掃描器複製這些合約。

gept.example_en: The photocopier broke down right before the big meeting.
gept.example_zh: 影印機在大會議前正好壞掉了。

gept.example_en: Could you pass me the stapler on your desk?
gept.example_zh: 可以把你桌上的訂書機遞給我嗎？

gept.example_en: The inspector carried a clipboard while checking the warehouse.
gept.example_zh: 檢查員拿著書寫板夾巡查倉庫。

gept.example_en: Mark the company holidays on your calendar in advance.
gept.example_zh: 請提前在你的行事曆上標示公司假日。

gept.example_en: A second monitor really helps me work more efficiently.
gept.example_zh: 第二台螢幕真的能幫助我更有效率地工作。

gept.example_en: She bought a quiet keyboard for shared workspaces.
gept.example_zh: 她買了一個靜音鍵盤，適合共用工作空間。

gept.example_en: Our customer service team uses a headset all day.
gept.example_zh: 我們客服團隊整天都戴著耳機麥克風。

gept.example_en: You can store your bag in the locker by the entrance.
gept.example_zh: 你可以把包包放在入口旁的置物櫃。

gept.example_en: Don't forget your badge or you can't enter the building.
gept.example_zh: 別忘了你的識別證，否則無法進入大樓。

gept.example_en: Each new employee receives a lanyard with the company logo.
gept.example_zh: 每位新進員工會領到一條印有公司標誌的識別證掛繩。

gept.example_en: We ordered more office supplies because we were running low.
gept.example_zh: 因為快用完了，我們又訂了更多辦公用品。

gept.example_en: Place the documents in a sealed envelope before mailing.
gept.example_zh: 寄出前請把文件放進密封的信封裡。

gept.example_en: My inbox is full of unread emails from last week.
gept.example_zh: 我的收件匣裡有滿滿上週未讀的電子郵件。

gept.example_en: Check the outbox to make sure the message was sent.
gept.example_zh: 請查看寄件匣以確認訊息已寄出。

gept.meaning_zh: (名) 桌面（電腦）；桌上型電腦
gept.example_en: I keep only important files on my desktop.
gept.example_zh: 我只把重要的檔案放在桌面上。

gept.example_en: The office router needs to be restarted once a week.
gept.example_zh: 辦公室的路由器需要每週重新啟動一次。

gept.example_en: The server will be down for maintenance on Sunday night.
gept.example_zh: 伺服器將在週日晚上進行維護而關閉。

gept.example_en: There is a security guard at the main entrance.
gept.example_zh: 主要入口有一位保全人員。

gept.example_en: The elevator stopped on the fifth floor for maintenance.
gept.example_zh: 電梯在五樓停下進行維修。

gept.example_en: We need to finalize the proposal before Friday afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 我們必須在週五下午前把提案定稿。

gept.example_en: She can multitask better than anyone I know.
gept.example_zh: 她比我認識的任何人都更會同時處理多件事。

gept.example_en: Let's prioritize the urgent tasks first this morning.
gept.example_zh: 今天早上我們先處理優先的緊急事項。

gept.example_en: Please compile the data into one clear report.
gept.example_zh: 請把資料彙整成一份清楚的報告。

gept.example_en: I will update you on the project status by Friday.
gept.example_zh: 我會在週五前向你更新專案進度。

gept.example_en: Always proofread your emails before clicking send.
gept.example_zh: 在按下寄出前一定要校對你的電子郵件。

gept.example_en: Good managers know when to delegate small tasks.
gept.example_zh: 好的主管知道何時該交辦小事務。

gept.example_en: I'll coordinate with the design team about the new layout.
gept.example_zh: 新版面的事我會和設計團隊協調。

gept.example_en: Let me recap what we agreed on before we end.
gept.example_zh: 結束前讓我重述一下我們達成的共識。

gept.example_en: Please confirm your attendance by tomorrow noon.
gept.example_zh: 請於明天中午前確認您是否出席。

gept.example_en: I forgot to attach the document to my email.
gept.example_zh: 我忘了在電子郵件中附上文件。

gept.example_en: Please forward the message to the rest of the team.
gept.example_zh: 請把訊息轉發給團隊其他成員。

gept.example_en: Please notify HR if you change your address.
gept.example_zh: 如果你變更地址，請通知人資部門。

gept.example_en: Please inform the team about the meeting time change.
gept.example_zh: 請告知團隊會議時間變更。

gept.example_en: We had to reschedule the meeting due to a conflict.
gept.example_zh: 由於行程衝突，我們必須重新安排會議。

gept.example_en: I had to cancel the appointment because of a fever.
gept.example_zh: 我因為發燒不得不取消約會。

gept.example_en: We will implement the new policy starting next month.
gept.example_zh: 新政策將從下個月開始實施。

gept.example_en: Only trained staff may operate this machine.
gept.example_zh: 只有受過訓練的員工才能操作這部機器。

gept.example_en: She supervises a small team of designers.
gept.example_zh: 她監督一個小型的設計師團隊。

gept.example_en: The company plans to hire ten engineers this year.
gept.example_zh: 公司計畫今年雇用十名工程師。

gept.example_en: It is never easy to fire a long-time employee.
gept.example_zh: 解雇一位資深員工從來不是件容易的事。

gept.example_en: She decided to resign after seven years with the company.
gept.example_zh: 她在公司任職七年後決定辭職。

gept.example_en: My father plans to retire next spring at age sixty-five.
gept.example_zh: 我父親計畫明年春天六十五歲時退休。

gept.example_en: They promoted Jenny to senior account manager last month.
gept.example_zh: 他們上個月把珍妮升為資深客戶經理。

gept.example_en: After repeated mistakes, the team leader was demoted.
gept.example_zh: 在屢次犯錯後，那位組長被降職了。

gept.example_en: Could you send out the agenda before the meeting tomorrow?
gept.example_zh: 你能在明天會議前把議程寄出嗎？

gept.example_en: Lisa took the minutes for the staff meeting today.
gept.example_zh: 今天的員工會議由麗莎做記錄。

gept.example_en: Please read the memo about the new vacation policy.
gept.example_zh: 請閱讀關於新休假政策的備忘錄。

gept.example_en: We have a short briefing every Monday morning.
gept.example_zh: 我們每週一早上有一個簡短的情況說明。

gept.example_en: I have a call with the supplier at three o'clock.
gept.example_zh: 我三點和供應商有個電話會議。

gept.example_en: We use a video hangout when team members work remotely.
gept.example_zh: 團隊成員遠端工作時我們會用視訊聊天。

gept.example_en: The invitation said the meeting starts at nine sharp.
gept.example_zh: 邀請函上寫會議九點整開始。

gept.example_en: Attendance at the annual review is required for all staff.
gept.example_zh: 全體員工都必須出席年度檢討會。

gept.example_en: Please report any absence to your supervisor right away.
gept.example_zh: 請立即向你的主管回報任何缺席。

gept.example_en: There were twenty participants in today's training session.
gept.example_zh: 今天的培訓課程有二十位參加者。

gept.example_en: Your suggestion about flexible hours was well received.
gept.example_zh: 你關於彈性工時的建議獲得了好評。

gept.example_en: The company released a statement about the merger.
gept.example_zh: 公司發布了關於合併案的聲明。

gept.example_en: There will be an announcement about the new CEO tomorrow.
gept.example_zh: 明天會發布關於新執行長的公告。

gept.example_en: I gave two weeks' notice before leaving my job.
gept.example_zh: 離職前我提前兩週通知公司。

gept.example_en: This is a friendly reminder to submit your timesheet.
gept.example_zh: 這是一個善意的提醒，請繳交你的工時表。

gept.example_en: The main topic of today's meeting is customer service.
gept.example_zh: 今天會議的主要主題是客戶服務。

gept.example_en: Let's discuss the shipping issue at the start of the meeting.
gept.example_zh: 我們在會議一開始就討論運送問題吧。

gept.example_en: This is a serious matter that needs urgent attention.
gept.example_zh: 這是需要緊急處理的嚴重事項。

gept.example_en: The final decision will be made by the director.
gept.example_zh: 最終決定將由主任做出。

gept.example_en: The team reached a consensus after two hours of talks.
gept.example_zh: 經過兩小時的討論後，團隊達成了共識。

gept.example_en: Please voice any concerns during the open discussion.
gept.example_zh: 在公開討論時請表達任何疑慮。

gept.example_en: We will address the budget concerns next week.
gept.example_zh: 我們下週會處理預算的問題。

gept.example_en: Feel free to share your ideas with the whole group.
gept.example_zh: 歡迎你和整個團隊分享你的想法。

gept.example_en: Reaching one million users was a major milestone for us.
gept.example_zh: 達到一百萬使用者對我們來說是重要的里程碑。

gept.example_en: The deliverables are listed in the project plan.
gept.example_zh: 交付項目都列在專案計畫中。

gept.example_en: Adding new features is outside the scope of this project.
gept.example_zh: 新增功能不在本專案的範圍內。

gept.example_en: The project timeline shows tasks from January to June.
gept.example_zh: 專案時間表顯示一月到六月的任務。

gept.example_en: We are now entering the testing phase of development.
gept.example_zh: 我們現在正進入開發的測試階段。

gept.example_en: The plan has three stages and ends in November.
gept.example_zh: 這個計畫有三個階段，到十一月結束。

gept.example_en: Customer safety must be our top priority.
gept.example_zh: 顧客安全必須是我們的首要任務。

gept.example_en: Please send me a cost estimate for the new website.
gept.example_zh: 請寄給我新網站的費用估算。

gept.example_en: We must finish the project within the agreed budget.
gept.example_zh: 我們必須在約定的預算內完成專案。

gept.example_en: The client listed five basic requirements for the app.
gept.example_zh: 客戶列出了應用程式的五項基本需求。

gept.example_en: Read the product specification carefully before testing.
gept.example_zh: 測試前請仔細閱讀產品規格說明。

gept.example_en: This document serves as the blueprint for the new system.
gept.example_zh: 這份文件作為新系統的藍圖。

gept.example_en: Use the checklist to make sure nothing is missed.
gept.example_zh: 用這份檢查表確認沒有遺漏。

gept.example_en: The status of the order is now "in transit".
gept.example_zh: 這筆訂單目前的狀態是「運送中」。

gept.example_en: We must consider every risk before investing.
gept.example_zh: 投資前我們必須考慮每一項風險。

gept.example_en: We had a kickoff meeting on Monday morning.
gept.example_zh: 我們週一早上開了專案啟動會議。

gept.example_en: The product launch is scheduled for next Friday.
gept.example_zh: 產品發行訂於下週五。

gept.example_en: The rollout of the new software took two weeks.
gept.example_zh: 新軟體推出花了兩週時間。

gept.example_en: The backlog has grown since the last sprint.
gept.example_zh: 自上次衝刺以來，待辦清單已經增加。

gept.example_en: Each sprint lasts two weeks in our team.
gept.example_zh: 我們團隊每次衝刺持續兩週。

gept.example_en: We improved the workflow to save two hours daily.
gept.example_zh: 我們改進工作流程，每天節省了兩個小時。

gept.example_en: The hiring process usually takes about three weeks.
gept.example_zh: 招聘流程通常需要三週左右。

gept.example_en: Follow the standard procedure when filing a complaint.
gept.example_zh: 提出投訴時請遵守標準程序。

gept.example_en: We use a simple framework to organize our weekly tasks.
gept.example_zh: 我們用簡單的框架來組織每週的任務。

gept.example_en: Use the company template for all client proposals.
gept.example_zh: 所有客戶提案請使用公司範本。

gept.example_en: She got a promotion after three years of hard work.
gept.example_zh: 經過三年的努力工作後，她獲得了升遷。

gept.example_en: Update your resume before applying for new jobs.
gept.example_zh: 申請新工作前請更新你的履歷。

gept.example_en: Please send your CV and cover letter by email.
gept.example_zh: 請將你的履歷表和求職信以電子郵件寄來。

gept.example_en: He applied for a position in the design department.
gept.example_zh: 他應徵了設計部門的一個職位。

gept.example_en: There are several vacancies in our marketing team.
gept.example_zh: 我們行銷團隊有幾個職缺。

gept.example_en: I heard about an opening at a tech startup.
gept.example_zh: 我聽說一家科技新創公司有職缺。

gept.example_en: The recruitment process can take up to six weeks.
gept.example_zh: 招聘流程可能長達六週。

gept.example_en: We interviewed five candidates for the assistant role.
gept.example_zh: 我們面試了五位助理職位的候選人。

gept.example_en: She received an offer from two companies last week.
gept.example_zh: 她上週收到兩家公司的錄取通知。

gept.example_en: Please read the contract carefully before signing.
gept.example_zh: 簽約前請仔細閱讀合約。

gept.example_en: The starting salary is competitive for this industry.
gept.example_zh: 在這個行業裡這份起薪很有競爭力。

gept.example_en: Hourly wages in this region went up last year.
gept.example_zh: 去年這個地區的時薪上漲了。

gept.example_en: Most employees received a year-end bonus this year.
gept.example_zh: 今年大多數員工都領到了年終獎金。

gept.example_en: Health insurance is one of the best benefits here.
gept.example_zh: 健康保險是這裡最好的福利之一。

gept.example_en: He contributes to his pension fund every month.
gept.example_zh: 他每個月都提撥退休金。

gept.example_en: Sales staff earn a commission on every deal closed.
gept.example_zh: 業務員每完成一筆交易都會賺取佣金。

gept.example_en: Workers get a small transportation allowance each month.
gept.example_zh: 員工每月可領取少額的交通津貼。

gept.example_en: Overtime is paid at one and a half times the regular rate.
gept.example_zh: 加班費以正常時薪的一點五倍計算。

gept.example_en: I received a positive appraisal from my supervisor.
gept.example_zh: 我從主管那裡收到了正面的績效評估。

gept.example_en: The online course covers basic project management skills.
gept.example_zh: 這門線上課程涵蓋基本的專案管理技能。

gept.example_en: Strong communication skills are key in every team.
gept.example_zh: 良好的溝通技能在每個團隊中都很關鍵。

gept.example_en: Her expertise in finance helped the company a lot.
gept.example_zh: 她在財務方面的專業知識對公司幫助很大。

gept.example_en: His background in engineering made him a great fit.
gept.example_zh: 他的工程背景讓他非常適合這個職位。

gept.example_en: Her recommendation helped me get the interview.
gept.example_zh: 她的推薦幫我爭取到了面試機會。

gept.example_en: Designers usually show a portfolio during interviews.
gept.example_zh: 設計師通常會在面試時展示作品集。

gept.example_en: Networking events can lead to unexpected opportunities.
gept.example_zh: 建立人脈的活動可能帶來意想不到的機會。

gept.example_en: She switched careers from teaching to design.
gept.example_zh: 她從教學轉換職業到設計。

gept.example_en: Engineering is a respected profession in many countries.
gept.example_zh: 工程在許多國家是受人尊敬的職業。

gept.example_en: His specialty is solving complex software bugs.
gept.example_zh: 他的專長是解決複雜的軟體錯誤。

gept.example_en: Cutting business expenses helped us save money this year.
gept.example_zh: 削減營業費用幫助我們今年省下了錢。

gept.example_en: My monthly income covers all the basic living costs.
gept.example_zh: 我的月收入足以支付所有的基本生活開銷。

gept.example_en: I put part of my savings into a fixed account.
gept.example_zh: 我把部分存款放進定存帳戶。

gept.example_en: Paying off debt is one of his goals this year.
gept.example_zh: 還清債務是他今年的目標之一。

gept.example_en: She took out a small loan to start her business.
gept.example_zh: 她貸了一筆小額貸款來創業。

gept.example_en: A good credit score helps you get better loan rates.
gept.example_zh: 良好的信用分數有助於獲得較好的貸款利率。

gept.example_en: The savings account earns interest every six months.
gept.example_zh: 這個儲蓄帳戶每六個月會產生利息。

gept.example_en: The bank raised its interest rate last month.
gept.example_zh: 銀行上個月調升了利率。

gept.example_en: Most workers must file their tax forms in April.
gept.example_zh: 大多數受薪者必須在四月申報所得稅。

gept.example_en: There is a small fee for late payments.
gept.example_zh: 逾期付款會收取少額的費用。

gept.example_en: The bank added a service charge to my account.
gept.example_zh: 銀行在我的帳戶加收了一筆服務費。

gept.example_en: Pay your electricity bill before the end of the month.
gept.example_zh: 請在月底前繳付你的電費帳單。

gept.example_en: Please send the invoice to the accounting department.
gept.example_zh: 請把請款單寄到會計部門。

gept.example_en: Your payment was received earlier this morning.
gept.example_zh: 你的付款已在今天稍早收到。

gept.example_en: Payroll is processed on the last working day each month.
gept.example_zh: 薪資每月於最後一個工作日處理。

gept.example_en: I deposit my paycheck into my bank every two weeks.
gept.example_zh: 我每兩週把薪水支票存進銀行。

gept.example_en: The euro is a strong currency in Europe.
gept.example_zh: 歐元在歐洲是一種強勢貨幣。

gept.example_en: Many small shops still prefer cash payments.
gept.example_zh: 許多小店仍然偏好現金付款。

gept.example_en: He wrote a check to pay the landlord.
gept.example_zh: 他開了一張支票支付給房東。

gept.example_en: I keep all my coins in a glass jar at home.
gept.example_zh: 我把所有的硬幣放在家裡的玻璃罐中。

gept.example_en: The total amount on the bill seems too high.
gept.example_zh: 帳單上的總金額看起來太高了。

gept.example_en: Check the balance in your account before transferring.
gept.example_zh: 轉帳前請查看你的帳戶餘額。

gept.example_en: Every transaction is recorded for safety.
gept.example_zh: 每一筆交易都會被記錄以確保安全。

gept.example_en: There is a daily limit on cash withdrawals.
gept.example_zh: 每日現金提款有金額上限。

gept.example_en: I asked for a refund because the shoes did not fit.
gept.example_zh: 因為鞋子不合腳，我要求退款。

gept.example_en: Keep the receipt in case you need to return it.
gept.example_zh: 請保留收據，以防你需要退貨。

gept.example_en: Don't spend too much on things you don't need.
gept.example_zh: 別在你不需要的東西上花太多錢。

gept.example_en: I had to borrow money from my parents this month.
gept.example_zh: 這個月我不得不向父母借錢。

gept.example_en: I can lend you a small amount until payday.
gept.example_zh: 我可以借你一小筆錢直到發薪日。

gept.example_en: He still owes me about fifty dollars from last month.
gept.example_zh: 他上個月還欠我大約五十元。

gept.example_en: Many young people invest in low-cost index funds.
gept.example_zh: 許多年輕人投資低成本的指數型基金。

gept.example_en: She earns a good salary at her new job.
gept.example_zh: 她在新工作賺取不錯的薪水。

gept.example_en: We can't afford a new car this year.
gept.example_zh: 今年我們負擔不起一輛新車。

gept.example_en: Don't waste money on things you'll never use.
gept.example_zh: 別把錢浪費在你永遠用不到的東西上。

gept.example_en: I'll pay for lunch today since you paid yesterday.
gept.example_zh: 今天午餐我來付，因為你昨天付了。

gept.example_en: He repaid the loan within two years.
gept.example_zh: 他在兩年內償還了貸款。

gept.example_en: Many companies donate to local charities each year.
gept.example_zh: 許多公司每年都會捐贈給當地的慈善機構。

gept.example_en: I need to withdraw some cash from the ATM.
gept.example_zh: 我需要從自動提款機提一些現金。

gept.example_en: Let me calculate the total cost before we decide.
gept.example_zh: 我們決定前讓我先算總費用。

gept.example_en: The bank closes at four in the afternoon on weekdays.
gept.example_zh: 這家銀行平日下午四點關門。

gept.example_en: I opened a new savings account last weekend.
gept.example_zh: 我上週末開了一個新的儲蓄帳戶。

gept.example_en: There is an ATM right outside the convenience store.
gept.example_zh: 便利商店外面就有一台自動提款機。

gept.example_en: The teller asked for my ID before processing the withdrawal.
gept.example_zh: 銀行櫃員在處理提款前要求看我的身分證。

gept.example_en: The cashier gave me the receipt and my change.
gept.example_zh: 出納員把收據和找零給了我。

gept.example_en: Please wait at the counter to be served.
gept.example_zh: 請在櫃台等候服務。

gept.example_en: Never share your password with anyone.
gept.example_zh: 千萬不要把密碼告訴任何人。

gept.example_en: Enter your PIN to access your bank card.
gept.example_zh: 輸入個人識別碼以使用你的銀行卡。

gept.example_en: Please put your signature at the bottom of the form.
gept.example_zh: 請在表格底部簽名。

gept.example_en: Most people no longer carry a checkbook with them.
gept.example_zh: 現在大多數人不再隨身帶支票簿了。

gept.example_en: I prefer to use a debit card for daily shopping.
gept.example_zh: 我日常購物偏好使用金融卡。

gept.example_en: He paid the hotel bill with his credit card.
gept.example_zh: 他用信用卡支付了飯店帳單。

gept.example_en: Watch your balance to avoid overdraft fees.
gept.example_zh: 注意你的餘額以免被收取透支費用。

gept.example_en: I want to apply for a credit card from this bank.
gept.example_zh: 我想申請這家銀行的信用卡。

gept.example_en: My credit card was declined at the supermarket.
gept.example_zh: 我的信用卡在超市被拒絕。

gept.example_en: Please authorize the payment by entering your code.
gept.example_zh: 請輸入您的密碼以授權付款。

gept.example_en: We must verify your identity before opening the account.
gept.example_zh: 開戶前我們必須驗證您的身分。

gept.example_en: Sign your name on the dotted line at the bottom.
gept.example_zh: 請在底部的虛線處簽名。

gept.example_en: He's saving up to buy his first car.
gept.example_zh: 他正在存錢買他人生的第一輛車。

gept.example_en: She cashed in the savings bond for an emergency.
gept.example_zh: 她因為急用兌現了那張儲蓄債券。

gept.example_en: The company wrote off the bad debt last quarter.
gept.example_zh: 公司上一季沖銷了那筆壞帳。

gept.example_en: I want to pay off my student loan next year.
gept.example_zh: 我想明年還清我的學生貸款。

gept.example_en: I'll pay you back as soon as I get my salary.
gept.example_zh: 我一拿到薪水就會還你錢。

gept.example_en: Try to set aside some money for emergencies.
gept.example_zh: 請試著撥出一些錢以應急。

gept.example_en: We ran out of cash during the trip.
gept.example_zh: 我們在旅行中現金用完了。

gept.example_en: Our small shop finally broke even after one year.
gept.example_zh: 我們的小店一年後終於收支平衡。

gept.example_en: The purchase of new computers improved our work speed.
gept.example_zh: 新電腦的採購提升了我們的工作速度。

gept.example_en: The summer sale starts next Monday in our store.
gept.example_zh: 我們店裡的夏季特賣下週一開始。

gept.example_en: Students can get a ten percent discount on books.
gept.example_zh: 學生買書可以享有百分之十的折扣。

gept.example_en: That second-hand sofa was a real bargain.
gept.example_zh: 那張二手沙發真的很划算。

gept.example_en: I have a coupon for a free cup of coffee.
gept.example_zh: 我有一張免費咖啡的優惠券。

gept.example_en: She gave me a fifty-dollar gift voucher.
gept.example_zh: 她給了我一張五十元的禮券。

gept.example_en: The price of vegetables went up this month.
gept.example_zh: 這個月蔬菜的價格上漲了。

gept.example_en: The cost of running a business has increased.
gept.example_zh: 經營企業的成本已經增加。

gept.example_en: I got a great deal on a new laptop.
gept.example_zh: 我以划算的價格買到了一台新筆電。

gept.example_en: Use this card to earn cashback on every purchase.
gept.example_zh: 用這張卡每筆消費都能獲得現金回饋。

gept.example_en: Clearance items are usually marked with a yellow tag.
gept.example_zh: 清倉商品通常會貼上黃色標籤。

gept.example_en: The warranty on this phone lasts two years.
gept.example_zh: 這支手機的保固期為兩年。

gept.example_en: We offer a full refund guarantee within seven days.
gept.example_zh: 我們提供七天內全額退款保證。

gept.example_en: The store has a wide range of retail products.
gept.example_zh: 這家店有各種零售商品。

gept.example_en: Buying in wholesale is cheaper than retail.
gept.example_zh: 批發購買比零售便宜。

gept.example_en: All merchandise is sorted neatly on the shelves.
gept.example_zh: 所有商品都整齊地陳列在貨架上。

gept.example_en: Our most popular product is the wireless speaker.
gept.example_zh: 我們最受歡迎的產品是無線喇叭。

gept.example_en: This brand is known for high quality at fair prices.
gept.example_zh: 這個品牌以高品質和合理價格聞名。

gept.example_en: Read the price label carefully before buying.
gept.example_zh: 購買前請仔細閱讀價格標籤。

gept.example_en: Don't remove the tag before trying it on at home.
gept.example_zh: 在家試穿前別把標籤取下。

gept.example_en: The line at the checkout was very long today.
gept.example_zh: 今天結帳處的排隊隊伍很長。

gept.example_en: My shopping cart is already half full.
gept.example_zh: 我的購物車已經半滿了。

gept.example_en: Use a basket if you only need a few items.
gept.example_zh: 如果你只買少數幾樣，請用購物籃。

gept.example_en: Compare prices online before making a big purchase.
gept.example_zh: 大筆消費前請先在網路上比較價格。

gept.example_en: The local economy depends mostly on tourism.
gept.example_zh: 當地經濟主要依賴觀光業。

gept.example_en: Many small shops closed during the recession.
gept.example_zh: 許多小店在經濟衰退期間倒閉了。

gept.example_en: Inflation has made daily groceries more expensive.
gept.example_zh: 通貨膨脹使日常雜貨變得更貴。

gept.example_en: Long-term deflation can also harm an economy.
gept.example_zh: 長期通貨緊縮也會傷害經濟。

gept.example_en: The market for second-hand books is growing online.
gept.example_zh: 二手書市場在網路上不斷成長。

gept.example_en: Demand for electric cars has risen quickly.
gept.example_zh: 電動車的需求迅速增加。

gept.example_en: Trade between the two countries reached a new high.
gept.example_zh: 兩國之間的貿易達到新高。

gept.example_en: Coffee is one of the country's main exports.
gept.example_zh: 咖啡是該國的主要出口商品之一。

gept.example_en: We rely on imports for most electronic parts.
gept.example_zh: 我們大部分電子零件依賴進口。

gept.example_en: The car industry employs thousands of workers here.
gept.example_zh: 汽車產業在這裡雇用了成千上萬名工人。

gept.example_en: The service sector is growing faster than the rest.
gept.example_zh: 服務業比其他行業成長得更快。

gept.example_en: There is tough competition in the smartphone market.
gept.example_zh: 智慧型手機市場的競爭非常激烈。

gept.example_en: Our main competitor lowered its prices last week.
gept.example_zh: 我們的主要競爭對手上週降低了價格。

gept.example_en: The company made a small profit last quarter.
gept.example_zh: 公司上季賺取了少量利潤。

gept.example_en: The store reported a loss for the second year.
gept.example_zh: 那家商店連續第二年出現虧損。

gept.example_en: Annual revenue grew by ten percent this year.
gept.example_zh: 今年年度營收成長了百分之十。

gept.example_en: The growth rate slowed down due to higher prices.
gept.example_zh: 由於物價上漲，成長率放緩。

gept.example_en: GDP measures the total output of a country.
gept.example_zh: 國內生產總值衡量一個國家的總產出。

gept.example_en: Unemployment dropped to a five-year low.
gept.example_zh: 失業率降至五年來的最低點。

gept.example_en: The factory workforce includes over a thousand people.
gept.example_zh: 這座工廠的勞動力包括一千多人。

gept.example_en: Skilled labor is hard to find in this small town.
gept.example_zh: 在這個小鎮很難找到熟練的勞工。

gept.example_en: Production at the factory increased by twenty percent.
gept.example_zh: 工廠的生產量增加了百分之二十。

gept.example_en: Total output exceeded our forecast for this year.
gept.example_zh: 總產出超過了我們今年的預測。

gept.example_en: Smart consumers compare prices before buying.
gept.example_zh: 聰明的消費者在購買前會先比較價格。

gept.example_en: Energy consumption rises every summer in the city.
gept.example_zh: 城市每年夏天的能源消耗都會上升。

gept.example_en: The exchange rate changes daily on global markets.
gept.example_zh: 全球市場上的匯率每天都會變動。

gept.example_en: The inflation rate reached three percent this year.
gept.example_zh: 今年通膨率達到百分之三。

gept.example_en: She bought stocks in a clean energy company.
gept.example_zh: 她買了一家潔淨能源公司的股票。

gept.example_en: The company pays a dividend twice a year.
gept.example_zh: 這家公司一年發放兩次股息。

gept.example_en: He keeps part of his savings in a mutual fund.
gept.example_zh: 他把部分儲蓄放在共同基金裡。

gept.example_en: The chain plans to expand into Southeast Asia.
gept.example_zh: 這家連鎖店計畫擴展到東南亞。

gept.example_en: Telework has become more popular since the pandemic.
gept.example_zh: 自從疫情以來，遠端工作變得更普遍。

gept.example_en: Flextime allows me to start work at any time before ten.
gept.example_zh: 彈性工時讓我可以在十點前的任何時間開始工作。

gept.example_en: Our company moved to a hybrid work model.
gept.example_zh: 我們公司改為混合工作模式。

gept.example_en: She does freelance writing in the evenings.
gept.example_zh: 她晚上做自由接案的寫作工作。

gept.example_en: He works a part-time job to pay for school.
gept.example_zh: 他做一份兼職工作來支付學費。

gept.example_en: After graduation, she found a full-time job quickly.
gept.example_zh: 畢業後她很快找到了全職工作。

gept.example_en: I have the night shift this week at the hospital.
gept.example_zh: 我這週在醫院上夜班。

gept.example_en: She took a sabbatical to travel through Europe.
gept.example_zh: 她請了休假進修去歐洲旅行。

gept.example_en: Most workers get two weeks of vacation each year.
gept.example_zh: 大多數員工每年有兩週的假期。

gept.example_en: The office is closed on national holidays.
gept.example_zh: 公司在國定假日休息。

gept.example_en: The company offers daycare for young children.
gept.example_zh: 公司為年幼的孩子提供日間照護。

gept.example_en: My workload has doubled since the merger.
gept.example_zh: 合併以來我的工作量增加了一倍。

gept.example_en: Take regular breaks to avoid burnout.
gept.example_zh: 定期休息以避免過勞。

gept.example_en: Her morning routine includes coffee and email.
gept.example_zh: 她早上的例行公事是喝咖啡和回信。

gept.example_en: Good work habits lead to long-term success.
gept.example_zh: 良好的工作習慣帶來長期的成功。

gept.example_en: Breaktime is the perfect time to stretch.
gept.example_zh: 休息時間是伸展身體的好時機。

gept.example_en: Use downtime to learn new skills online.
gept.example_zh: 利用空閒時間在線學習新技能。

gept.meaning_zh: (名) 運作時間；正常運轉時間
gept.example_en: Our server has had ninety-nine percent uptime this year.
gept.example_zh: 今年我們伺服器的運作時間達百分之九十九。

gept.example_en: A typical workday here starts at nine.
gept.example_zh: 這裡典型的工作日從九點開始。

gept.example_en: Our workweek runs from Monday to Friday.
gept.example_zh: 我們的工作週從週一到週五。

gept.example_en: Most offices are closed during the weekend.
gept.example_zh: 大多數辦公室在週末不營業。

gept.meaning_zh: (形/副) 下班後的；下班時段
gept.example_en: Please send after-hours emails sparingly.
gept.example_zh: 請盡量少發送下班時段的電子郵件。

gept.example_en: The dress code at our office is business casual.
gept.example_zh: 我們辦公室的服裝規定是商務休閒。

gept.example_en: All store staff wear a blue uniform.
gept.example_zh: 所有店員都穿藍色制服。

gept.example_en: Clear communication can prevent many small issues.
gept.example_zh: 清晰的溝通能避免許多小問題。

gept.example_en: A small disagreement turned into a long discussion.
gept.example_zh: 一點小意見不合變成了長時間的討論。

gept.example_en: A mediator helped both sides reach an agreement.
gept.example_zh: 一位調解者協助雙方達成協議。

gept.example_en: Team morale rose after the project's success.
gept.example_zh: 專案成功後團隊士氣大增。

gept.example_en: Strong leadership keeps a team focused on goals.
gept.example_zh: 強而有力的領導力讓團隊專注於目標。

gept.example_en: He has the authority to approve large purchases.
gept.example_zh: 他有權核准大額採購。

gept.example_en: Accountability builds trust within the organization.
gept.example_zh: 當責能在組織內建立信任。

gept.example_en: She took the initiative to redesign the website.
gept.example_zh: 她主動重新設計了網站。

gept.example_en: His dedication to the project impressed everyone.
gept.example_zh: 他對專案的投入讓大家印象深刻。

gept.example_en: Workplace harassment must always be reported.
gept.example_zh: 職場騷擾必須立即通報。

gept.example_en: Please escalate the issue to your manager if needed.
gept.example_zh: 如有需要請把問題上報給你的主管。

gept.example_en: HR will mediate the conflict between the two staff.
gept.example_zh: 人資部會調解兩位員工之間的衝突。

gept.example_en: We need to negotiate the contract terms again.
gept.example_zh: 我們需要重新協商合約條款。

gept.example_en: Let's resolve this matter before going home.
gept.example_zh: 我們下班前解決這件事吧。

gept.example_en: Try to keep a professional tone in all emails.
gept.example_zh: 所有電子郵件都試著保持專業的語氣。

gept.example_en: Be flexible about meeting times when working across time zones.
gept.example_zh: 跨時區工作時，會議時間要保持彈性。

gept.example_en: An organized desk helps me think more clearly.
gept.example_zh: 整潔有條理的桌面幫助我思考更清晰。

gept.example_en: We made a strategic decision to enter the Asian market.
gept.example_zh: 我們做了進入亞洲市場的策略性決策。

gept.example_en: Our prices are competitive with major brands.
gept.example_zh: 我們的價格與主要品牌相比具有競爭力。

gept.example_en: The new product line became profitable within six months.
gept.example_zh: 新的產品線在六個月內就開始有利潤。

gept.example_en: We aim to make quality products affordable for everyone.
gept.example_zh: 我們的目標是讓優質產品人人都能負擔得起。

gept.example_en: Office space in the city center is very expensive.
gept.example_zh: 市中心的辦公空間非常昂貴。

gept.example_en: This brand is cheap but the quality is decent.
gept.example_zh: 這個品牌便宜但品質還不錯。

gept.example_en: This is an urgent task that needs attention today.
gept.example_zh: 這是今天就需要處理的緊急任務。

gept.example_en: We hired a temporary worker for the busy season.
gept.example_zh: 我們在旺季雇了一位臨時工。

gept.example_en: After six months, she got a permanent contract.
gept.example_zh: 六個月後，她拿到了正式的長期合約。

gept.example_en: This job is entry-level and includes good training.
gept.example_zh: 這份工作是入門級的，包含良好的培訓。

gept.example_en: He is looking for a mid-level marketing position.
gept.example_zh: 他正在找一份中階行銷職位。

gept.example_en: Can you handle this customer complaint, please?
gept.example_zh: 你可以處理一下這個客訴嗎？

gept.example_en: We need to reduce costs without lowering quality.
gept.example_zh: 我們需要在不降低品質的情況下減少成本。

gept.example_en: Our sales increased by twenty percent last year.
gept.example_zh: 我們去年銷售增加了百分之二十。

gept.example_en: Customer complaints decreased after the change.
gept.example_zh: 改變之後客訴減少了。

gept.example_en: The new system reduced paperwork by half.
gept.example_zh: 新系統把文書工作減少了一半。

gept.example_en: Old contracts are stored in the gray file cabinet.
gept.example_zh: 舊合約存放在灰色的檔案櫃裡。

gept.example_en: I leave sticky notes on my monitor as reminders.
gept.example_zh: 我把便利貼貼在螢幕上作為提醒。

gept.example_en: Use a paperclip to keep the pages together.
gept.example_zh: 用迴紋針把這幾頁夾在一起。

gept.example_en: A small desk lamp makes evening work much easier.
gept.example_zh: 一盞小檯燈讓晚上工作輕鬆許多。

gept.example_en: Filing the documents took most of the afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 整個下午幾乎都在歸檔文件。

gept.example_en: We use hot desks since not everyone comes in daily.
gept.example_zh: 我們使用共享辦公桌，因為不是每個人每天進辦公室。

gept.example_en: Safety in the workplace is everyone's responsibility.
gept.example_zh: 工作場所的安全是每個人的責任。

gept.example_en: The first agenda item is the quarterly results.
gept.example_zh: 第一個議程項目是季度結果。

gept.example_en: Each action item has a clear owner and deadline.
gept.example_zh: 每個待辦事項都有明確的負責人和期限。

gept.example_en: Send a follow-up email to the client by Friday.
gept.example_zh: 週五前寄一封後續追蹤的電子郵件給客戶。

gept.example_en: We need a manager's sign-off before shipping.
gept.example_zh: 出貨前我們需要經理的簽核。

gept.example_en: The kickoff meeting set clear expectations for all.
gept.example_zh: 啟動會議為所有人設立了明確的期待。

gept.example_en: Our team has a short stand-up every morning.
gept.example_zh: 我們團隊每天早上有個簡短的站立會議。

gept.example_en: After the event we held a quick debrief.
gept.example_zh: 活動結束後我們做了簡短的事後檢討。

gept.example_en: Scope creep is a common reason for missed deadlines.
gept.example_zh: 範圍蔓延是錯過期限的常見原因。

gept.example_en: Let's touch base on Friday to review progress.
gept.example_zh: 週五我們聯繫一下檢討進度吧。

gept.example_en: Please loop me in on the design decisions.
gept.example_zh: 請把設計決策的事也通知我一聲。

gept.example_en: We'll circle back to this topic next week.
gept.example_zh: 我們下週再回頭討論這個話題。

gept.example_en: Let's wrap up the meeting in five minutes.
gept.example_zh: 我們在五分鐘內結束會議吧。

gept.example_en: Three remote colleagues will dial in to the call.
gept.example_zh: 會有三位遠端同事撥入這場電話會議。

gept.example_en: She stepped up when our team leader was sick.
gept.example_zh: 我們組長生病時她挺身而出。

gept.example_en: Can you take over this account while I'm on leave?
gept.example_zh: 我請假期間你可以接手這位客戶嗎？

gept.example_en: Please hand over the project files before leaving.
gept.example_zh: 離開前請移交這個專案的檔案。

gept.example_en: Sign up for the safety training by next Monday.
gept.example_zh: 請於下週一前報名安全培訓。

gept.example_en: Don't forget to clock in when you arrive.
gept.example_zh: 上班抵達時別忘了打卡。

gept.example_en: Most workers clock out at six in the evening.
gept.example_zh: 大多數員工晚上六點下班打卡。

gept.example_en: They called off the meeting due to bad weather.
gept.example_zh: 他們因為天氣不好而取消了會議。

gept.example_en: The price tag was hidden under the box.
gept.example_zh: 價格標籤藏在盒子下面。

gept.example_en: She saves spare change in a small piggy bank.
gept.example_zh: 她把零錢存在一個小撲滿裡。

gept.example_en: Customers complained about the recent price hike.
gept.example_zh: 客戶對最近的漲價有所抱怨。

gept.example_en: The firm had to downsize its workforce last year.
gept.example_zh: 公司去年不得不縮減人力規模。

gept.example_en: Many companies outsource customer service abroad.
gept.example_zh: 許多公司把客服委外到國外。

gept.example_en: The city subsidizes public transport for seniors.
gept.example_zh: 市府補助年長者搭乘大眾運輸。

gept.example_en: Low staff turnover means the workplace is healthy.
gept.example_zh: 員工流動率低意味著職場氛圍健康。

gept.example_en: The factory announced a small layoff last week.
gept.example_zh: 工廠上週宣布小規模裁員。

gept.example_en: I always keep my passport in a safe place when traveling abroad.
gept.example_zh: 我出國旅行時總是把護照放在安全的地方。

gept.example_en: She applied for a tourist visa to visit Japan next month.
gept.example_zh: 她申請了觀光簽證下個月去日本。

gept.example_en: Please show your boarding pass at the gate before boarding the plane.
gept.example_zh: 登機前請在登機門出示您的登機證。

gept.example_en: You need valid identification to check in at the hotel.
gept.example_zh: 在飯店辦理入住手續需要有效的身份證明。

gept.example_en: We had to declare our purchases at customs upon arrival.
gept.example_zh: 抵達時我們必須在海關申報購買的物品。

gept.example_en: The immigration officer stamped my passport quickly.
gept.example_zh: 移民官員迅速地在我護照上蓋了章。

gept.example_en: Fill out the customs declaration form before landing.
gept.example_zh: 降落前請填寫海關申報表。

gept.example_en: If you lose your passport, contact your country's embassy immediately.
gept.example_zh: 如果你遺失護照，請立即聯絡你國家的大使館。

gept.example_en: The consulate helped the stranded tourists return home.
gept.example_zh: 領事館協助受困的遊客返回家鄉。

gept.example_en: You need a permit to enter the national park during peak season.
gept.example_zh: 旺季進入國家公園需要許可證。

gept.example_en: Keep all your travel documents in one secure folder.
gept.example_zh: 把所有旅行文件放在一個安全的文件夾裡。

gept.example_en: Please collect your baggage at carousel three after the flight.
gept.example_zh: 下飛機後請到三號行李轉盤領取行李。

gept.example_en: She packed her luggage carefully the night before the trip.
gept.example_zh: 她在旅行前一晚仔細打包行李。

gept.example_en: My suitcase was too heavy to lift onto the train.
gept.example_zh: 我的手提箱太重，搬不上火車。

gept.example_en: He carried only a small backpack on his weekend hike.
gept.example_zh: 週末健行時他只背了一個小背包。

gept.example_en: Liquids in your carry-on must be under 100 milliliters.
gept.example_zh: 隨身行李中的液體必須少於 100 毫升。

gept.example_en: My suitcase was overweight, so I had to pay extra fees.
gept.example_zh: 我的手提箱超重了，所以我必須付額外費用。

gept.example_en: The subway is the fastest way to get to downtown.
gept.example_zh: 搭地鐵是到市中心最快的方式。

gept.example_en: We took a ferry across the bay to reach the island.
gept.example_zh: 我們搭渡輪過海灣到達那座島。

gept.example_en: The plane sped down the runway and lifted into the sky.
gept.example_zh: 飛機在跑道上加速並升上天空。

gept.example_en: International flights depart from terminal two only.
gept.example_zh: 國際航班只從二號航廈出發。

gept.example_en: We had a four-hour layover in Tokyo before our connecting flight.
gept.example_zh: 我們在東京中途停留四小時等轉機。

gept.example_en: Check the departure board for any last-minute gate changes.
gept.example_zh: 查看出發看板以了解最後一刻的登機門變更。

gept.example_en: Family members waited eagerly at the arrival hall.
gept.example_zh: 家人在入境大廳焦急地等候。

gept.example_en: I prefer an aisle seat so I can stretch my legs.
gept.example_zh: 我比較喜歡走道座位，這樣可以伸展腿。

gept.example_en: The flight attendant walked through the cabin checking seat belts.
gept.example_zh: 空服員走過客艙檢查安全帶。

gept.example_en: Only authorized crew may enter the cockpit during the flight.
gept.example_zh: 飛行期間只有授權人員可進入駕駛艙。

gept.example_en: We hit some turbulence over the mountains, but it didn't last long.
gept.example_zh: 我們在山區遇到一些亂流，但沒持續多久。

gept.example_en: The plane is cruising at an altitude of thirty thousand feet.
gept.example_zh: 飛機正以三萬英尺的高度巡航。

gept.example_en: First-class carriages are at the front of the train.
gept.example_zh: 頭等車廂在火車的最前面。

gept.example_en: Morning commuters fill the trains during rush hour.
gept.example_zh: 上班時間早班通勤者塞滿了火車。

gept.example_en: Traffic on the highway was slow due to road work.
gept.example_zh: 由於道路施工，高速公路上交通緩慢。

gept.example_en: We took the freeway to save time on our long drive.
gept.example_zh: 為了在長途駕駛中節省時間，我們走了高速公路。

gept.example_en: Pedestrians have the right of way at marked crossings.
gept.example_zh: 在標示的人行道上行人有優先通行權。

gept.example_en: Cyclists must wear helmets for safety on city roads.
gept.example_zh: 為了安全，在城市道路上騎自行車的人必須戴安全帽。

gept.example_en: Many students ride scooters to school in Taiwan.
gept.example_zh: 台灣許多學生騎機車上學。

gept.example_en: We hailed a taxi to take us back to the hotel.
gept.example_zh: 我們招了輛計程車載我們回飯店。

gept.example_en: Rideshare apps are popular among young travelers.
gept.example_zh: 共乘應用程式在年輕旅客間很受歡迎。

gept.example_en: A free shuttle runs between the airport and the hotel.
gept.example_zh: 機場和飯店之間有免費接駁車。

gept.example_en: The bullet train can reach speeds over three hundred kilometers per hour.
gept.example_zh: 高鐵時速可超過三百公里。

gept.example_en: The old steam locomotive is now displayed in the museum.
gept.example_zh: 這台老舊的蒸汽火車頭現在展示在博物館裡。

gept.example_en: The conductor checked everyone's tickets after the train left.
gept.example_zh: 火車開出後列車長檢查了大家的車票。

gept.example_en: The bus fare went up by ten percent last month.
gept.example_zh: 上個月公車車費漲了百分之十。

gept.example_en: We paid the toll before driving across the bridge.
gept.example_zh: 我們在開車過橋前付了通行費。

gept.example_en: Backpackers often stay in hostels to save money on lodging.
gept.example_zh: 背包客常住青年旅館以節省住宿費。

gept.example_en: We stopped at a roadside motel for the night.
gept.example_zh: 我們在路邊的汽車旅館停下過夜。

gept.example_en: The price includes breakfast and lodging for two nights.
gept.example_zh: 價格包含兩晚的早餐和住宿。

gept.example_en: Check-in time at most hotels is three in the afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 大多數飯店的入住時間是下午三點。

gept.example_en: The resort offers many amenities including a pool and spa.
gept.example_zh: 這家度假村提供許多便利設施，包括泳池和水療。

gept.example_en: We upgraded to a suite for our anniversary trip.
gept.example_zh: 我們的週年旅行升等到套房。

gept.example_en: The concierge helped us book tickets for the show.
gept.example_zh: 禮賓員幫我們訂了表演的票。

gept.example_en: Housekeeping changes the towels every morning.
gept.example_zh: 客房清潔服務每天早上更換毛巾。

gept.example_en: The airline upgraded us to business class for free.
gept.example_zh: 航空公司免費把我們升級到商務艙。

gept.example_en: We stayed at a charming country inn in the village.
gept.example_zh: 我們住在村裡一家迷人的鄉村小旅館。

gept.example_en: The beach resort offers all-inclusive packages.
gept.example_zh: 這家海灘度假村提供全包式套裝行程。

gept.example_en: They rented a villa with a private swimming pool.
gept.example_zh: 他們租了一棟有私人游泳池的別墅。

gept.example_en: The campground is fully booked for the holiday weekend.
gept.example_zh: 這個假日週末露營地已被全部訂滿。

gept.example_en: We pitched our tent near the river before sunset.
gept.example_zh: 我們在日落前在河邊搭起了帳篷。

gept.example_en: The monument was built to honor the country's heroes.
gept.example_zh: 這座紀念碑是為了紀念國家的英雄而建。

gept.example_en: The clock tower is a famous landmark in this city.
gept.example_zh: 這座鐘樓是這個城市著名的地標。

gept.example_en: The waterfall is the main attraction of the national park.
gept.example_zh: 這座瀑布是國家公園的主要景點。

gept.example_en: We took an excursion to the nearby vineyard.
gept.example_zh: 我們去附近的葡萄園做了一趟短途旅行。

gept.example_en: The team prepared for a long expedition to the Arctic.
gept.example_zh: 這個團隊為去北極的長期探險做準備。

gept.example_en: Pick up a brochure to learn about the tour options.
gept.example_zh: 拿一本小冊子了解旅行團選擇。

gept.example_en: The souvenir shop sells handcrafted items from the region.
gept.example_zh: 這家紀念品店販售當地手工製作的物品。

gept.example_en: She sent a postcard from every city she visited.
gept.example_zh: 她每去一個城市都寄一張明信片。

gept.example_en: This bridge is a popular photo spot at sunset.
gept.example_zh: 這座橋是日落時受歡迎的拍照景點。

gept.example_en: The mountaintop offers a stunning panorama of the valley.
gept.example_zh: 山頂可俯瞰山谷壯麗的全景。

gept.example_en: The scenery along the coast was simply breathtaking.
gept.example_zh: 沿海的風景簡直令人嘆為觀止。

gept.example_en: The museum houses ancient artifacts from many cultures.
gept.example_zh: 這座博物館收藏來自許多文化的古文物。

gept.example_en: The art gallery features paintings by local artists.
gept.example_zh: 這家美術館展出當地藝術家的畫作。

gept.example_en: Visitors must remove their shoes before entering the temple.
gept.example_zh: 遊客進入寺廟前必須脫鞋。

gept.example_en: Pilgrims travel long distances to visit the holy shrine.
gept.example_zh: 朝聖者長途跋涉到神聖的聖殿參拜。

gept.example_en: The cathedral's stained glass windows are over five hundred years old.
gept.example_zh: 這座大教堂的彩繪玻璃窗已有五百多年歷史。

gept.example_en: Tourists love to explore the medieval castle on the hilltop.
gept.example_zh: 遊客喜歡參觀山頂上的中世紀城堡。

gept.example_en: Archaeologists discovered ancient ruins beneath the modern city.
gept.example_zh: 考古學家在現代城市底下發現古代遺跡。

gept.example_en: Her passion for archaeology led her to many ancient sites.
gept.example_zh: 她對考古學的熱情帶她去了許多古蹟。

gept.example_en: I bought a guidebook to plan my trip to Italy.
gept.example_zh: 我買了一本旅遊指南來規劃義大利之旅。

gept.example_en: Backpackers from around the world meet at this hostel.
gept.example_zh: 來自世界各地的背包客在這家青年旅館相遇。

gept.example_en: Digital nomads work remotely while traveling the world.
gept.example_zh: 數位遊牧民族邊環遊世界邊遠端工作。

gept.example_en: We chose the scenic route to enjoy the mountain views.
gept.example_zh: 我們選擇了風景路線來欣賞山景。

gept.example_en: Construction forced us to take a long detour home.
gept.example_zh: 施工讓我們回家時得繞遠路。

gept.example_en: She knows a shortcut that avoids the heavy traffic.
gept.example_zh: 她知道一條可避開塞車的捷徑。

gept.example_en: I unfolded the map to find the nearest restaurant.
gept.example_zh: 我攤開地圖尋找最近的餐廳。

gept.example_en: Modern cars come with built-in navigation systems.
gept.example_zh: 現代汽車內建導航系統。

gept.example_en: Could you give me directions to the train station?
gept.example_zh: 你能告訴我去火車站的方向嗎？

gept.example_en: Mark your destination point on the digital map.
gept.example_zh: 在電子地圖上標記你的目的地點。

gept.example_en: The signpost pointed to three different villages.
gept.example_zh: 這個路標指向三個不同的村莊。

gept.example_en: Turn right at the crossroads to reach the lake.
gept.example_zh: 在十字路口右轉就能到湖邊。

gept.example_en: All vehicles must stop at the border checkpoint.
gept.example_zh: 所有車輛必須在邊境檢查站停下。

gept.example_en: Heavy traffic delayed our arrival at the meeting.
gept.example_zh: 嚴重的交通堵塞延誤了我們開會的抵達時間。

gept.example_en: Traffic congestion is worse during the morning rush.
gept.example_zh: 早上尖峰時段交通擁塞更嚴重。

gept.example_en: Take the third exit at the roundabout.
gept.example_zh: 在圓環走第三個出口。

gept.example_en: Stay in the right lane to take the next exit.
gept.example_zh: 保持在右車道才能下一個交流道。

gept.example_en: The overpass connects two parts of the city.
gept.example_zh: 這座高架道路連接城市的兩個區域。

gept.example_en: Use the underpass to cross the busy avenue safely.
gept.example_zh: 利用地下道安全地穿越繁忙的大街。

gept.example_en: The tunnel cuts the journey time in half.
gept.example_zh: 這條隧道把行車時間縮短一半。

gept.example_en: The old stone bridge dates back four hundred years.
gept.example_zh: 這座古老的石橋已有四百年歷史。

gept.example_en: Jet lag made it hard for me to sleep on the first night.
gept.example_zh: 時差讓我第一晚很難入睡。

gept.example_en: She gets motion sickness on long bus rides.
gept.example_zh: 長途乘公車她會暈車。

gept.example_en: The flight was delayed due to bad weather.
gept.example_zh: 這班飛機因天氣不佳而延誤。

gept.example_en: The cancellation of our train left us stranded for hours.
gept.example_zh: 火車取消讓我們滯留了好幾個小時。

gept.example_en: Airlines sometimes overbook flights, causing problems for passengers.
gept.example_zh: 航空公司有時會超賣機票，給乘客帶來問題。

gept.example_en: I'm flying standby and hoping for an open seat.
gept.example_zh: 我是候補搭機，希望有空位。

gept.example_en: We had to rebook our flight after the storm.
gept.example_zh: 暴風雨後我們必須重新預訂航班。

gept.example_en: Several passengers filed complaints about the poor service.
gept.example_zh: 幾位乘客對服務不佳提出抱怨。

gept.example_en: I think I misplaced my phone at the cafe.
gept.example_zh: 我想我把手機掉在咖啡廳了。

gept.example_en: I'm afraid I lost my wallet on the train.
gept.example_zh: 我恐怕在火車上把錢包弄丟了。

gept.example_en: Pickpocket theft is common in crowded tourist areas.
gept.example_zh: 在擁擠的觀光區常見扒手偷竊。

gept.example_en: Watch out for pickpockets in the busy market.
gept.example_zh: 在繁忙的市場要小心扒手。

gept.example_en: Tourists should beware of common travel scams.
gept.example_zh: 遊客應提防常見的旅遊騙局。

gept.example_en: The storm stranded thousands of travelers at the airport.
gept.example_zh: 風暴使數千名旅客滯留機場。

gept.example_en: Listen for the delay announcement at the gate.
gept.example_zh: 注意聽登機門的延誤通告。

gept.example_en: The turbulent flight made many passengers nervous.
gept.example_zh: 這趟亂流的飛行讓許多乘客緊張。

gept.example_en: After a month abroad, she started to feel homesick.
gept.example_zh: 在國外一個月後，她開始想家。

gept.example_en: Culture shock can affect anyone moving to a new country.
gept.example_zh: 文化衝擊會影響任何搬到新國家的人。

gept.example_en: Dehydration is a real risk on long hikes in summer.
gept.example_zh: 夏天長時間健行有脫水的真實風險。

gept.example_en: The lantern festival attracts visitors from around the world.
gept.example_zh: 元宵節吸引來自世界各地的遊客。

gept.example_en: Learning a few phrases helps when traveling abroad.
gept.example_zh: 學幾句短語對出國旅行很有幫助。

gept.example_en: Different cultures have different greeting customs.
gept.example_zh: 不同的文化有不同的問候習俗。

gept.example_en: A simple hand gesture can mean different things in different countries.
gept.example_zh: 簡單的手勢在不同國家可能有不同的意思。

gept.example_en: The hospitality of the local villagers was unforgettable.
gept.example_zh: 當地村民的好客令人難忘。

gept.example_en: Show some courtesy when visiting religious sites.
gept.example_zh: 參觀宗教聖地時應展現禮貌。

gept.example_en: Some business meetings require strict formality.
gept.example_zh: 有些商務會議需要嚴格的正式禮節。

gept.example_en: Local folklore tells of a dragon living in the mountain.
gept.example_zh: 當地民間傳說有一條龍住在山中。

gept.example_en: The legend of the lost city has fascinated explorers for centuries.
gept.example_zh: 失落之城的傳奇吸引探險家數百年。

gept.example_en: Greek myths still inspire books and films today.
gept.example_zh: 希臘神話至今仍激發書籍和電影的靈感。

gept.example_en: The eagle is a national symbol of strength and freedom.
gept.example_zh: 老鷹是力量和自由的國家象徵。

gept.example_en: The language barrier made it hard to order food.
gept.example_zh: 語言隔閡讓點餐變得困難。

gept.example_en: An interpreter helped the tourists communicate with locals.
gept.example_zh: 口譯員幫助遊客與當地人溝通。

gept.example_en: Indigenous people have lived in this region for centuries.
gept.example_zh: 原住民已在此地區生活數百年。

gept.example_en: Try the authentic local cuisine instead of tourist menus.
gept.example_zh: 試試正宗的當地料理而不是觀光客菜單。

gept.example_en: The market sold many exotic spices from far away.
gept.example_zh: 這個市場賣許多來自遠方的異國香料。

gept.example_en: I love to wander through the quiet streets at dawn.
gept.example_zh: 我喜歡在黎明時在安靜的街道上漫遊。

gept.example_en: The ocean voyage took nearly three weeks to complete.
gept.example_zh: 這次航海花了將近三週才完成。

gept.example_en: They booked a Mediterranean cruise for their honeymoon.
gept.example_zh: 他們預訂地中海郵輪旅行作為蜜月。

gept.example_en: The ship sailed from Hong Kong to Singapore.
gept.example_zh: 這艘船從香港航行到新加坡。

gept.example_en: Cruise ships dock at the city's main port every day.
gept.example_zh: 郵輪每天在城市的主要港口停靠。

gept.example_en: The port is busy with cargo ships arriving each day.
gept.example_zh: 港口每天都有貨船抵達非常繁忙。

gept.example_en: The harbor was filled with colorful fishing boats.
gept.example_zh: 海港裡擠滿了色彩繽紛的漁船。

gept.example_en: The ship dropped anchor in the calm bay.
gept.example_zh: 船在平靜的海灣中下了錨。

gept.example_en: All passengers must be aboard fifteen minutes before departure.
gept.example_zh: 所有乘客必須在出發前十五分鐘上船。

gept.example_en: Boil the water before adding the noodles to the pot.
gept.example_zh: 加麵條到鍋裡前先把水煮沸。

gept.example_en: Fry the onions in oil until they turn golden brown.
gept.example_zh: 用油把洋蔥煎到金黃色。

gept.example_en: Let the soup simmer for an hour to develop flavor.
gept.example_zh: 讓湯慢燉一小時以增添風味。

gept.example_en: Marinate the chicken overnight for the best taste.
gept.example_zh: 雞肉醃製過夜口味最佳。

gept.example_en: Grind the pepper just before serving for better flavor.
gept.example_zh: 上菜前才磨胡椒風味更佳。

gept.example_en: Knead the dough for ten minutes until it feels smooth.
gept.example_zh: 揉麵團十分鐘直到變得平滑。

gept.example_en: Bake the cake at 350 degrees for thirty minutes.
gept.example_zh: 以攝氏 175 度烤蛋糕三十分鐘。

gept.example_en: Roast the chicken with garlic and rosemary for flavor.
gept.example_zh: 用大蒜和迷迭香烤雞增添風味。

gept.example_en: We grilled steaks and vegetables on the back patio.
gept.example_zh: 我們在後院燒烤牛排和蔬菜。

gept.example_en: Steam the vegetables to preserve their nutrients.
gept.example_zh: 蒸蔬菜以保留營養。

gept.example_en: Sauté the mushrooms in butter for a few minutes.
gept.example_zh: 用奶油嫩煎蘑菇幾分鐘。

gept.example_en: Stir-fry the beef with vegetables over high heat.
gept.example_zh: 用大火快炒牛肉和蔬菜。

gept.example_en: Braise the pork shoulder in red wine for several hours.
gept.example_zh: 用紅酒燉煮豬肩肉幾小時。

gept.example_en: Poach the eggs in slightly simmering water.
gept.example_zh: 在微滾的水中水煮蛋。

gept.example_en: Blend the fruits with yogurt to make a smoothie.
gept.example_zh: 把水果和優格混合做成思慕昔。

gept.example_en: Whisk the eggs until they become light and fluffy.
gept.example_zh: 把雞蛋攪打到輕盈蓬鬆。

gept.example_en: Chop the onions finely before adding them to the pan.
gept.example_zh: 加洋蔥到鍋裡前先把它切碎。

gept.example_en: Slice the bread thin for the sandwich.
gept.example_zh: 把麵包切薄做三明治。

gept.example_en: Mince the garlic and add it to the hot oil.
gept.example_zh: 把大蒜剁碎並加入熱油中。

gept.example_en: Dice the carrots into small even cubes.
gept.example_zh: 把胡蘿蔔切成大小均勻的小丁。

gept.example_en: Peel the apples before making the pie.
gept.example_zh: 做派之前先把蘋果削皮。

gept.example_en: Garnish the dish with fresh parsley for color.
gept.example_zh: 用新鮮的香菜裝飾這道菜增添色彩。

gept.example_en: Preheat the oven to 180 degrees before baking.
gept.example_zh: 烘焙前把烤箱預熱到 180 度。

gept.example_en: Toss the salad gently with the dressing.
gept.example_zh: 把沙拉和醬汁輕輕拌勻。

gept.example_en: Stuff the turkey with bread, herbs, and onions.
gept.example_zh: 在火雞裡填入麵包、香草和洋蔥。

gept.example_en: Sprinkle cheese on top of the soup for extra flavor.
gept.example_zh: 在湯上撒起司增加風味。

gept.example_en: Strain the pasta when it is just tender.
gept.example_zh: 當義大利麵剛變軟時就把它濾乾。

gept.example_en: Thaw the frozen meat in the refrigerator overnight.
gept.example_zh: 把冷凍肉放在冰箱裡解凍一晚。

gept.example_en: Add the flour gradually to avoid lumps in the batter.
gept.example_zh: 逐量加入麵粉以避免麵糊結塊。

gept.example_en: Yeast makes the bread rise and become fluffy.
gept.example_zh: 酵母讓麵包膨脹變得蓬鬆。

gept.example_en: Indian cuisine uses many fragrant spices.
gept.example_zh: 印度料理使用許多芳香的香料。

gept.example_en: Use chicken broth to make the rice more flavorful.
gept.example_zh: 用雞高湯讓米飯更有味道。

gept.example_en: The pasta is served with a rich tomato sauce.
gept.example_zh: 這道義大利麵搭配濃郁的番茄醬。

gept.example_en: Pour maple syrup over the warm pancakes.
gept.example_zh: 在溫熱的鬆餅上倒楓糖漿。

gept.example_en: A splash of vinegar brightens the flavor of the salad.
gept.example_zh: 加一點醋讓沙拉的味道更鮮明。

gept.example_en: Heat the oil in the pan before adding the meat.
gept.example_zh: 加肉前把鍋裡的油加熱。

gept.example_en: Spread butter on the toast while it's still warm.
gept.example_zh: 趁吐司還溫熱時抹上奶油。

gept.example_en: Add a spoonful of cream to make the soup richer.
gept.example_zh: 加一匙鮮奶油讓湯更濃郁。

gept.example_en: Greek yogurt is high in protein and low in sugar.
gept.example_zh: 希臘優格高蛋白低糖。

gept.example_en: I love sprinkling cheese on top of my pasta.
gept.example_zh: 我喜歡在義大利麵上撒起司。

gept.example_en: Add a pinch of salt to balance the sweetness.
gept.example_zh: 加一撮鹽以平衡甜味。

gept.example_en: Freshly ground black pepper makes a big difference.
gept.example_zh: 現磨黑胡椒會帶來很大的不同。

gept.example_en: Reduce the sugar if you prefer less sweet desserts.
gept.example_zh: 如果喜歡較不甜的甜點就減少糖量。

gept.example_en: Crushed garlic adds depth to almost any savory dish.
gept.example_zh: 壓碎的大蒜為幾乎任何鹹味菜餚增添層次。

gept.example_en: Fresh ginger gives the soup a warming kick.
gept.example_zh: 新鮮的薑讓湯有溫熱的辛辣感。

gept.example_en: Caramelized onions are sweet and full of flavor.
gept.example_zh: 焦糖洋蔥又甜又有味道。

gept.example_en: Add chili to the dish if you like it spicy.
gept.example_zh: 如果你喜歡辣就加辣椒到菜裡。

gept.example_en: Fresh basil leaves enhance any Italian dish.
gept.example_zh: 新鮮羅勒葉提升任何義大利菜的風味。

gept.example_en: Chopped parsley is often used as a garnish.
gept.example_zh: 切碎的香芹常被用來裝飾。

gept.example_en: Cilantro is essential in many Mexican dishes.
gept.example_zh: 香菜是許多墨西哥菜的必備品。

gept.example_en: Mint leaves give a fresh taste to summer drinks.
gept.example_zh: 薄荷葉為夏日飲品帶來清新的口感。

gept.example_en: Let the dough rest for thirty minutes before rolling.
gept.example_zh: 擀麵團前讓它靜置三十分鐘。

gept.example_en: Pour the batter into the pan and cook on low heat.
gept.example_zh: 把麵糊倒進鍋裡用小火煮。

gept.example_en: Potatoes and rice are common sources of starch.
gept.example_zh: 馬鈴薯和米飯是常見的澱粉來源。

gept.example_en: Beans are a great source of plant protein.
