gept.example_zh: 豆類是很好的植物蛋白質來源。

gept.example_en: Whole grains are healthier than refined ones.
gept.example_zh: 全穀物比精製穀物健康。

gept.example_en: Thai cuisine is famous for its spicy and aromatic flavors.
gept.example_zh: 泰國料理以辛辣芳香的味道聞名。

gept.example_en: We ordered shrimp dumplings as an appetizer.
gept.example_zh: 我們點了蝦餃當開胃菜。

gept.example_en: The entrée came with vegetables and rice.
gept.example_zh: 主菜搭配蔬菜和米飯。

gept.example_en: Save room for dessert because the chocolate cake is amazing.
gept.example_zh: 留點肚子吃甜點因為巧克力蛋糕很棒。

gept.example_en: The restaurant offers a wide variety of hot and cold beverages.
gept.example_zh: 這家餐廳提供各種冷熱飲料。

gept.example_en: I usually have a snack between meals.
gept.example_zh: 我通常在兩餐之間吃點心。

gept.example_en: The hotel offers an all-you-can-eat buffet for breakfast.
gept.example_zh: 這家飯店早餐提供吃到飽自助餐。

gept.example_en: We meet for brunch every Sunday at the cafe.
gept.example_zh: 我們每週日在咖啡廳吃早午餐。

gept.example_en: Fresh pastries are baked every morning at the bakery.
gept.example_zh: 這家烘焙坊每天早上都烘焙新鮮糕點。

gept.example_en: She bought a loaf of fresh bread on her way home.
gept.example_zh: 她回家路上買了一條新鮮麵包。

gept.example_en: Steamed buns are popular street food in Taiwan.
gept.example_zh: 包子是台灣受歡迎的街頭小吃。

gept.example_en: Dumplings are traditionally eaten during the Lunar New Year.
gept.example_zh: 農曆新年傳統上會吃餃子。

gept.example_en: Rice noodles are a staple in Vietnamese cuisine.
gept.example_zh: 米線是越南料理的主食。

gept.example_en: A bowl of hot soup is perfect on a cold day.
gept.example_zh: 寒冷的日子裡一碗熱湯最棒。

gept.example_en: Beef stew is a comforting winter dish.
gept.example_zh: 燉牛肉是溫暖人心的冬日料理。

gept.example_en: Many people eat rice porridge for breakfast.
gept.example_zh: 許多人早餐吃稀飯。

gept.example_en: Fresh seafood is the highlight of coastal cuisine.
gept.example_zh: 新鮮海鮮是沿海料理的亮點。

gept.example_en: Poultry includes chicken, duck, and turkey.
gept.example_zh: 家禽包括雞、鴨和火雞。

gept.example_en: I prefer beef cooked medium rare for the best flavor.
gept.example_zh: 我喜歡牛肉煮三分熟，味道最好。

gept.example_en: Pork is widely used in Chinese cooking.
gept.example_zh: 豬肉在中式料理中廣泛使用。

gept.example_en: Roast lamb is a popular Easter dish in many countries.
gept.example_zh: 烤羊肉是許多國家流行的復活節菜餚。

gept.example_en: Some people are allergic to shellfish like shrimp and crab.
gept.example_zh: 有些人對蝦蟹等貝類過敏。

gept.example_en: Grilled squid is a popular night market snack.
gept.example_zh: 烤魷魚是受歡迎的夜市小吃。

gept.example_en: Fresh oysters taste best with just a squeeze of lemon.
gept.example_zh: 新鮮牡蠣擠點檸檬汁最美味。

gept.example_en: Grilled salmon is rich in healthy omega-3 fats.
gept.example_zh: 烤鮭魚富含健康的 Omega-3 脂肪。

gept.example_en: Tofu is a great source of protein for vegetarians.
gept.example_zh: 豆腐是素食者很好的蛋白質來源。

gept.example_en: Rice is the main staple food in most of Asia.
gept.example_zh: 米飯是大部分亞洲地區的主食。

gept.example_en: Fresh bread smells wonderful coming out of the oven.
gept.example_zh: 新鮮的麵包從烤箱裡拿出來時聞起來很香。

gept.example_en: Italian pasta comes in dozens of different shapes.
gept.example_zh: 義大利麵有幾十種不同的形狀。

gept.example_en: The waiter took our order and brought water immediately.
gept.example_zh: 服務生記下我們的點餐並立刻送來水。

gept.example_en: The waitress recommended the chef's special.
gept.example_zh: 女服務生推薦主廚特餐。

gept.example_en: The busboy cleared the table quickly after we finished.
gept.example_zh: 我們吃完後餐廳助理迅速收拾桌子。

gept.example_en: The chef trained for years in France before opening his restaurant.
gept.example_zh: 這位主廚開餐廳前在法國受訓多年。

gept.example_en: The hostess greeted us and led us to our table.
gept.example_zh: 接待員迎接我們並帶我們到桌位。

gept.example_en: We ordered takeout because we were too tired to cook.
gept.example_zh: 我們點外帶因為太累不想做飯。

gept.example_en: Most restaurants offer a takeaway menu now.
gept.example_zh: 現在大多數餐廳都提供外帶菜單。

gept.example_en: Food delivery apps have changed the way we eat.
gept.example_zh: 外送應用程式改變了我們的飲食方式。

gept.example_en: The restaurant has a special seasonal menu in autumn.
gept.example_zh: 這家餐廳秋天有特別的季節性菜單。

gept.example_en: I'd like to order the grilled fish with vegetables.
gept.example_zh: 我想點烤魚配蔬菜。

gept.example_en: It's customary to leave a tip of fifteen to twenty percent.
gept.example_zh: 給百分之十五到二十的小費是慣例。

gept.example_en: A service gratuity has already been added to your bill.
gept.example_zh: 服務費已加在您的帳單上。

gept.example_en: Please place the napkin on your lap during the meal.
gept.example_zh: 用餐時請把餐巾放在大腿上。

gept.example_en: The cutlery should be placed neatly on either side of the plate.
gept.example_zh: 餐具應整齊地放在盤子兩側。

gept.example_en: She served the pasta on a large white plate.
gept.example_zh: 她把義大利麵裝在一個大白盤上。

gept.example_en: This dish is a specialty of the local region.
gept.example_zh: 這道菜是當地的特色料理。

gept.example_en: Pour the soup into a deep bowl.
gept.example_zh: 把湯倒進深碗裡。

gept.example_en: Could I have a glass of red wine, please?
gept.example_zh: 可以給我一杯紅酒嗎？

gept.example_en: She drinks coffee from a big red mug every morning.
gept.example_zh: 她每天早上用一個大紅色馬克杯喝咖啡。

gept.example_en: Wash the kitchen utensils right after cooking.
gept.example_zh: 煮完飯立刻清洗廚具。

gept.example_en: Outdoor seating is available on warm evenings.
gept.example_zh: 暖和的夜晚有戶外座位可用。

gept.example_en: I'd like to reserve a table for tomorrow evening.
gept.example_zh: 我想預訂明天晚上的桌位。

gept.example_en: Please add us to the waiting list for tonight.
gept.example_zh: 請把我們加到今晚的候位名單。

gept.example_en: The cafe has a relaxing ambiance with soft music.
gept.example_zh: 這家咖啡廳有放鬆的氛圍和輕柔的音樂。

gept.example_en: I prefer savory snacks over sweet ones.
gept.example_zh: 我比較喜歡鹹的點心勝過甜的。

gept.example_en: The soup tasted bland without enough salt.
gept.example_zh: 這湯沒加足夠的鹽，嚐起來平淡無味。

gept.example_en: The chicken skin came out perfectly crispy.
gept.example_zh: 這雞皮做得完美酥脆。

gept.example_en: Bite into the juicy peach and let the flavor burst.
gept.example_zh: 咬一口多汁的桃子，讓味道在口中爆開。

gept.example_en: The salad has crunchy croutons on top.
gept.example_zh: 這沙拉上面有脆脆的麵包丁。

gept.example_en: The bagels are wonderfully chewy.
gept.example_zh: 這些貝果非常有嚼勁。

gept.example_en: Sticky rice is used in many Asian desserts.
gept.example_zh: 糯米被用在許多亞洲甜點中。

gept.example_en: The creamy sauce coats the pasta beautifully.
gept.example_zh: 這滑順的醬汁完美地裹著義大利麵。

gept.example_en: Blend until the mixture becomes completely smooth.
gept.example_zh: 攪拌到混合物完全滑順為止。

gept.example_en: Fast food can be greasy and unhealthy if eaten often.
gept.example_zh: 常吃速食可能會油膩且不健康。

gept.example_en: Avoid oily foods if you have stomach issues.
gept.example_zh: 如果你有胃部問題就避免油膩食物。

gept.example_en: The chips were too salty for my taste.
gept.example_zh: 這些洋芋片對我來說太鹹了。

gept.example_en: The pineapple is sweet and very refreshing.
gept.example_zh: 這鳳梨又甜又非常清爽。

gept.example_en: Lemons are too sour to eat by themselves.
gept.example_zh: 檸檬太酸不能單獨吃。

gept.example_en: Dark chocolate has a bitter aftertaste.
gept.example_zh: 黑巧克力有苦澀的餘味。

gept.example_en: Be careful, that dish is extremely spicy.
gept.example_zh: 小心，那道菜非常辣。

gept.example_en: The tangy sauce complements the fish perfectly.
gept.example_zh: 這酸甜的醬汁完美地搭配魚肉。

gept.example_en: The chocolate cake has a rich, deep flavor.
gept.example_zh: 這巧克力蛋糕有濃郁深厚的味道。

gept.example_en: I prefer a light meal in the evening.
gept.example_zh: 我晚上比較喜歡清淡的餐點。

gept.example_en: A hearty breakfast keeps me energized all morning.
gept.example_zh: 豐盛的早餐讓我整個早上精力充沛。

gept.example_en: The broth is incredibly flavorful after hours of simmering.
gept.example_zh: 這高湯經過數小時燉煮後非常美味。

gept.example_en: The delicate flavor of the tea is best enjoyed plain.
gept.example_zh: 這茶的細緻風味最適合單獨品味。

gept.example_en: The aromatic herbs filled the kitchen with their fragrance.
gept.example_zh: 這些芳香的香草讓廚房充滿香味。

gept.example_en: She has been a vegetarian since high school.
gept.example_zh: 她從高中開始就是素食者。

gept.example_en: Vegans don't eat any animal products including milk and eggs.
gept.example_zh: 純素者不吃任何動物性產品包括牛奶和雞蛋。

gept.example_en: Gluten-free options are now common in most restaurants.
gept.example_zh: 無麩質的選擇現在在大多數餐廳都很常見。

gept.example_en: Organic vegetables are usually more expensive than regular ones.
gept.example_zh: 有機蔬菜通常比一般的貴。

gept.example_en: She avoids dairy due to her lactose intolerance.
gept.example_zh: 她因為乳糖不耐症而避免吃乳製品。

gept.example_en: Fruits provide important nutrients for the body.
gept.example_zh: 水果為身體提供重要的營養素。

gept.example_en: Count your daily calorie intake to manage your weight.
gept.example_zh: 計算每日卡路里攝取量來控制體重。

gept.example_en: Eat smaller portions to maintain a healthy weight.
gept.example_zh: 少量多餐以維持健康體重。

gept.example_en: A balanced diet includes a variety of foods.
gept.example_zh: 均衡飲食包括各種食物。

gept.example_en: Try to limit processed foods in your daily meals.
gept.example_zh: 試著限制日常餐點中的加工食品。

gept.example_en: Fresh produce is always better than canned.
gept.example_zh: 新鮮農產品總是比罐裝的好。

gept.example_en: Frozen vegetables retain most of their nutrients.
gept.example_zh: 冷凍蔬菜保留了大部分的營養。

gept.example_en: Some snacks contain artificial preservatives.
gept.example_zh: 有些零食含有人工防腐劑。

gept.example_en: Read labels to avoid harmful food additives.
gept.example_zh: 閱讀標籤以避免有害的食品添加物。

gept.example_en: Use natural seasonings instead of too much salt.
gept.example_zh: 使用天然調味料代替太多鹽。

gept.example_en: Low-fat milk is a healthier choice for many people.
gept.example_zh: 低脂牛奶對許多人來說是更健康的選擇。

gept.example_en: Doctors recommend a low-sodium diet for heart health.
gept.example_zh: 醫生建議低鈉飲食以維護心臟健康。

gept.example_en: A low-carb diet helped him lose weight quickly.
gept.example_zh: 低碳水化合物飲食讓他快速減重。

gept.example_en: Vitamin supplements can fill nutritional gaps in your diet.
gept.example_zh: 維他命補充品可補足飲食中的營養缺口。

gept.example_en: Drinking water is more hydrating than sugary drinks.
gept.example_zh: 喝水比含糖飲料更能補水。

gept.example_en: Chewing slowly helps with proper digestion.
gept.example_zh: 慢慢咀嚼有助於正確消化。

gept.example_en: Regular exercise can boost your metabolism.
gept.example_zh: 規律運動能促進你的新陳代謝。

gept.example_en: Whole grains and vegetables are high in fiber.
gept.example_zh: 全穀類和蔬菜富含纖維。

gept.example_en: Oranges are an excellent source of vitamin C.
gept.example_zh: 柳橙是維他命 C 的極佳來源。

gept.example_en: Leafy greens contain many essential minerals.
gept.example_zh: 綠葉蔬菜含有許多必需礦物質。

gept.example_en: Berries are rich in antioxidants that fight aging.
gept.example_zh: 莓果富含對抗老化的抗氧化劑。

gept.example_en: Portion control is important for healthy eating.
gept.example_zh: 份量控制對健康飲食很重要。

gept.example_en: I had a strong craving for chocolate last night.
gept.example_zh: 我昨晚很想吃巧克力。

gept.example_en: She decided to indulge in a piece of cake after dinner.
gept.example_zh: 她決定晚餐後縱情享受一塊蛋糕。

gept.example_en: Don't starve yourself to lose weight; eat balanced meals.
gept.example_zh: 別為了減肥讓自己挨餓，要均衡飲食。

gept.example_en: He cracked his knuckles before starting to type.
gept.example_zh: 他在開始打字前壓壓指關節發出聲音。

gept.example_en: She twisted her ankle while running on the beach.
gept.example_zh: 她在海灘跑步時扭傷了腳踝。

gept.example_en: Long eyelashes can protect the eyes from dust.
gept.example_zh: 長睫毛可保護眼睛不受灰塵侵害。

gept.example_en: He raised an eyebrow in surprise at the news.
gept.example_zh: 他聽到消息時驚訝地揚起眉毛。

gept.example_en: Her eyelids felt heavy after working all night.
gept.example_zh: 熬夜工作後她的眼皮感覺很沉。

gept.example_en: She held the coin tightly in the palm of her hand.
gept.example_zh: 她把硬幣緊握在手掌裡。

gept.example_en: He felt pain in his jaw after chewing tough meat.
gept.example_zh: 咬硬肉後他的下顎感到疼痛。

gept.example_en: He rested his chin on his hand while thinking.
gept.example_zh: 他思考時用手托著下巴。

gept.example_en: Sweat dripped from his forehead during the workout.
gept.example_zh: 運動時汗水從他的額頭滴下。

gept.example_en: Her cheeks turned red from the cold wind.
gept.example_zh: 她的臉頰因寒風變紅了。

gept.example_en: Gently massage your scalp while shampooing.
gept.example_zh: 洗頭時輕輕按摩你的頭皮。

gept.example_en: The helmet protects the skull during cycling.
gept.example_zh: 這頂安全帽在騎自行車時保護頭骨。

gept.example_en: Good posture supports a healthy spine.
gept.example_zh: 良好姿勢支撐健康的脊椎。

gept.example_en: He bruised a rib falling off his bicycle.
gept.example_zh: 他從自行車上摔下來撞傷了肋骨。

gept.example_en: Yoga helps to keep the hips flexible.
gept.example_zh: 瑜伽有助於保持臀部靈活。

gept.example_en: Squats strengthen the thigh muscles.
gept.example_zh: 深蹲能強化大腿肌肉。

gept.example_en: She felt a cramp in her calf during the night.
gept.example_zh: 她半夜感到小腿抽筋。

gept.example_en: High heels can cause pain in the heel over time.
gept.example_zh: 高跟鞋久了會引起腳跟疼痛。

gept.example_en: I stubbed my toe on the corner of the bed.
gept.example_zh: 我的腳趾撞到床角。

gept.example_en: She wore a belt around her waist.
gept.example_zh: 她在腰部繫了一條皮帶。

gept.example_en: Rest your elbows on the table while eating soup carefully.
gept.example_zh: 小心喝湯時把手肘放在桌上。

gept.example_en: She wears a small bracelet on her wrist.
gept.example_zh: 她在手腕上戴一條細手鍊。

gept.example_en: Carrying the heavy bag hurt his shoulder.
gept.example_zh: 背沉重的包包傷了他的肩膀。

gept.example_en: Looking at the screen too long can strain the neck.
gept.example_zh: 長時間看螢幕會使脖子緊繃。

gept.example_en: Drink warm water to soothe a sore throat.
gept.example_zh: 喝溫水可以舒緩喉嚨痛。

gept.example_en: The dentist examined her tongue carefully.
gept.example_zh: 牙醫仔細檢查她的舌頭。

gept.example_en: Brush gently to avoid hurting your gums.
gept.example_zh: 刷牙要溫和以免傷到牙齦。

gept.example_en: Breathe deeply through both nostrils during meditation.
gept.example_zh: 冥想時用兩個鼻孔深呼吸。

gept.example_en: The brain needs rest and sleep to function well.
gept.example_zh: 大腦需要休息和睡眠才能良好運作。

gept.example_en: Regular exercise keeps the heart strong and healthy.
gept.example_zh: 規律運動保持心臟強壯健康。

gept.example_en: Smoking damages the lungs over many years.
gept.example_zh: 抽煙多年會損害肺部。

gept.example_en: The liver filters toxins from the blood.
gept.example_zh: 肝臟過濾血液中的毒素。

gept.example_en: Drink water to support kidney function.
gept.example_zh: 喝水以支持腎臟功能。

gept.example_en: My stomach growled because I skipped lunch.
gept.example_zh: 因為我沒吃午餐肚子咕嚕叫。

gept.example_en: Fiber helps to keep the intestines healthy.
gept.example_zh: 纖維有助於保持腸道健康。

gept.example_en: Drinking lots of water makes the bladder work harder.
gept.example_zh: 喝大量水會讓膀胱更費力。

gept.example_en: Weightlifting builds muscle and strengthens bones.
gept.example_zh: 舉重能增強肌肉並強化骨骼。

gept.example_en: Pinched nerves can cause sharp shooting pain.
gept.example_zh: 神經壓迫會導致劇烈刺痛。

gept.example_en: Cold weather often makes joints feel stiff.
gept.example_zh: 寒冷天氣常讓關節感到僵硬。

gept.example_en: He tore a ligament in his knee playing basketball.
gept.example_zh: 他打籃球時撕裂了膝蓋的韌帶。

gept.example_en: Stretching helps prevent tendon injuries.
gept.example_zh: 伸展有助於預防肌腱受傷。

gept.example_en: Calcium is important for strong bones.
gept.example_zh: 鈣質對強壯的骨骼很重要。

gept.example_en: Sunscreen protects your skin from harmful UV rays.
gept.example_zh: 防曬乳保護皮膚免受有害紫外線傷害。

gept.example_en: Blood carries oxygen throughout the body.
gept.example_zh: 血液把氧氣輸送到全身。

gept.example_en: A dry cough kept her awake most of the night.
gept.example_zh: 乾咳讓她大半夜睡不著。

gept.example_en: I sneeze whenever I'm near flowers in spring.
gept.example_zh: 春天我接近花朵就會打噴嚏。

gept.example_en: Pregnant women often experience nausea in the morning.
gept.example_zh: 孕婦早上常會感到噁心。

gept.example_en: Standing up too quickly can cause dizziness.
gept.example_zh: 站起來太快會引起頭暈。

gept.example_en: Chronic fatigue can be a sign of underlying illness.
gept.example_zh: 慢性疲勞可能是潛在疾病的徵兆。

gept.example_en: She had a high fever and stayed home from work.
gept.example_zh: 她發高燒所以沒去上班。

gept.example_en: Fever often comes with chills and body aches.
gept.example_zh: 發燒常伴隨寒顫和身體痠痛。

gept.example_en: Drinking enough water can prevent headaches.
gept.example_zh: 喝足夠的水可以預防頭痛。

gept.example_en: She gets a migraine whenever she skips meals.
gept.example_zh: 她不吃飯就會得偏頭痛。

gept.example_en: A toothache can be a sign of a cavity.
gept.example_zh: 牙痛可能是蛀牙的徵兆。

gept.example_en: Eating spicy food gives him a stomachache.
gept.example_zh: 吃辣的食物讓他胃痛。

gept.example_en: Sitting too long at the computer causes backaches.
gept.example_zh: 坐在電腦前太久會引起背痛。

gept.example_en: My muscles were sore after the long hike.
gept.example_zh: 長時間健行後我的肌肉痠痛。

gept.example_en: Her skin felt itchy after the mosquito bite.
gept.example_zh: 被蚊子叮後她的皮膚感到癢。

gept.example_en: A rash appeared on her arms after eating peanuts.
gept.example_zh: 吃花生後她的手臂上出現皮疹。

gept.example_en: Apply ice to reduce swelling on the injury.
gept.example_zh: 在傷處敷冰塊以減輕腫脹。

gept.example_en: He had a large bruise on his leg from falling.
gept.example_zh: 他跌倒後腿上有大片瘀青。

gept.example_en: A runny nose is common with a cold.
gept.example_zh: 流鼻水是感冒常見的症狀。

gept.example_en: Her voice was hoarse after cheering at the game.
gept.example_zh: 在比賽中加油後她的聲音變沙啞。

gept.example_en: Shortness of breath can be a serious symptom.
gept.example_zh: 呼吸急促可能是嚴重的症狀。

gept.example_en: She felt palpitations after drinking too much coffee.
gept.example_zh: 喝太多咖啡後她感到心悸。

gept.example_en: Drink water to prevent muscle cramps during exercise.
gept.example_zh: 運動時喝水以預防肌肉抽筋。

gept.example_en: He vomited after eating spoiled food.
gept.example_zh: 吃了壞掉的食物後他嘔吐了。

gept.example_en: Diarrhea can lead to dehydration if untreated.
gept.example_zh: 腹瀉如未治療可能導致脫水。

gept.example_en: Eating fiber helps with constipation.
gept.example_zh: 吃纖維有助於緩解便祕。

gept.example_en: Stress is a common cause of insomnia.
gept.example_zh: 壓力是失眠的常見原因。

gept.example_en: Eating too quickly can cause indigestion.
gept.example_zh: 吃得太快會引起消化不良。

gept.example_en: Spicy food can cause heartburn for some people.
gept.example_zh: 辣的食物會讓某些人胃灼熱。

gept.example_en: Some foods cause uncomfortable bloating.
gept.example_zh: 有些食物會引起不舒服的腹脹。

gept.example_en: Pollen allergies are worst during spring.
gept.example_zh: 花粉過敏在春天最嚴重。

gept.example_en: People with asthma should avoid smoky places.
gept.example_zh: 氣喘患者應避免有煙的地方。

gept.example_en: Anemia causes tiredness and pale skin.
gept.example_zh: 貧血會引起疲倦和臉色蒼白。

gept.example_en: Get a flu shot every year to stay healthy.
gept.example_zh: 每年接種流感疫苗以保持健康。

gept.example_en: Influenza spreads quickly during winter months.
gept.example_zh: 流行性感冒在冬季月份傳播迅速。

gept.example_en: Wash your hands often to prevent infection.
gept.example_zh: 常洗手以預防感染。

gept.example_en: Diabetes affects how the body processes sugar.
gept.example_zh: 糖尿病影響身體處理糖分的方式。

gept.example_en: Hypertension increases the risk of heart disease.
gept.example_zh: 高血壓增加心臟病的風險。

gept.example_en: Many older adults suffer from joint pain due to arthritis.
gept.example_zh: 許多年長者因關節炎而關節疼痛。

gept.example_en: Early detection improves cancer survival rates.
gept.example_zh: 早期發現可提高癌症存活率。

gept.example_en: The doctor confirmed the tumor was not cancerous.
gept.example_zh: 醫生確認腫瘤不是癌症。

gept.example_en: Anxiety can be managed with therapy and exercise.
gept.example_zh: 焦慮可以透過治療和運動來控制。

gept.example_en: Depression is a serious mental health condition.
gept.example_zh: 憂鬱症是嚴重的心理健康問題。

gept.example_en: Quick treatment after a stroke saves lives.
gept.example_zh: 中風後的快速治療能拯救生命。

gept.example_en: Epilepsy can cause sudden seizures.
gept.example_zh: 癲癇可能導致突然發作。

gept.example_en: A migraine attack can last for hours.
gept.example_zh: 偏頭痛發作可持續好幾個小時。

gept.example_en: Stress can contribute to stomach ulcers.
gept.example_zh: 壓力可能導致胃潰瘍。

gept.example_en: Pneumonia is a serious infection of the lungs.
gept.example_zh: 肺炎是嚴重的肺部感染。

gept.example_en: A persistent cough may indicate bronchitis.
gept.example_zh: 持續性咳嗽可能是支氣管炎。

gept.example_en: Eczema causes red, itchy patches on the skin.
gept.example_zh: 濕疹會在皮膚上引起紅癢斑塊。

gept.example_en: Teenagers often experience acne during puberty.
gept.example_zh: 青少年在青春期常出現痤瘡。

gept.example_en: Obesity is linked to many serious health problems.
gept.example_zh: 肥胖與許多嚴重的健康問題有關。

gept.example_en: He suffered a mild concussion from the fall.
gept.example_zh: 他從跌倒中得了輕度腦震盪。

gept.example_en: An X-ray showed a small fracture in her wrist.
gept.example_zh: X 光顯示她手腕有小骨折。

gept.example_en: Rest is essential for healing an ankle sprain.
gept.example_zh: 休息對於腳踝扭傷的痊癒很重要。

gept.example_en: The scar from the surgery faded over time.
gept.example_zh: 手術留下的疤痕隨時間褪去。

gept.example_en: Sleep disorders affect millions of people.
gept.example_zh: 睡眠失調影響數百萬人。

gept.example_en: Heart disease is one of the leading causes of death.
gept.example_zh: 心臟病是主要的死亡原因之一。

gept.example_en: Take the medicine according to the prescription instructions.
gept.example_zh: 按照處方說明服用藥物。

gept.example_en: Follow the correct dosage to avoid side effects.
gept.example_zh: 遵循正確的劑量以避免副作用。

gept.example_en: She fully recovered three months after the surgery.
gept.example_zh: 手術後三個月她完全康復了。

gept.example_en: Physical therapy helped him walk again after the accident.
gept.example_zh: 物理治療幫助他在意外後再次行走。

gept.example_en: Early treatment is key for many serious conditions.
gept.example_zh: 早期治療對許多嚴重疾病是關鍵。

gept.example_en: Take this medication twice a day with food.
gept.example_zh: 與食物一起每日兩次服用此藥物。

gept.example_en: Antibiotics only work against bacterial infections.
gept.example_zh: 抗生素只對細菌感染有效。

gept.example_en: The new vaccine has shown promising results in trials.
gept.example_zh: 新疫苗在試驗中顯示有希望的成果。

gept.example_en: The nurse gave him an injection in his arm.
gept.example_zh: 護士在他的手臂注射了藥物。

gept.example_en: Schedule a yearly checkup with your doctor.
gept.example_zh: 每年安排一次健康檢查。

gept.example_en: The doctor explained the diagnosis carefully.
gept.example_zh: 醫生仔細解釋了診斷結果。

gept.example_en: An X-ray confirmed there was no broken bone.
gept.example_zh: X 光確認沒有骨折。

gept.example_en: The CT scan showed everything was normal.
gept.example_zh: 電腦斷層掃描顯示一切正常。

gept.example_en: A biopsy is needed to confirm the diagnosis.
gept.example_zh: 需要做切片檢查以確認診斷。

gept.example_en: Rehabilitation can take months after a serious injury.
gept.example_zh: 嚴重受傷後復健可能需要數個月。

gept.example_en: The operation took three hours and went smoothly.
gept.example_zh: 這次手術花了三小時，進行順利。

gept.example_en: Anesthesia made the surgery painless.
gept.example_zh: 麻醉讓手術沒有疼痛。

gept.example_en: Her recovery from surgery was quicker than expected.
gept.example_zh: 她從手術中康復比預期快。

gept.example_en: The nurse wrapped a bandage around his wounded arm.
gept.example_zh: 護士在他受傷的手臂上纏繃帶。

gept.example_en: Take a painkiller if the pain becomes unbearable.
gept.example_zh: 如果疼痛難以忍受就吃止痛藥。

gept.example_en: Apply this ointment three times daily.
gept.example_zh: 每日塗抹此藥膏三次。

gept.example_en: Take one pill before bedtime.
gept.example_zh: 睡前服用一顆藥丸。

gept.example_en: Swallow the capsule whole with plenty of water.
gept.example_zh: 用大量的水整顆吞下膠囊。

gept.example_en: He used crutches for six weeks after the injury.
gept.example_zh: 受傷後他用了六週的拐杖。

gept.example_en: She needs a wheelchair to move around the hospital.
gept.example_zh: 她需要輪椅在醫院中移動。

gept.example_en: The paramedics carried him on a stretcher.
gept.example_zh: 醫護人員用擔架抬他。

gept.example_en: Call 911 immediately in case of a medical emergency.
gept.example_zh: 醫療緊急情況請立即打 911。

gept.example_en: Good posture helps prevent back pain.
gept.example_zh: 良好姿勢有助於預防背痛。

gept.example_en: Mindfulness meditation reduces stress and anxiety.
gept.example_zh: 正念冥想能減輕壓力和焦慮。

gept.example_en: Hydration is essential during hot weather.
gept.example_zh: 炎熱天氣補水很重要。

gept.example_en: Wellness includes physical, mental, and emotional health.
gept.example_zh: 健康包括身體、心理和情緒上的健康。

gept.example_en: Daily meditation improves focus and reduces stress.
gept.example_zh: 每天冥想能提高專注力並減輕壓力。

gept.example_en: Yoga improves flexibility and inner peace.
gept.example_zh: 瑜伽提升柔軟度和內心的平靜。

gept.example_en: Stretching before exercise prevents muscle injury.
gept.example_zh: 運動前伸展可預防肌肉受傷。

gept.example_en: Cardio workouts strengthen the heart.
gept.example_zh: 心肺運動能強化心臟。

gept.example_en: Strength training builds muscle and burns calories.
gept.example_zh: 力量訓練能增肌並燃燒卡路里。

gept.example_en: Proper nutrition is the foundation of good health.
gept.example_zh: 適當的營養是良好健康的基礎。

gept.example_en: Adults need seven to nine hours of sleep nightly.
gept.example_zh: 成人每晚需要七到九小時的睡眠。

gept.example_en: Find time for relaxation each day to manage stress.
gept.example_zh: 每天找時間放鬆以管理壓力。

gept.example_en: Deep breathing exercises can calm the nervous system.
gept.example_zh: 深呼吸運動能讓神經系統平靜。

gept.example_en: Mental health is just as important as physical health.
gept.example_zh: 心理健康和身體健康一樣重要。

gept.example_en: Self-care includes both physical and mental practices.
gept.example_zh: 自我照顧包含身心方面的練習。

gept.example_en: A healthy diet boosts immunity against illness.
gept.example_zh: 健康飲食增強對抗疾病的免疫力。

gept.example_en: Joining a gym helped improve his fitness level.
gept.example_zh: 加入健身房幫助他提升健身水平。

gept.example_en: Stretching daily increases flexibility over time.
gept.example_zh: 每日伸展可隨時間增加柔軟度。

gept.example_en: Marathon runners build endurance over months of training.
gept.example_zh: 馬拉松跑者透過數月訓練建立耐力。

gept.example_en: Good hygiene prevents the spread of disease.
gept.example_zh: 良好衛生可預防疾病傳播。

gept.example_en: The parliament passed a new law to protect workers from unfair treatment last week.
gept.example_zh: 國會上週通過一項保護勞工免受不公平對待的新法律。

gept.example_en: The presidential election will take place next November across the entire country.
gept.example_zh: 總統選舉將於明年十一月在全國各地舉行。

gept.example_en: Many people believe democracy gives ordinary citizens a real voice in government.
gept.example_zh: 許多人相信民主讓普通公民在政府中擁有真正的發言權。

gept.example_en: Young adults should vote in every election to influence the laws that affect them.
gept.example_zh: 年輕人應該在每次選舉中投票，以影響影響他們的法律。

gept.example_en: The politician promised to lower taxes if she were elected to office.
gept.example_zh: 這位政治人物承諾如果當選將降低稅收。

gept.example_en: His campaign focused on improving public transportation and reducing traffic in the city.
gept.example_zh: 他的競選活動著重於改善公共交通並減少城市的交通擁堵。

gept.example_en: The government announced new measures to help small businesses survive the economic crisis.
gept.example_zh: 政府宣布新措施幫助小企業度過經濟危機。

gept.example_en: The health minister visited the hospital to discuss the shortage of medical staff.
gept.example_zh: 衛生部長造訪醫院討論醫護人員短缺的問題。

gept.example_en: Voters dropped their ballot into the box after marking their preferred candidate.
gept.example_zh: 選民在標記他們偏好的候選人後將選票投入箱中。

gept.example_en: The new law was passed by a clear majority in the senate yesterday.
gept.example_zh: 這項新法律昨天在參議院以明顯多數獲得通過。

gept.example_en: The opposition criticized the government's handling of the unemployment problem.
gept.example_zh: 反對黨批評政府處理失業問題的方式。

gept.example_en: Policy makers must consider both economic growth and environmental protection equally.
gept.example_zh: 政策制定者必須同等地考量經濟成長與環境保護。

gept.example_en: Education reform is needed to prepare students for the rapidly changing job market.
gept.example_zh: 教育改革是必要的，以幫助學生為快速變化的就業市場做準備。

gept.example_en: The nation celebrated its independence with parades, fireworks, and public concerts.
gept.example_zh: 全國以遊行、煙火和公開音樂會慶祝獨立。

gept.example_en: Every citizen has the right to express their opinion freely without fear.
gept.example_zh: 每個公民都有權利毫無恐懼地自由表達意見。

gept.example_en: The constitution guarantees freedom of speech and religion to all citizens.
gept.example_zh: 憲法保障所有公民的言論和宗教自由。

gept.example_en: The two countries signed a peace treaty ending decades of border disputes.
gept.example_zh: 兩國簽署了一項和平條約，結束了數十年的邊境爭端。

gept.example_en: The diplomat worked hard to improve relations between the two nations.
gept.example_zh: 這位外交官努力改善兩國之間的關係。

gept.example_en: The jury reached a verdict after three days of careful discussion.
gept.example_zh: 陪審團經過三天的仔細討論後達成了裁決。

gept.example_en: Her attorney advised her not to say anything to the police without permission.
gept.example_zh: 她的律師建議她未經允許不要對警方說任何話。

gept.example_en: New safety regulations require all factories to install fire alarms by next year.
gept.example_zh: 新的安全法規要求所有工廠在明年之前安裝火警警報器。

gept.example_en: The case will be heard in court next month before a panel of judges.
gept.example_zh: 此案將於下個月在法院由一組法官審理。

gept.example_en: The judge listened carefully to both sides before making her final decision.
gept.example_zh: 法官在做出最終決定之前仔細聆聽雙方的陳述。

gept.example_en: The jury consists of twelve ordinary citizens selected at random.
gept.example_zh: 陪審團由十二位隨機選出的普通公民組成。

gept.example_en: The trial lasted six weeks and attracted huge media attention nationwide.
gept.example_zh: 審判持續六週，吸引了全國巨大的媒體關注。

gept.example_en: The suspect was arrested at the airport while trying to leave the country.
gept.example_zh: 嫌疑犯在試圖離開該國時於機場被逮捕。

gept.example_en: She insisted she was innocent and demanded to speak with a lawyer immediately.
gept.example_zh: 她堅持自己是無辜的，並要求立即與律師交談。

gept.example_en: The crime rate in this neighborhood has dropped significantly over the past decade.
gept.example_zh: 這個社區的犯罪率在過去十年中大幅下降。

gept.example_en: The criminal was sentenced to fifteen years in prison for armed robbery.
gept.example_zh: 這名罪犯因持械搶劫被判處十五年監禁。

gept.example_en: Many people argue that the punishment should match the seriousness of the crime.
gept.example_zh: 許多人認為懲罰應該與犯罪的嚴重性相符。

gept.example_en: The prison reform program helps inmates learn skills before their release.
gept.example_zh: 監獄改革計劃幫助犯人在釋放前學習技能。

gept.example_en: Her lawyer filed an appeal against the harsh prison sentence last Friday.
gept.example_zh: 她的律師上週五對嚴厲的監禁判決提出上訴。

gept.example_en: Workers have the right to fair pay and safe working conditions by law.
gept.example_zh: 勞工依法擁有公平薪資與安全工作環境的權利。

gept.example_en: A new law banning smoking in restaurants takes effect next month.
gept.example_zh: 禁止在餐廳吸煙的新法律下個月生效。

gept.example_en: It is not legal to drive without a valid license in this country.
gept.example_zh: 在這個國家無證駕駛是不合法的。

gept.example_en: Downloading copyrighted music without permission is illegal in many countries.
gept.example_zh: 未經授權下載受版權保護的音樂在許多國家是非法的。

gept.example_en: Many charities work hard to reduce poverty in developing countries around the world.
gept.example_zh: 許多慈善機構努力減少世界各地發展中國家的貧困。

gept.example_en: Income inequality between the rich and poor continues to grow in many nations.
gept.example_zh: 貧富之間的收入不平等在許多國家持續擴大。

gept.example_en: She donates a portion of her salary to a local charity every month.
gept.example_zh: 她每個月將部分薪水捐贈給當地的慈善機構。

gept.example_en: The shelter provides food and beds for homeless people during winter months.
gept.example_zh: 這個收容所在冬季為無家可歸的人提供食物和床位。

gept.example_en: The welfare system supports families who lose their jobs unexpectedly.
gept.example_zh: 福利制度支持那些意外失業的家庭。

gept.example_en: Minority groups have made important contributions to the country's cultural diversity.
gept.example_zh: 少數族群對該國的文化多樣性做出了重要貢獻。

gept.example_en: The city's population has doubled in the past twenty years due to migration.
gept.example_zh: 由於移民，這座城市的人口在過去二十年中翻了一倍。

gept.example_en: Homelessness has become a serious problem in many large cities recently.
gept.example_zh: 無家可歸最近在許多大城市成為嚴重問題。

gept.example_en: Youth activism played a key role in pushing for climate change legislation.
gept.example_zh: 青年行動主義在推動氣候變遷立法中扮演了關鍵角色。

gept.example_en: Thousands gathered downtown to protest the rise in housing prices.
gept.example_zh: 數千人聚集在市中心抗議房價上漲。

gept.example_en: Residents signed a petition asking the city to build a new park.
gept.example_zh: 居民簽署請願書要求市政府建造一座新公園。

gept.example_en: The hospital received a generous donation from an anonymous local businessman.
gept.example_zh: 醫院收到了一位匿名當地商人的慷慨捐款。

gept.example_en: The Amazon rainforest is home to millions of plant and animal species.
gept.example_zh: 亞馬遜雨林是數百萬種動植物的家園。

gept.example_en: Wetlands provide critical habitats for migratory birds during winter months.
gept.example_zh: 濕地在冬季為候鳥提供關鍵棲息地。

gept.example_en: The desert is surprisingly cold at night despite the burning heat of day.
gept.example_zh: 儘管白天酷熱，沙漠在夜間卻出奇地冷。

gept.example_en: The coral reef supports an incredible variety of colorful fish and sea creatures.
gept.example_zh: 珊瑚礁支持著各式各樣令人難以置信的彩色魚類和海洋生物。

gept.example_en: Pollution can damage an entire ecosystem in just a few short years.
gept.example_zh: 污染可以在短短幾年內破壞整個生態系統。

gept.example_en: Many animals lose their natural habitat when forests are cut down for farming.
gept.example_zh: 許多動物在森林為了農業而被砍伐時失去了自然棲息地。

gept.example_en: Grasslands cover large parts of Africa and support many grazing animals.
gept.example_zh: 草原覆蓋了非洲的大片地區，並支持許多吃草的動物。

gept.example_en: Lions and zebras roam freely across the African savanna in search of food.
gept.example_zh: 獅子和斑馬在非洲莽原上自由地漫遊覓食。

gept.example_en: The Arctic tundra has very few trees because of the harsh climate.
gept.example_zh: 由於氣候嚴峻，北極凍原幾乎沒有樹木。

gept.example_en: The estuary is where the river meets the sea and mixes with salt water.
gept.example_zh: 河口是河水與海水相遇並與鹹水混合的地方。

gept.example_en: Protecting biodiversity is essential for the long-term health of our planet.
gept.example_zh: 保護生物多樣性對我們星球的長期健康至關重要。

gept.example_en: The national park preserves a large area of untouched wilderness for future generations.
gept.example_zh: 國家公園為後代保存了一大片未被觸及的荒野。

gept.example_en: The giant panda eats mostly bamboo and is considered an endangered species.
gept.example_zh: 大熊貓主要吃竹子，被認為是瀕危物種。

gept.example_en: Dolphins are highly intelligent animals that communicate using a variety of sounds.
gept.example_zh: 海豚是高度智慧的動物，使用各種聲音進行交流。

gept.example_en: A small sparrow built its nest in the corner of our balcony.
gept.example_zh: 一隻小麻雀在我們陽台的角落築了巢。

gept.example_en: The garden was full of colorful butterflies fluttering between the flowers.
gept.example_zh: 花園裡到處都是色彩繽紛的蝴蝶在花間飛舞。

gept.example_en: The eagle soared high above the mountains looking for its next meal.
gept.example_zh: 老鷹在山上高高翱翔，尋找下一餐。

gept.example_en: Blue whales are the largest animals that have ever lived on Earth.
gept.example_zh: 藍鯨是地球上有史以來最大的動物。

gept.example_en: We heard frogs croaking loudly near the pond after the heavy rain.
gept.example_zh: 大雨過後我們聽到池塘附近青蛙大聲鳴叫。

gept.example_en: Sea turtles travel thousands of miles to lay their eggs on familiar beaches.
gept.example_zh: 海龜跋涉數千英里到熟悉的海灘產卵。

gept.example_en: A squirrel was busy collecting nuts to store for the long winter ahead.
gept.example_zh: 一隻松鼠忙著收集堅果，儲存以度過漫長的冬天。

gept.example_en: The owl is a nocturnal bird that hunts small animals at night.
gept.example_zh: 貓頭鷹是夜行鳥類，夜晚捕獵小動物。

gept.example_en: Bees play a vital role in pollinating crops that humans depend on.
gept.example_zh: 蜜蜂在為人類賴以維生的作物授粉方面扮演著重要角色。

gept.example_en: A line of ants marched across the kitchen floor toward a small piece of bread.
gept.example_zh: 一列螞蟻在廚房地板上向一小塊麵包行進。

gept.example_en: Kangaroos use their powerful back legs to jump long distances quickly.
gept.example_zh: 袋鼠用強壯的後腿快速地跳很遠的距離。

gept.example_en: Penguins cannot fly but they are excellent swimmers in icy ocean waters.
gept.example_zh: 企鵝不會飛，但牠們是冰冷海水中的優秀游泳者。

gept.example_en: Scientists discover new species of insects in the rainforest every year.
gept.example_zh: 科學家每年在雨林中發現新的昆蟲物種。

gept.example_en: A massive oak tree provides shade for the entire backyard during summer.
gept.example_zh: 一棵巨大的橡樹在夏天為整個後院提供蔭涼。

gept.example_en: Ferns grow well in shady damp places under taller trees.
gept.example_zh: 蕨類在較高樹木下陰涼潮濕的地方生長良好。

gept.example_en: Soft green moss covered the old stones in the forest path.
gept.example_zh: 柔軟的綠色苔蘚覆蓋著森林小徑上的老石頭。

gept.example_en: The students planted a small sapling in the schoolyard as a class project.
gept.example_zh: 學生們在校園裡種了一棵小樹苗作為班級專題。

gept.example_en: Bamboo grows extremely fast and can be used to make furniture and floors.
gept.example_zh: 竹子生長極快，可用於製作家具和地板。

gept.example_en: The mountain trail is lined with tall pine trees that smell wonderful.
gept.example_zh: 山徑兩旁排列著高大的松樹，氣味芬芳。

gept.example_en: A graceful willow leaned over the edge of the pond, its branches touching the water.
gept.example_zh: 一棵優雅的柳樹斜倚在池塘邊，枝條垂入水中。

gept.example_en: She received a beautiful orchid as a gift for her birthday last week.
gept.example_zh: 上週她收到一朵美麗的蘭花作為生日禮物。

gept.example_en: The humidity is very high today, making the air feel sticky and uncomfortable.
gept.example_zh: 今天濕度非常高，讓空氣感覺黏膩不舒服。

gept.example_en: The hurricane caused widespread damage along the coast last September.
gept.example_zh: 去年九月颶風在沿海地區造成了大面積破壞。

gept.example_en: A powerful typhoon forced schools and offices to close for two days.
gept.example_zh: 強烈颱風迫使學校和辦公室關閉兩天。

gept.example_en: The tornado destroyed several houses but fortunately no one was seriously injured.
gept.example_zh: 龍捲風摧毀了幾棟房屋，幸好沒有人嚴重受傷。

gept.example_en: Car emissions are a major cause of air pollution in big cities.
gept.example_zh: 汽車排放是大城市空氣污染的主要原因。

gept.example_en: Recycling paper and plastic helps reduce the amount of waste in landfills.
gept.example_zh: 回收紙張和塑料有助於減少垃圾填埋場的廢物量。

gept.example_en: Solar and wind power are important sources of renewable energy.
gept.example_zh: 太陽能和風能是可再生能源的重要來源。

gept.example_en: Wildlife conservation efforts have helped save many species from extinction.
gept.example_zh: 野生動物保育工作幫助拯救了許多免於滅絕的物種。

gept.example_en: We must develop sustainable farming methods to feed future generations.
gept.example_zh: 我們必須發展永續的耕種方法以餵養後代。

gept.example_en: Air pollution causes serious health problems for people living in big cities.
gept.example_zh: 空氣污染給住在大城市的人們帶來嚴重的健康問題。

gept.example_en: Water contamination from the factory affected the drinking supply of three villages.
gept.example_zh: 來自工廠的水污染影響了三個村莊的飲用水供應。

gept.example_en: Most of our trash ends up in a landfill outside the city.
gept.example_zh: 我們的大部分垃圾最後都進入城外的垃圾填埋場。

gept.example_en: The ozone layer protects us from harmful ultraviolet radiation from the sun.
gept.example_zh: 臭氧層保護我們免受來自太陽的有害紫外線輻射。

gept.example_en: Solar panels on the roof generate enough electricity for the entire house.
gept.example_zh: 屋頂上的太陽能板產生足以供應整個房子的電力。

gept.example_en: Wind power is becoming an increasingly important source of clean electricity.
gept.example_zh: 風力發電正成為越來越重要的清潔電力來源。

gept.example_en: Deforestation has reduced the size of many tropical rainforests significantly.
gept.example_zh: 森林砍伐已大幅減少許多熱帶雨林的面積。

gept.example_en: Soil erosion is a serious problem in areas where forests have been cleared.
gept.example_zh: 土壤侵蝕在森林被清除的地區是一個嚴重問題。

gept.example_en: Biodegradable packaging breaks down naturally and does not harm the environment.
gept.example_zh: 可生物分解的包裝自然分解，不會危害環境。

gept.example_en: Protecting the environment is everyone's responsibility, not just the government's.
gept.example_zh: 保護環境是每個人的責任，而不僅僅是政府的。

gept.example_en: Students study ecology to understand how living things interact with their surroundings.
gept.example_zh: 學生學習生態學以了解生物如何與環境互動。

gept.example_en: Many animals face extinction due to habitat loss and climate change.
gept.example_zh: 許多動物因棲息地喪失和氣候變化而面臨滅絕。

gept.example_en: The endangered tiger needs urgent protection to survive in the wild.
gept.example_zh: 瀕危的老虎需要緊急保護才能在野外生存。

gept.example_en: The climate in this region has become noticeably warmer in recent decades.
gept.example_zh: 這個地區的氣候在最近幾十年明顯變暖。

gept.example_en: We chose eco-friendly cleaning products for our home and office.
gept.example_zh: 我們為家和辦公室選擇了環保的清潔用品。

gept.example_en: I usually use this browser because it loads pages faster than the others.
gept.example_zh: 我通常使用這個瀏覽器，因為它載入頁面比其他的快。

gept.example_en: This plug-in allows you to block annoying advertisements while browsing the web.
gept.example_zh: 這個外掛程式允許你在瀏覽網頁時封鎖惱人的廣告。

gept.example_en: He loves buying the latest gadgets even though he rarely uses them.
gept.example_zh: 他喜歡買最新的小裝置，儘管他很少使用它們。

gept.example_en: You should update the firmware on your router to fix the recent security issues.
gept.example_zh: 你應該更新路由器的韌體以修復最近的安全問題。

gept.example_en: Most teenagers carry a smartphone everywhere they go these days.
gept.example_zh: 現在大多數青少年到哪都帶著智慧型手機。

gept.example_en: The cafe offers free wifi for customers who buy coffee or drinks.
gept.example_zh: 這家咖啡館為購買咖啡或飲料的顧客提供免費無線網路。

gept.example_en: It takes several minutes to download large video files over slow connections.
gept.example_zh: 在慢速連線下載大型視頻檔案需要幾分鐘。

gept.example_en: Remember to upload the report to the shared folder before tomorrow's meeting.
gept.example_zh: 記得在明天會議前將報告上傳到共享資料夾。

gept.example_en: Computer hardware has become much cheaper and more powerful over the years.
gept.example_zh: 電腦硬體多年來變得便宜得多，性能也強大得多。

gept.example_en: This small device can monitor your heart rate throughout the day.
gept.example_zh: 這個小裝置可以全天監測你的心率。

gept.example_en: You need to install the new program before you can use the printer.
gept.example_zh: 你需要先安裝新程式才能使用印表機。

gept.example_en: Please delete any unnecessary files to free up space on your hard drive.
gept.example_zh: 請刪除任何不必要的檔案以釋放硬碟空間。

gept.example_en: Her latest post on social media received thousands of likes and comments.
gept.example_zh: 她最近在社群媒體上的貼文收到了數千個讚和評論。

gept.example_en: His funny retweet of the cat video went viral within just one day.
gept.example_zh: 他轉推那段貓咪影片在一天內就爆紅。

gept.example_en: She gained thousands of new followers after appearing on a popular TV show.
gept.example_zh: 她在出現在熱門電視節目後獲得了數千名新追隨者。

gept.example_en: Use this hashtag so others can easily find your photos about the trip.
gept.example_zh: 使用這個主題標籤，這樣其他人可以輕鬆找到你關於旅行的照片。

gept.example_en: The influencer promoted the new brand to her million online followers.
gept.example_zh: 這位網紅向她的一百萬線上粉絲推廣了新品牌。

gept.example_en: She writes a popular cooking blog with simple recipes for busy people.
gept.example_zh: 她經營一個受歡迎的烹飪部落格，為忙碌的人提供簡單食譜。

gept.example_en: His travel vlog has become very popular among young viewers worldwide.
gept.example_zh: 他的旅行影音部落格在全球年輕觀眾中變得非常受歡迎。

gept.example_en: Fans watched the concert through a livestream on their phones and computers.
gept.example_zh: 粉絲們通過手機和電腦上的直播觀看音樂會。

gept.example_en: The hashtag became trending on the platform within just a few hours.
gept.example_zh: 這個主題標籤在短短幾小時內就在平台上成為熱門話題。

gept.example_en: Her dance video went viral and was viewed millions of times worldwide.
gept.example_zh: 她的舞蹈影片爆紅，在全球被觀看了數百萬次。

gept.example_en: Young people often use emoji to express feelings in text messages.
gept.example_zh: 年輕人經常使用表情符號在簡訊中表達情感。

gept.example_en: Make sure your profile picture looks professional for job-related social media.
gept.example_zh: 確保你的個人檔案照片在求職相關的社群媒體上看起來專業。

gept.example_en: Click the button below to subscribe to our weekly newsletter for free.
gept.example_zh: 點擊下方按鈕免費訂閱我們的每週電子報。

gept.example_en: Her photo received over a thousand likes in just one hour.
gept.example_zh: 她的照片在短短一小時內收到超過一千個讚。

gept.example_en: She sent me a DM asking about the recipe I posted last week.
gept.example_zh: 她發了私訊給我詢問我上週發布的食譜。

gept.example_en: Hackers stole personal information from millions of users last month.
gept.example_zh: 駭客上個月從數百萬用戶那裡竊取了個人資訊。

gept.example_en: The data breach exposed the credit card numbers of thousands of customers.
gept.example_zh: 這次資料外洩使數千名客戶的信用卡號碼曝光。

gept.example_en: End-to-end encryption protects your messages from being read by others.
gept.example_zh: 端對端加密保護你的訊息不被他人讀取。

gept.example_en: Be careful about clicking unknown links that may contain dangerous malware.
gept.example_zh: 小心點擊可能包含危險惡意軟體的未知連結。

gept.example_en: A computer virus can spread quickly through email attachments and infected files.
gept.example_zh: 電腦病毒可以通過電子郵件附件和受感染的檔案快速傳播。

gept.example_en: The company's firewall blocks unauthorized access to their internal network.
gept.example_zh: 公司的防火牆阻止未經授權訪問其內部網路。

gept.example_en: Install reliable antivirus software to protect your computer from threats.
gept.example_zh: 安裝可靠的防毒軟體以保護你的電腦免受威脅。

gept.example_en: Phishing emails try to trick you into revealing your personal information.
gept.example_zh: 網路釣魚電子郵件試圖誘騙你透露個人資訊。

gept.example_en: Many users worry about the privacy of their personal data on social platforms.
gept.example_zh: 許多用戶擔心他們在社群平台上個人資料的隱私。

gept.example_en: Two-factor authentication adds an extra layer of security to your account.
gept.example_zh: 雙重認證為你的帳戶增加額外的安全層。

gept.example_en: Always backup important files to avoid losing them if your computer crashes.
gept.example_zh: 始終備份重要檔案，以避免電腦當機時遺失。

gept.example_en: Enter your username and password to login to the system.
gept.example_zh: 輸入你的使用者名稱和密碼以登入系統。

gept.example_en: Remember to logout from public computers after using them.
gept.example_zh: 記得在使用後從公共電腦登出。

gept.example_en: The photographer used a drone to capture stunning aerial views of the coastline.
gept.example_zh: 攝影師使用無人機拍攝令人驚嘆的海岸線空拍景觀。

gept.example_en: Robotics is changing manufacturing by making production faster and more accurate.
gept.example_zh: 機器人技術通過使生產更快、更準確而改變了製造業。

gept.example_en: Factory automation has reduced the need for human workers on assembly lines.
gept.example_zh: 工廠自動化減少了裝配線上對人工的需求。

gept.example_en: AI can analyze huge amounts of data far faster than any human could.
gept.example_zh: 人工智慧能夠以遠超人類的速度分析大量資料。

gept.example_en: The website uses a special algorithm to recommend products you might like.
gept.example_zh: 該網站使用特殊演算法來推薦你可能喜歡的產品。

gept.example_en: Blockchain technology offers a secure way to record transactions without a central authority.
gept.example_zh: 區塊鏈技術提供了一種無需中央機構就能記錄交易的安全方式。

gept.example_en: Cryptocurrency prices can rise and fall dramatically within just a few hours.
gept.example_zh: 加密貨幣價格在短短幾小時內就可能急劇上漲和下跌。

gept.example_en: Augmented reality games let players see virtual objects in their real surroundings.
gept.example_zh: 擴增實境遊戲讓玩家在真實環境中看到虛擬物體。

gept.example_en: The metaverse promises a new way to socialize, work, and play online.
gept.example_zh: 元宇宙承諾提供一種社交、工作和線上遊戲的新方式。

gept.example_en: Many young people dream of working at an exciting tech startup.
gept.example_zh: 許多年輕人夢想在令人興奮的科技新創公司工作。

gept.example_en: Constant innovation is essential for technology companies to stay competitive.
gept.example_zh: 持續創新對科技公司保持競爭力至關重要。

gept.example_en: The engineers built a prototype of the new electric car for testing.
gept.example_zh: 工程師為新電動車製作了原型進行測試。

gept.example_en: The smartphone is one of the most influential inventions of recent decades.
gept.example_zh: 智慧型手機是近幾十年來最有影響力的發明之一。

gept.example_en: A 3D printer can create complex shapes that traditional methods cannot produce.
gept.example_zh: 3D 印表機可以製作傳統方法無法生產的複雜形狀。

gept.example_en: Biotech companies are developing new treatments for previously incurable diseases.
gept.example_zh: 生物科技公司正在開發以前無法治癒的疾病的新治療方法。

gept.example_en: Nanotechnology has the potential to revolutionize medicine and electronics.
gept.example_zh: 奈米科技有潛力徹底改變醫學和電子產品。

gept.example_en: Electric vehicles produce no exhaust emissions and help reduce urban air pollution.
gept.example_zh: 電動車不產生廢氣排放，有助於減少城市空氣污染。

gept.example_en: We play badminton in the school gym every Tuesday and Thursday evening.
gept.example_zh: 我們每週二和週四晚上在學校體育館打羽毛球。

gept.example_en: Archery requires steady hands, sharp eyes, and a great deal of patience.
gept.example_zh: 射箭需要穩定的手、敏銳的眼睛和極大的耐心。

gept.example_en: She has practiced gymnastics since she was four years old.
gept.example_zh: 她從四歲開始就練習體操。

gept.example_en: He trained for six months to complete his first marathon successfully.
gept.example_zh: 他訓練了六個月才成功完成他的第一場馬拉松。

gept.example_en: Basketball is one of the most popular sports among American teenagers today.
gept.example_zh: 籃球是當今美國青少年中最受歡迎的運動之一。

gept.example_en: We played beach volleyball with friends during our summer holiday last year.
gept.example_zh: 我們去年暑假和朋友一起在沙灘上打排球。

gept.example_en: She has tennis lessons twice a week at the local sports club.
gept.example_zh: 她每週在當地體育俱樂部上兩次網球課。

gept.example_en: Baseball games can sometimes last several hours, especially when scores are close.
gept.example_zh: 棒球比賽有時可以持續幾個小時，尤其是當比分接近時。

gept.example_en: Soccer is the most widely watched sport in the world today.
gept.example_zh: 足球是當今世界上觀看人數最多的運動。

gept.example_en: Ice hockey is extremely popular in Canada and the northern United States.
gept.example_zh: 冰上曲棍球在加拿大和美國北部極為流行。

gept.example_en: He played golf every weekend until his knee injury last winter.
gept.example_zh: 他每週末打高爾夫，直到去年冬天膝蓋受傷。

gept.example_en: Swimming is one of the best exercises for people of all ages.
gept.example_zh: 游泳是各年齡層的人最好的運動之一。

gept.example_en: Cycling around the lake on Sunday mornings is my favorite weekend activity.
gept.example_zh: 週日早晨繞湖騎自行車是我最喜歡的週末活動。

gept.example_en: We went skiing in the mountains during the winter break this year.
gept.example_zh: 今年寒假我們去山上滑雪。

gept.example_en: Surfing is popular along the warm beaches of Hawaii and California.
gept.example_zh: 衝浪在夏威夷和加州溫暖的海灘上很流行。

gept.example_en: Boxing requires both physical strength and mental discipline to succeed at high levels.
gept.example_zh: 拳擊需要身體力量和精神紀律才能在高水平上取得成功。

gept.example_en: Wrestling has been part of the Olympic Games since ancient Greek times.
gept.example_zh: 摔角自古希臘時代起就是奧運會的一部分。

gept.example_en: The university rowing team trains on the river at five every morning.
gept.example_zh: 大學划船隊每天早上五點在河上訓練。

gept.example_en: Ice skating in the park is a wonderful winter activity for families.
gept.example_zh: 在公園裡溜冰是家庭極佳的冬季活動。

gept.example_en: Rugby is a tough sport that requires both speed and physical strength.
gept.example_zh: 橄欖球是一項既需要速度又需要體力的艱苦運動。

gept.example_en: He bought a new tennis racket before the tournament next month.
gept.example_zh: 他在下個月比賽前買了一支新網球拍。

gept.example_en: Always wear a helmet when riding a bicycle to protect your head.
gept.example_zh: 騎自行車時始終戴頭盔以保護頭部。

gept.example_en: I need new sneakers because my old ones are completely worn out.
gept.example_zh: 我需要新運動鞋，因為我的舊鞋已經完全磨壞了。

gept.example_en: She runs on the treadmill for thirty minutes every morning before breakfast.
gept.example_zh: 她每天早餐前在跑步機上跑步三十分鐘。

gept.example_en: Light dumbbell exercises can help build strength in your arms gradually.
gept.example_zh: 輕量啞鈴運動可以幫助逐漸鍛鍊手臂的力量。

gept.example_en: Fans wear their team jersey to every important match of the season.
gept.example_zh: 球迷穿著他們球隊的球衣參加賽季每場重要比賽。

gept.example_en: Don't forget to wear goggles when swimming in the chlorinated pool.
gept.example_zh: 在含氯泳池游泳時別忘了戴護目鏡。

gept.example_en: The volleyball hit the top of the net and bounced back into play.
gept.example_zh: 排球擊中球網頂部後又彈回比賽中。

gept.example_en: The football pitch was muddy after three days of heavy rain.
gept.example_zh: 經過三天大雨後足球場變得泥濘不堪。

gept.example_en: The children kicked the ball around the field until it got dark.
gept.example_zh: 孩子們在球場上踢球直到天黑。

gept.example_en: He picked up the bat and stepped confidently up to home plate.
gept.example_zh: 他拿起球棒，自信地走向本壘板。

gept.example_en: Golf clubs come in different sizes and shapes for various types of shots.
gept.example_zh: 高爾夫球桿有不同的尺寸和形狀，適合各種類型的擊球。

gept.example_en: She received a new pair of ice skates for her birthday this year.
gept.example_zh: 她今年生日收到一雙新冰鞋。

gept.example_en: His skis were carefully packed in the trunk for the trip to the mountains.
gept.example_zh: 他的滑雪板被仔細地放在後車廂裡準備上山旅行。

gept.example_en: Make sure you have all the camping gear before leaving for the trip.
gept.example_zh: 出發旅行前確保你有所有露營裝備。

gept.example_en: The referee blew the whistle to signal the end of the first half.
gept.example_zh: 裁判吹哨示意上半場結束。

gept.example_en: The rookie surprised everyone by scoring the winning goal in his first game.
gept.example_zh: 這名新人在他的首場比賽中進球致勝，讓所有人都很驚訝。

gept.example_en: The veteran player retired after twenty successful years in professional football.
gept.example_zh: 這名老將在職業足球生涯成功二十年後退役。

gept.example_en: The coach gathered the team for a motivational speech before the match.
gept.example_zh: 教練在比賽前召集球隊發表激勵性演說。

gept.example_en: The referee made several controversial calls during yesterday's important match.
gept.example_zh: 裁判在昨天的重要比賽中做出了幾個有爭議的判決。

gept.example_en: She is a talented young athlete who has won many regional competitions.
gept.example_zh: 她是一位才華洋溢的年輕運動員，贏得了許多區域性比賽。

gept.example_en: The captain led his team to victory through inspiring leadership and skill.
gept.example_zh: 隊長透過鼓舞人心的領導力和技巧帶領球隊取得勝利。

gept.example_en: Our team's next opponent is the current league champion from last season.
gept.example_zh: 我們球隊的下一個對手是上賽季的現任聯賽冠軍。

gept.example_en: The champion successfully defended her title for the third year in a row.
gept.example_zh: 冠軍連續第三年成功衛冕。

gept.example_en: The runner-up received a silver medal and prize money for second place.
gept.example_zh: 亞軍獲得銀牌和第二名獎金。

gept.example_en: The striker scored two goals in the second half to win the match.
gept.example_zh: 前鋒在下半場進兩球贏得比賽。

gept.example_en: The goalkeeper made an amazing save in the final minutes of the game.
gept.example_zh: 守門員在比賽最後幾分鐘做出了驚人的撲救。

gept.example_en: The national squad has been training together for the upcoming tournament.
gept.example_zh: 國家隊一直在為即將到來的比賽一起訓練。

gept.example_en: Their team finished third in the league standings this season.
gept.example_zh: 他們的球隊本賽季在聯盟排名中名列第三。

gept.example_en: The young player dribbled past three defenders before passing the ball.
gept.example_zh: 這位年輕球員運球越過三名防守球員後傳球。

gept.example_en: Her powerful serve made it difficult for opponents to return the ball.
gept.example_zh: 她強而有力的發球使對手難以接球。

gept.example_en: The defender bravely tackled the striker before he could shoot.
gept.example_zh: 防守球員在前鋒射門前勇敢地將他阻截下來。

gept.example_en: He kicked the ball powerfully toward the goal but missed by inches.
gept.example_zh: 他用力把球踢向球門，但只差幾英寸沒進。

gept.example_en: She dived gracefully from the high board into the pool below.
gept.example_zh: 她從高跳板優雅地跳入下方泳池。

gept.example_en: Athletes train hard to jump higher and longer than their competitors.
gept.example_zh: 運動員努力訓練，以跳得比競爭對手更高更遠。

gept.example_en: He can throw a baseball farther than anyone else on the team.
gept.example_zh: 他扔棒球比球隊任何人都遠。

gept.example_en: She managed to catch the ball just before it crossed the boundary line.
gept.example_zh: 她設法在球越過邊界線前接到它。

gept.example_en: He hit the ball over the fence for a home run.
gept.example_zh: 他將球擊出圍欄，打出全壘打。

gept.example_en: The player paused for a moment before deciding to shoot at the goal.
gept.example_zh: 球員停頓片刻後決定射門。

gept.example_en: Always warm up properly before doing any heavy exercise to avoid injury.
gept.example_zh: 在做任何劇烈運動前務必好好暖身以避免受傷。

gept.example_en: Hundreds of swimmers came to compete in the international championship last month.
gept.example_zh: 上個月數百名游泳選手前來參加國際錦標賽。

gept.example_en: Our team finally defeated the defending champions after several close matches.
gept.example_zh: 經過幾場激烈比賽後，我們的球隊終於擊敗了衛冕冠軍。

gept.example_en: The melody of that old song still gets stuck in my head for days.
gept.example_zh: 那首老歌的旋律仍然在我腦海裡縈繞好幾天。

gept.example_en: The lyrics of this song tell a touching story about lost love.
gept.example_zh: 這首歌的歌詞講述了一個關於失去愛情的感人故事。

gept.example_en: Everyone in the crowd sang along loudly during the chorus of the song.
gept.example_zh: 人群中的每個人在歌曲副歌部分大聲跟著唱。

gept.example_en: The movie soundtrack became almost as famous as the film itself.
gept.example_zh: 這部電影的配樂變得幾乎和電影本身一樣有名。

gept.example_en: She has played several musical instruments since she was a small child.
gept.example_zh: 她從小就會演奏好幾種樂器。

gept.example_en: The orchestra performed Beethoven's ninth symphony to a packed concert hall.
gept.example_zh: 管弦樂團為座無虛席的音樂廳演奏貝多芬第九交響曲。

gept.example_en: Their band has been performing together for almost ten years now.
gept.example_zh: 他們的樂團一起表演已經將近十年了。

gept.example_en: Her new album reached the top of the charts within just one week.
gept.example_zh: 她的新專輯在一週內就登上排行榜首位。

gept.example_en: The band released their latest single online before the full album came out.
gept.example_zh: 樂團在完整專輯發行前先在網上發布最新單曲。

gept.example_en: He taught himself to play guitar by watching tutorials on the internet.
gept.example_zh: 他通過看網路上的教學自學吉他。

gept.example_en: She has been studying piano with a private teacher for over five years.
gept.example_zh: 她跟著私人老師學鋼琴已經超過五年了。

gept.example_en: The drum solo in the middle of the song impressed the entire audience.
gept.example_zh: 歌曲中段的鼓獨奏讓全場觀眾印象深刻。

gept.example_en: The violin produces a beautiful sound in the hands of a skilled musician.
gept.example_zh: 在熟練音樂家手中，小提琴能發出美麗的聲音。

gept.example_en: We bought tickets to attend the outdoor jazz concert next Saturday evening.
gept.example_zh: 我們買了票參加下週六晚上的戶外爵士樂音樂會。

gept.example_en: Rock music is just one of many popular musical genres these days.
gept.example_zh: 搖滾樂只是當今眾多流行音樂類型之一。

gept.example_en: Mozart is considered one of the greatest composers in classical music history.
gept.example_zh: 莫札特被認為是古典音樂史上最偉大的作曲家之一。

gept.example_en: The lively rhythm of the music made everyone want to dance.
gept.example_zh: 音樂的活潑節奏讓每個人都想跳舞。

gept.example_en: The marble sculpture in the museum took the artist three years to complete.
gept.example_zh: 博物館裡那座大理石雕塑藝術家花了三年才完成。

gept.example_en: A large mural decorates the wall of the elementary school building.
gept.example_zh: 一幅大型壁畫裝飾著小學建築物的牆壁。

gept.example_en: She painted a beautiful portrait of her grandmother for her birthday gift.
gept.example_zh: 她畫了一幅祖母美麗的肖像作為生日禮物。

gept.example_en: The artist stretched a fresh canvas across the wooden frame before starting.
gept.example_zh: 藝術家在開始前在木框上繃了一塊新畫布。

gept.example_en: The famous painter held an exhibition of his recent works downtown.
gept.example_zh: 這位著名畫家在市中心舉辦了他近期作品的展覽。

gept.example_en: The art exhibition will be open to the public for three weeks.
gept.example_zh: 這個藝術展覽將對公眾開放三週。

gept.example_en: The Mona Lisa is considered one of the greatest masterpieces in art history.
gept.example_zh: 蒙娜麗莎被認為是藝術史上最偉大的傑作之一。

gept.example_en: Wildlife photography requires patience and a great deal of technical skill.
gept.example_zh: 野生動物攝影需要耐心和大量的技術能力。

gept.example_en: Her unique designs have won several awards in international competitions.
gept.example_zh: 她獨特的設計在國際比賽中贏得多項獎項。

gept.example_en: He likes to sketch quick drawings of people he sees in the park.
gept.example_zh: 他喜歡為他在公園裡看到的人快速畫素描。

gept.example_en: A bronze statue of the city's founder stands in the central square.
gept.example_zh: 城市創立者的銅像矗立在中央廣場上。

gept.example_en: The drama students performed a Shakespeare play at the school theater.
gept.example_zh: 戲劇學生在學校劇院演出了一齣莎士比亞的戲劇。

gept.example_en: She has practiced ballet since she was just four years old.
gept.example_zh: 她從四歲起就開始練芭蕾。

gept.example_en: The opera tells a tragic love story set in nineteenth-century France.
gept.example_zh: 這部歌劇講述了一個發生在十九世紀法國的悲劇愛情故事。

gept.example_en: His stand-up comedy show made the entire audience laugh out loud.
gept.example_zh: 他的單口喜劇表演讓全場觀眾大笑。

gept.example_en: The local theater puts on three different plays each season.
gept.example_zh: 當地劇院每季上演三部不同的戲劇。

gept.example_en: Each performer received warm applause for their unique talent.
gept.example_zh: 每位表演者都因其獨特的才華獲得熱烈掌聲。

gept.example_en: The cast had three more rehearsals before opening night.
gept.example_zh: 劇組在首演夜之前還有三次排練。

gept.example_en: Many famous musicals from Broadway have been performed worldwide.
gept.example_zh: 許多來自百老匯的著名音樂劇已在世界各地演出。

gept.example_en: The circus comes to our town for two weeks every summer.
gept.example_zh: 馬戲團每年夏天來我們鎮上兩週。

gept.example_en: The magic show amazed both children and adults with impossible tricks.
gept.example_zh: 這場魔術表演用不可能的把戲讓兒童和成人都驚嘆不已。

gept.example_en: She teaches modern dance to teenagers at the community center.
gept.example_zh: 她在社區中心教青少年現代舞。

gept.example_en: He always wanted to act in movies since he was a teenager.
gept.example_zh: 他從青少年時期就一直想演電影。

gept.example_en: The plot of the movie was so confusing that nobody understood the ending.
gept.example_zh: 電影的情節太混亂，沒人理解結局。

gept.example_en: Fans waited five long years for the sequel to be released in theaters.
gept.example_zh: 影迷們等了漫長的五年才等到續集在電影院上映。

gept.example_en: I watched three episodes of the new series in a row last night.
gept.example_zh: 我昨晚一口氣看了新影集的三集。

gept.example_en: The popular series has been renewed for another two seasons by the network.
gept.example_zh: 這部熱門影集已被電視網續訂兩季。

gept.example_en: The final scene of the movie was filmed on a beach in Hawaii.
gept.example_zh: 電影的最後一幕在夏威夷的海灘上拍攝。

gept.example_en: The actor won an award for his powerful performance in the war film.
gept.example_zh: 這位演員因在這部戰爭片中精彩的表演而獲獎。

gept.example_en: The young actress made her film debut in this critically acclaimed movie.
gept.example_zh: 這位年輕女演員在這部備受好評的電影中首次亮相。

gept.example_en: The script was rewritten several times before the director was happy with it.
gept.example_zh: 劇本被改寫了好幾次，導演才滿意。

gept.example_en: The movie premiere was attended by hundreds of celebrities and journalists.
gept.example_zh: 電影首映禮有數百名名人和記者出席。

gept.example_en: The film broke all box office records during its opening weekend.
gept.example_zh: 這部電影在首映週末打破了所有票房紀錄。

gept.example_en: The trailer made the movie look more exciting than it actually was.
gept.example_zh: 預告片讓這部電影看起來比實際上更刺激。

gept.example_en: The cast of the new film includes several award-winning actors.
gept.example_zh: 新電影的演員陣容包括幾位獲獎演員。

gept.example_en: Every great story needs a memorable villain to challenge the hero.
gept.example_zh: 每個偉大的故事都需要一個令人難忘的反派來挑戰主角。

gept.example_en: The cinematography in this film captures the beauty of the natural landscape.
gept.example_zh: 這部電影的攝影捕捉了自然景觀的美麗。

gept.example_en: The documentary explores the lives of fishermen in a small coastal village.
gept.example_zh: 這部紀錄片探索了一個小沿海村莊漁民的生活。

gept.example_en: Modern animation uses computers to create amazingly realistic images.
gept.example_zh: 現代動畫使用電腦製作令人驚嘆的逼真圖像。

gept.example_en: I watch foreign films with English subtitles to understand the dialogue.
gept.example_zh: 我看外國電影時加英文字幕以理解對話。

gept.example_en: The dubbing of the cartoon was done by famous voice actors.
gept.example_zh: 這部卡通的配音由著名的配音演員完成。

gept.example_en: The show's ratings dropped sharply in its third season.
gept.example_zh: 這個節目在第三季的收視率急劇下降。

gept.example_en: The summer blockbuster earned millions in its first weekend.
gept.example_zh: 這部夏季大片在首映週末就賺進數百萬美元。

gept.example_en: My grandmother taught me knitting when I was just seven years old.
gept.example_zh: 我祖母在我七歲時就教我編織。

gept.example_en: She took a pottery class on weekends and made beautiful bowls and vases.
gept.example_zh: 她週末參加陶藝課，做了漂亮的碗和花瓶。

gept.example_en: Chinese calligraphy requires years of practice to master the proper brush strokes.
gept.example_zh: 中國書法需要多年練習才能掌握正確的筆畫。

gept.example_en: The children learned origami by folding colorful paper into birds and flowers.
gept.example_zh: 孩子們通過將彩色紙摺成鳥和花來學習摺紙。

gept.example_en: Her embroidery work has been displayed in several local craft exhibitions.
gept.example_zh: 她的刺繡作品已在幾個當地工藝品展覽中展出。

gept.example_en: She enjoys sewing her own clothes in her free time during weekends.
gept.example_zh: 她週末閒暇時喜歡自己縫衣服。

gept.example_en: My aunt can crochet a complete blanket within just a few days.
gept.example_zh: 我阿姨可以在幾天內鉤完一條完整的毯子。

gept.example_en: Woodworking requires both precision and patience to create quality furniture.
gept.example_zh: 木工需要精確和耐心才能製作高品質的家具。

gept.example_en: Painting helps her relax after a long stressful day at work.
gept.example_zh: 繪畫幫助她在漫長壓力大的工作日後放鬆。

gept.example_en: She has been improving her drawing skills by practicing every single day.
gept.example_zh: 她每天練習，繪圖技巧不斷進步。

gept.example_en: Scrapbooking is a creative way to preserve memories with photos and souvenirs.
gept.example_zh: 剪貼簿是一種用照片和紀念品保存記憶的創意方式。

gept.example_en: The quilting club meets every Tuesday afternoon at the community center.
gept.example_zh: 拼布俱樂部每週二下午在社區中心聚會。

gept.example_en: The art teacher introduced her students to basic ceramics techniques last semester.
gept.example_zh: 美術老師上學期向她的學生介紹了基本的陶瓷技術。

gept.example_en: Jewelry making has become a popular hobby for people of all ages recently.
gept.example_zh: 珠寶製作最近成為各年齡層人們流行的愛好。

gept.example_en: Japanese flower arranging follows strict rules about balance and harmony.
gept.example_zh: 日本花藝遵循關於平衡和和諧的嚴格規則。

gept.example_en: Baking bread at home has become more popular during recent years.
gept.example_zh: 近年來在家烘焙麵包變得更受歡迎。

gept.example_en: Candle making is a relaxing hobby that produces useful and beautiful items.
gept.example_zh: 製作蠟燭是一個放鬆的愛好，可以製作有用又美麗的物品。

gept.example_en: Model building requires careful attention to small details and steady hands.
gept.example_zh: 模型製作需要對細節的仔細關注和穩定的雙手。

gept.example_en: Crafting helps children develop creativity and improve hand-eye coordination.
gept.example_zh: 手工藝幫助孩子發展創造力並改善手眼協調。

gept.example_en: Be careful not to scratch the surface of the wooden table.
gept.example_zh: 小心不要刮到木桌的表面。

gept.example_en: She stitched the torn pocket back together using strong thread.
gept.example_zh: 她用結實的線把破口袋縫好。

gept.example_en: Hiking through the forest is one of my favorite weekend activities.
gept.example_zh: 在森林中健行是我最喜歡的週末活動之一。

gept.example_en: We went camping in the mountains for three nights last summer.
gept.example_zh: 我們去年夏天在山上露營了三晚。

gept.example_en: Fishing at the lake early in the morning is incredibly peaceful and quiet.
gept.example_zh: 清晨在湖邊釣魚非常寧靜安詳。

gept.example_en: Kayaking down the river gave us amazing views of the canyon walls.
gept.example_zh: 沿河划皮艇讓我們看到峽谷峭壁令人驚嘆的景色。

gept.example_en: White-water rafting is an exciting but somewhat dangerous outdoor activity.
gept.example_zh: 白水泛舟是一項刺激但有些危險的戶外活動。

gept.example_en: Rock climbing builds both physical strength and mental focus simultaneously.
gept.example_zh: 攀岩同時鍛鍊體力和精神專注力。

gept.example_en: Mountain trekking requires good boots, warm clothes, and plenty of water.
gept.example_zh: 山地徒步旅行需要好的靴子、保暖的衣服和大量的水。

gept.example_en: Birdwatching has become a popular hobby among retired people in our neighborhood.
gept.example_zh: 觀鳥在我們社區退休人士中已成為流行的愛好。

gept.example_en: Gardening helps me relax and forget about the stresses of daily life.
gept.example_zh: 園藝幫助我放鬆並忘記日常生活的壓力。

gept.example_en: We had a wonderful picnic by the river on Sunday afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 我們週日下午在河邊有個美好的野餐。

gept.example_en: The family barbecue brought together relatives from across the country.
gept.example_zh: 家庭烤肉聚會聚集了來自全國各地的親戚。

gept.example_en: The hiking trail leads to a beautiful waterfall hidden deep in the forest.
gept.example_zh: 這條健行步道通往一個藏在森林深處的美麗瀑布。

gept.example_en: A warm sleeping bag is essential for camping in cold mountain areas.
gept.example_zh: 在寒冷的山區露營時，溫暖的睡袋是必需品。

gept.example_en: We spent the weekend in the peaceful countryside far from the city.
gept.example_zh: 我們在遠離城市的寧靜鄉村度過了週末。

gept.example_en: Their three-week trip to the jungle was a real adventure for everyone.
gept.example_zh: 他們為期三週的叢林之旅對每個人來說都是一次真正的冒險。

gept.example_en: She picked up the paddle and pushed the kayak away from the shore.
gept.example_zh: 她拿起槳，把皮艇推離岸邊。

gept.example_en: I used binoculars to watch the eagles flying high above the cliff.
gept.example_zh: 我用雙筒望遠鏡觀看在懸崖高處飛翔的老鷹。

gept.example_en: Experienced trekkers can hike for ten hours straight without getting too tired.
gept.example_zh: 有經驗的徒步旅行者可以連續健行十小時而不太累。

gept.example_en: The thousand-piece puzzle took us nearly three weeks to complete.
gept.example_zh: 這個一千片的拼圖花了我們將近三週才完成。

gept.example_en: Our family plays board games together every Friday evening after dinner.
gept.example_zh: 我們家每週五晚餐後一起玩桌遊。

gept.example_en: He spends too many hours playing video games instead of doing homework.
gept.example_zh: 他花太多時間玩電玩遊戲而不做功課。

gept.example_en: Chess teaches patience, planning, and strategic thinking to young players.
gept.example_zh: 西洋棋教導年輕玩家耐心、計劃和策略思維。

gept.example_en: Card games have been popular in many cultures for hundreds of years.
gept.example_zh: 紙牌遊戲在許多文化中已流行數百年。

gept.example_en: She enjoys solving crossword puzzles with her morning coffee every day.
gept.example_zh: 她每天早上配著咖啡享受解填字遊戲。

gept.example_en: The teacher asked the students a clever riddle that puzzled the whole class.
gept.example_zh: 老師問學生一個聰明的謎語，全班都猜不出來。

gept.example_en: Checkers is a simple but strategic game suitable for players of all ages.
gept.example_zh: 跳棋是一個簡單但有策略性的遊戲，適合各年齡層的玩家。

gept.example_en: Monopoly has been a favorite family board game for several generations.
gept.example_zh: 大富翁幾代以來一直是家庭最愛的桌遊。

gept.example_en: She plays solitaire on her phone whenever she needs to relax for a few minutes.
gept.example_zh: 每當她需要放鬆幾分鐘時，她就會在手機上玩接龍。

gept.example_en: The bar hosts a trivia night every Wednesday with prizes for winning teams.
gept.example_zh: 這間酒吧每週三晚上舉辦益智問答之夜，獲勝隊伍有獎品。

gept.example_en: He bought a new controller because the old one stopped working properly.
gept.example_zh: 他買了一個新控制器，因為舊的不能正常工作了。

gept.example_en: Multiplayer games allow friends to play together over the internet.
gept.example_zh: 多人遊戲允許朋友通過網際網路一起玩。

gept.example_en: Players can customize their avatar with different clothes and accessories.
gept.example_zh: 玩家可以用不同的衣服和配件自訂他們的虛擬化身。

gept.example_en: The hero must complete a difficult quest to save the kingdom.
gept.example_zh: 主角必須完成一項艱難的任務以拯救王國。

gept.example_en: Each mission in the game gets progressively harder as you advance.
gept.example_zh: 遊戲中的每個任務隨著你的進展逐漸變難。

gept.example_en: Her name remained at the top of the leaderboard for several weeks.
gept.example_zh: 她的名字在排行榜上保持榜首數週。

gept.example_en: After hours of intense play, our team finally achieved victory.
gept.example_zh: 經過幾小時的激烈遊戲，我們的團隊終於取得勝利。

gept.example_en: The chess tournament attracted players from over twenty countries this year.
gept.example_zh: 這場西洋棋錦標賽今年吸引了來自二十多個國家的選手。

gept.example_en: Players must understand the rules before starting a new game.
gept.example_zh: 玩家必須在開始新遊戲前了解規則。

gept.example_en: The reporter interviewed several witnesses at the scene of the accident.
gept.example_zh: 記者在事故現場採訪了幾位目擊者。

gept.example_en: The story made the front page headline of every major newspaper.
gept.example_zh: 這則報導成為每份主要報紙的頭版頭條。

gept.example_en: The news broadcast was interrupted by an urgent weather warning.
gept.example_zh: 新聞廣播被緊急天氣警報打斷。

gept.example_en: The reporter refused to reveal the source of her information.
gept.example_zh: 記者拒絕透露她的資訊來源。

gept.example_en: The journalist won an award for her investigation into government corruption.
gept.example_zh: 這位記者因調查政府腐敗而獲獎。

gept.example_en: The editor reviewed the article carefully before approving it for publication.
gept.example_zh: 編輯在批准發表前仔細審查了這篇文章。

gept.example_en: The publisher decided to release the book in both print and digital formats.
gept.example_zh: 出版商決定以印刷和數位兩種形式發行這本書。

gept.example_en: I read the newspaper every morning while having my breakfast coffee.
gept.example_zh: 我每天早上一邊喝早餐咖啡一邊看報紙。

gept.example_en: The fashion magazine features interviews with famous designers every month.
gept.example_zh: 這本時尚雜誌每月刊登對著名設計師的採訪。

gept.example_en: He writes a weekly column about local restaurants for the city newspaper.
gept.example_zh: 他為城市報紙撰寫一個關於當地餐廳的每週專欄。

gept.example_en: The newspaper's editorial criticized the mayor's recent decisions on public housing.
gept.example_zh: 這份報紙的社論批評了市長最近關於公共住房的決定。

gept.example_en: Members of the press gathered outside the courthouse waiting for news.
gept.example_zh: 新聞界成員聚集在法院外等待消息。

gept.example_en: The mass media plays an important role in shaping public opinion.
gept.example_zh: 大眾媒體在塑造輿論中扮演重要角色。

gept.example_en: The election received extensive coverage from international news organizations.
gept.example_zh: 選舉受到國際新聞機構的廣泛報導。

gept.example_en: Our foreign correspondent reports directly from the war zone every evening.
gept.example_zh: 我們的外國通訊記者每晚直接從戰區報導。

gept.example_en: The company issued a press release explaining the recent management changes.
gept.example_zh: 公司發布新聞稿解釋最近的管理層變動。

gept.example_en: Her byline appears on dozens of articles about international politics.
gept.example_zh: 她的署名出現在數十篇關於國際政治的文章上。

gept.example_en: The magazine ran a feature about the rise of electric vehicles.
gept.example_zh: 這本雜誌刊登了一篇關於電動車崛起的特寫。

gept.example_en: The newspaper will publish the full investigation next Sunday morning.
gept.example_zh: 這份報紙將於下週日早上發表完整的調查報告。

gept.example_en: The magazine's circulation has been declining since most readers switched to digital.
gept.example_zh: 自從大多數讀者轉向數位以來，這本雜誌的發行量一直在下降。

gept.example_en: The political scandal forced the minister to resign from her position immediately.
gept.example_zh: 這次政治醜聞迫使部長立即從她的職位辭職。

gept.example_en: Scientists announced a major breakthrough in cancer research this morning.
gept.example_zh: 科學家今早宣布在癌症研究方面取得重大突破。

gept.example_en: The new law has sparked controversy among many different community groups.
gept.example_zh: 這項新法律在許多不同的社區團體中引發爭議。

gept.example_en: Don't believe every rumor you hear about celebrities on social media.
gept.example_zh: 不要相信你在社群媒體上聽到的關於名人的每個謠言。

gept.example_en: The revelation about hidden documents shocked the public completely.
gept.example_zh: 關於隱藏文件的揭露完全震驚了公眾。

gept.example_en: The economic crisis affected millions of families around the world.
gept.example_zh: 經濟危機影響了全世界數百萬家庭。

gept.example_en: The earthquake was the worst natural disaster the region had ever experienced.
gept.example_zh: 這次地震是該地區經歷過的最嚴重自然災害。

gept.example_en: The discovery of ancient ruins surprised archaeologists from around the world.
gept.example_zh: 古代遺跡的發現讓全世界的考古學家感到驚訝。

gept.example_en: The incident at the train station caused major delays during rush hour.
gept.example_zh: 火車站的事件在尖峰時段造成重大延誤。

gept.example_en: The charity event raised thousands of dollars for the local food bank.
gept.example_zh: 這個慈善活動為當地食物銀行募集了數千美元。

gept.example_en: The latest trends in fashion are heavily influenced by social media stars.
gept.example_zh: 最新的時尚趨勢受到社群媒體明星的強烈影響。

gept.example_en: Important community notices are posted on the bulletin board near the entrance.
gept.example_zh: 重要的社區通知張貼在入口附近的公告欄上。

gept.example_en: The protest movement gained millions of supporters across the country.
gept.example_zh: 這個抗議運動在全國獲得了數百萬支持者。

gept.example_en: Workers went on strike to demand better pay and safer working conditions.
gept.example_zh: 工人罷工要求更好的薪酬和更安全的工作條件。

gept.example_en: Police were called in to control the riot that broke out downtown.
gept.example_zh: 警察被叫來控制市中心爆發的暴動。

gept.example_en: The merger of the two companies created the largest firm in the industry.
gept.example_zh: 兩家公司的合併創造了業內最大的公司。

gept.example_en: The court's ruling ended the long legal battle between the two corporations.
gept.example_zh: 法院的裁定結束了兩家公司之間漫長的法律戰。

gept.example_en: The mayor held a press conference to address concerns about public safety.
gept.example_zh: 市長舉行記者會以回應對公共安全的擔憂。

gept.example_en: The company shared its earnings webcast with investors around the world.
gept.example_zh: 公司與全球投資者分享了它的盈利網路直播。

gept.example_en: His weekly talk show covers current events and politics in depth.
gept.example_zh: 他的每週脫口秀深入探討時事和政治。

gept.example_en: Witnesses were asked to give detailed testimony to the investigating officer.
gept.example_zh: 目擊者被要求向調查官員提供詳細證詞。

gept.example_en: Sports commentary makes watching games on television more exciting and informative.
gept.example_zh: 體育評論使在電視上觀看比賽更加刺激和有資訊性。

gept.example_en: Her op-ed about education reform sparked discussion across the country.
gept.example_zh: 她關於教育改革的評論專欄在全國引起討論。

gept.example_en: A large political rally drew thousands of supporters to the city square.
gept.example_zh: 一場大型政治集會吸引了數千名支持者來到城市廣場。

gept.example_en: The dialogue between management and workers led to a successful agreement.
gept.example_zh: 管理層與工人之間的對話促成了一項成功的協議。

gept.example_en: The peace negotiation between the two countries has entered its final stage.
gept.example_zh: 兩國之間的和平談判已進入最後階段。

gept.example_en: Leaders from the major economic powers will attend the summit next month.
gept.example_zh: 主要經濟強國的領導人下個月將出席高峰會。

gept.example_en: The latest poll suggests that the election will be very close.
gept.example_zh: 最新的民調顯示這次選舉將非常接近。

gept.example_en: The spectator stood up to applaud the speaker's important message.
gept.example_zh: 觀眾起立鼓掌讚揚講者的重要信息。

gept.example_en: Radio listeners often call in to share their opinions during talk shows.
gept.example_zh: 廣播聽眾經常在脫口秀節目中打電話分享他們的意見。

gept.example_en: Television viewers were shocked by the dramatic ending of the popular series.
gept.example_zh: 電視觀眾對這部熱門影集的戲劇性結局感到震驚。

gept.example_en: The streaming service now has over a hundred million subscribers worldwide.
gept.example_zh: 這個串流服務現在在全球擁有超過一億訂閱者。

gept.example_en: The newspaper's readership has grown steadily since the redesign last year.
gept.example_zh: 自從去年重新設計以來，這份報紙的讀者群穩定增長。

gept.example_en: The TV show received the highest rating among teenage viewers.
gept.example_zh: 這個電視節目在青少年觀眾中獲得最高評分。
